Job24:1 “Vbọzẹ ne Osanobua na ma rhie ẹghẹ ibuohiẹn ye otọ yi. Ẹdẹ ohiẹn ata ne iran ni ga ẹe?
Job24:2 “Emwa ghi gha silo irri ne a ya fian uwu
Job24:3 Iran ghi mu ekẹtẹkẹtẹ ọghe emọ ne ẹ i mwẹ erha
Job24:4 Iran i giẹ emwi ne ọ khẹ ke ovbiogue sẹ ọre obọ. Iran ghi khu e ne ẹ i mwẹ ne ọ ya lẹre.
Job24:5 “Rhunmwuda ọnii
Job24:6 Iran imwẹ ugbo ne a na rhọ emwi okọ
Job24:7 Asọn gha rre
Job24:8 Amẹ ni rhọ vbe uhunmwu oke ghi gbe iran. Iran ghi ya si mama ye ọkpẹn okuta nekhua ne ọ degue iran.
Job24:9 “Emwa dan ghi gha ya emobọ ne ẹ i mwẹ erha ru eviẹn
Job24:10 Sokpan
Job24:11 Iran ghi gha minọ ẹvbi oliv ladian
Job24:12 Iran ne a kuanrẹn kevbe ni wulo khian
Job24:13 “Emwa eso rrọ ni he uwanmwẹ ye otọ. Iran ma rẹn otọ ẹre ra ne iran la ehe ne ọ viọ iran la.
Job24:14 Ẹdẹ gha da gbe
Job24:15 Ọmwa ne ọ miẹn amwẹ ẹrrẹe ghi gha khẹ ne ẹdẹ gha gue
Job24:16 Asọn gha rre
Job24:17 Ohan uwanmwẹ vbe mu iran
Job24:18 “Orogho ghi lẹ emwa dan kua Osanobua fi otọ ẹre unu. Ẹ i ghi yo ya winna vbe ogba azara ẹre.
Job24:19 Zẹ vbe ne esia khian ne ahobẹkun vbe owowo kevbe uyunmwu
Job24:20 Uhin ighẹ iye ẹe ma ghi ye ẹre rre nian
Job24:21 Emwi vberriọ mian rẹn rhunmwuda obọ dan ne ọ ya mu avbe ẹgbẹ
Job24:22 Osanobua ya ẹtin ẹnrẹn fuẹn iran ni wegbe ua. Osanobua ru emwi
Job24:23 Osanobua sẹtin giee gha rrọọ vbe a i mwẹ ẹbe
Job24:24 Agbọn ghi gha maa ọmwa dan vbe ovbi ẹghẹ kherhe
Job24:25 De ọmwa ne ọ gha sẹtin kha yi ighe ẹ i re erriọ ọ na gele ye? Ọmwa rhọkpa gha sẹtin rhie maa ra wẹ
Job25:1 Ẹre Bildad ne ovbi ẹvbo ne a tie ẹre Siua na wanniẹn wẹẹ
Job25:2 
Job25:3 A gha miẹn ne ọ gha sẹtin ka avbe odibo ni ga ẹe ra? Ihe ọkpa rrọọ ra ne uwanmwẹ Osanobua i na wan muotọ?
Job25:4 A gha miẹn ọmwa ne ọ re ọmwata kevbe ne ẹ i mwẹ iruẹn vbe odaro Osanobua ra?
Job25:5 Uki ne arengbe i mwẹ uwanmwẹ vbe odaro ẹre
Job25:6 Inu-inu ghi nọ ne ọmwa nagbọn
Job26:1 Ẹre na wanniẹn wẹẹ
Job26:2 
Job26:3 U ru ibude esi
Job26:4 De ọmwa ne uwẹ ro ighẹ ọ gha họn ẹmwẹ uwẹ na hia? Gha ọ gua ekhọe ruẹ kpao ne u ya guan vbenian na?
Job26:5 “Orhiọn iran ni wulo nẹ gha guọ vbe uwu amẹ ne ọ rre ototọ otọe na.
Job26:6 Odaro Osanobua ọ re agbọn iran ni wulo nẹ ye. Emwi ne ọ degue ẹre hin ehe ne ọ ye rre i rrọ.
Job26:7 Osanobua ọ re ọ tan iso ne ọrre odẹ okuọ. Ọ na mu agbọn na rrọ ye ideghedeghe.
Job26:8 Osanobua ọre ọ ye amẹ vuọn ikpakpa iso
Job26:9 Ọ rhie uki ne ọ koo urro lẹre ye iyeke okuku amẹ.
Job26:10 Ọ ya uviẹn okhiokhi ne ọ vin ye okun
Job26:11 Ọ gha zẹ aro mu avbe orre ni da iso yi
Job26:12 Ẹtin ẹnrẹn ọ re ọ khọnmiotọ okun. Ẹwaẹn ẹnrẹn ọ re ọ ya fuẹn Rehab ne Ugbogiorinmwi.
Job26:13 Uhiọnrọnmwẹ ọnrẹn ọ re ọ ya iso huan
Job26:14 Sokpan
Job27:1 E Job keghi dọlegbe suẹn gha guan ọ wẹẹ
Job27:2 
Job27:3 vbe uwu ẹghẹ ne Osanobua gha rhie mẹ ya hiọnrọn sẹ
Job27:4 akhuarhamwunu mwẹ i ra ta ẹmwẹ dan
Job27:5 I i ra ta ẹe ẹdẹ ighẹ ẹmwata ọ re uwa na ta; te I ra mu ẹẹn gba ye unu gha ta wẹ I ma rriabe
Job27:6 “Te I ra gha ta ẹe khian ighẹ I ma rukhọ; ekhọe mwẹ ma bu abe gbe mwẹ.
Job27:7 “Iran hia ni mu aro da mwẹ gha gunmwẹ gbinna
Job27:8 De idaehọ ne emwa dan mwẹ yi
Job27:9 Ukpokpo gha rre
Job27:10 Oghogho ne ọ rhie rre gha te gha yẹ iran. Te iran gha na erhunmwu gha ere vbe ẹghẹ hia.
Job27:11 “Gunmwẹ ma ruẹn vbene orhiọn Osanobua kpọlọ hẹ
Job27:12 Ẹn o
Job27:13 “Vbe nian zẹẹ ọre Osanobua ya rria iran ikhi ighẹ emwa dan ne isamwisan.
Job27:14 Iran sẹtin gha mwẹ emọ ikpia nibun sokpan
Job27:15 Iran ni vbe miẹn uhunmwu vbọ
Job27:16 Ọmwadan sẹtin gha mwẹ esiliva ne ẹ i sẹtin ka
Job27:17 Sokpan emwa esi esi ọre ọ ra do rhuan ukpọn ni
Job27:18 Ọmwa dan ghi bọlọ owa zẹ vbe ido akpakpa
Job27:19 Uhukpa
Job27:20 Orrirri gha gbe ku iran zẹ vbe okpamẹ udomwurri; efi ne ọ lae vbe asọn ghi kpolo iran gha rrie
Job27:21 ẹhoho odẹ ahọ ghi kpolo iran hin owa iran rre;
Job27:22 ọ gha hoho yan iran vbe ne ẹ i na mwẹ itohan. Vbe iran gha te gha ziga ne iran lẹkua.
Job27:23 Ẹhoho ghi gha so yan iran vbene iran ya rhulẹ khian ni
Job28:1 “A miẹn uvun ne a kẹ zẹlẹ esiliva ladian vbe uwu otọ; a miẹn ehe ne a na ya erhẹn kpe igoru huan.
Job28:2 Uwu otọ ọ re emwa ke tọnnọ ematọn ladian
Job28:3 Emwa ye gualotọ ehe ne ọ dinmwi vbe uwu otọ. Iran ghi gualotọ ehe ne ọ dinmwi vbe uwu otọ. Iran ghi gha tọnnọ gualọ okuta nekhua khian vbe ebiebi.
Job28:4 Ehe ne ọ wa rrei ne ọmwa iye
Job28:5 Uwu otọ ọ re evbare ke zọ ladian
Job28:6 E safaya rre uwu okuta ni rre otọ
Job28:7 Ahua i miẹn ehe ne a la la uvun emwi ighobioye vbe uwu otọ
Job28:8 Oduma ra aranmwẹ dan ọvbehe
Job28:9 “Emwa ye tọnnọ uwu okuta ne ọ wegbe sẹẹ
Job28:10 Ehe ne iran na tọnnọ uvun zẹ odẹ la uwu okuta gberra ni
Job28:11 Iran tọnnọ uvun ya sẹ ehe ne ẹzẹ na suẹn. Iran wọlọ otọ emwi ni rhie egbe lẹre ladian.
Job28:12 “Sokpan de ehe ne a gha na miẹn ẹwaẹn? De ehe ne a gha na ruẹ vbene a ya miẹn ẹwaẹn?
Job28:13 A i miẹn ewaẹn vbe uwu ẹbu emwa
Job28:14 Odin avbe okun kevbe ẹzẹ nekhua
Job28:15 A i sẹtin ya esiliva ra igoru dẹ ọẹ
Job28:16 Igoru ne ọ ghi maa sẹẹ
Job28:17 Igho ẹre sẹẹ ọghe igoru
Job28:18 Igho ẹwaẹn kpọlọ sẹ
Job28:19 Etopas ne ọ mose sẹ kevbe igoru ne ọ huan sẹẹ ehia
Job28:20 “De ehe ne ẹwaẹn ghi ke rre yi khekherriọ? De ehe ne ima gha na ya ruẹ vbene a ya rẹn otọ emwi hẹ?
Job28:21 Emwi ne a yi ọkpa ne ọ gha sẹtin bẹghe ẹre i rrọọ. Ya sẹ egbe ahianmwẹ ne ọ tin khian.
Job28:22 Uwu kevbe ọfuan tobọ iran miẹnkue wẹẹ
Job28:23 “Osanobua ọkpa ọ re ọ rẹn nene odẹ. Ọ rẹn ehe ne a gha na miẹn ẹwaẹn.
Job28:24 Rhunmwuda
Job28:25 Ẹghẹ ne Osanobua na rhie ẹtin ẹhoho ne ẹẹn
Job28:26 Ẹghẹ ne Osanobua na ta ehe ne amẹ gha gha rhọ yi
Job28:27 Ẹghẹ nii ọ re irẹn na miẹn Ẹwaẹn
Job28:28 Osanobua keghi tama emwa nagbọn wẹẹ
Job29:1 E Job keghi dọlegbe suẹn gha guan
Job29:2 “Akpawẹ ẹdagbọn mwẹ gha ye sẹtin do dọlegbe gha ye vbene ọ te ye ẹkpo ne Osanobua na gha wan lẹga mwẹ nian.
Job29:3 Ẹghẹ nii
Job29:4 Ẹghẹ nii
Job29:5 Ẹghẹ nii
Job29:6 Ewẹn ẹmila kevbe ọghe ẹwe mwẹ
Job29:7 Ediọn ẹvbo gha ko
Job29:8 ibiẹka gha bẹghe mwẹ
Job29:9 Avbe ọkaolotu emwa ghi dobọ ẹmwẹ ne a guan yi
Job29:10 avbe emwa ni hin ukhuan sẹẹ ghi gbẹdọ.
Job29:11 “Ọmwa ne ọ rhirhi miẹn mwẹ
Job29:12 Avbe ivbiogue gha tu ladian
Job29:13 Emwa ne ẹmwẹ agbọn hie ẹre uke kegha tian mwẹ
Job29:14 Uhẹn uhẹn ọ re I hẹko gha ru emwi re.
Job29:15 I kegha re aro ne arhuaro
Job29:16 I keghi mudia ye ihe erha ne ivbiogue
Job29:17 I fuẹn ẹtin emwa dan an
Job29:18 “Te I wa rhie aro ye utọmwẹ vbe ẹghẹ hia
Job29:19 I keghi ye vbe erhan ne inian rẹn miẹn amẹ vbe ẹghẹ hia kevbe ne evbu tuo ye avbe abọ ẹre.
Job29:20 Te emwa hia wa gha tian mwẹ khian
Job29:21 I gha bu emwa ude
Job29:22 iran i vbe miẹn ẹmwẹ rhie ba ẹre vbe I a guan fo nẹ. Ẹmwẹ ghi la ekhọe zẹ vbe ikpamẹ
Job29:23 emwa hia ọ re iran wa maa na
Job29:24 I ghi mumu ogiẹ yan iran vbe ẹtin a te fo iran nẹ
Job29:25 I ghi mu unu gha ta emwi ne a gha ru
Job30:1 Sokpan
Job30:2 Emwa ne esagiẹn ọnrẹn wọn ẹvbi nẹ
Job30:3 Obọ gbe iran sẹ vberriọ
Job30:4 Iran vbọlọ ivbi erhan ato gha re
Job30:5 Te emwa hia kpe khulo iran ladian
Job30:6 Iran na ya gha di uvun okuta ya
Job30:7 Iran ghi gha go vbe oha zẹ vbe atita
Job30:8 Ẹwobi emwa ni ku ogboi nẹ
Job30:9 “Eban nian
Job30:10 Te iran ghi sọnnọ mwẹ
Job30:11 Rhunmwuda ne Osanobua na ya mwẹ khian ne ọ mitan ne ẹ i miẹn emwi ru. Te iran ghi wa ye ẹtin iran hia ye ọkpankpan yọ mwẹ egbe.
Job30:12 Otu igbinna ẹrhia na keghi wa kugbe dekun mwẹ
Job30:13 Iran khui ehe ne I gha la lẹfua
Job30:14 Iran ya uhunmwu ha ehe ne I ya khẹ egbe
Job30:15 afianma gbe mwẹ fi otọ; uyi mwẹ hoho ua zẹ vbe ẹhoho ne ọ vẹ kua. Kevbe emwi ẹfe mwẹ zẹ vbe okuku amẹ.
Job30:16 “Odẹ ẹrinmwi ọre I ghi gbẹn na; oya ne I re i mwẹ erọkhọrọkhọ.
Job30:17 Asọn gha rre
Job30:18 Osanobua dobọ mu mwẹ urhu nẹ
Job30:19 Ọ rhie mwẹ fianmwẹ otọ vbe uwu ọrho; mẹ ma ghi ma sẹ iruẹn tobọ ọre.
Job30:20 “I tu tie ruẹ Osanobua
Job30:21 Obọ dan ọ re uwa ya mu mwẹ na
Job30:22 U giẹ ẹhoho hoho mwẹ gha rrie
Job30:23 I rẹnrẹn ighẹ uwu ọ re u rhie mwẹ rrie na
Job30:24 Vbu a na gu ọmwa ne ẹki agbọn gbe nẹ gbinna hẹ yi? Ọmwa ne ẹ i ra miẹn emwi ru gberra
Job30:25 Mẹ ma gu enọmiẹn ibaro viẹ ra? Ọma vbe danmwẹ ne iran ne ẹ i mwẹ.
Job30:26 Ọyẹnmwẹ kevbe uwanmwẹ ọre I te rhie aro yi
Job30:27 Ohawa kevbe obalọ yanghan mwẹ uan
Job30:28 Ekhọe akhiẹ ọ re I dada khian
Job30:29 Urhu mwẹ keghi vuọn ne akhiẹ kevbe ohioro
Job30:30 Ikpakpa egbe mwẹ keghi khian enekhui
Job30:31 Ehe ne I na te họn emwi ne a kpe ne ọ rhiẹnrhiẹn yi
Job31:1 “Te I wa mobọ yan rẹn
Job31:2 Vbe Osanobua ne Udazi ru ima hẹ yi? Vbe ọ ya ha osa ye uyinmwẹ emwa nagbọn hẹ?
Job31:3 Ọ ghi mu ọfuan kevbe ọrhiae
Job31:4 Osanobua rẹn emwi ne I ru hia
Job31:5 “I ma he yin uyinmwẹ ika ẹdẹ
Job31:6 Wẹ ne Osanobua ya omwa ẹmwata mwa mwẹ
Job31:7 Adeghẹ I biegbe lahin odẹ ẹmwata rre
Job31:8 giẹ emwi fuẹn emwi okọ mwẹ hia a
Job31:9 “Adeghẹ amwẹ ogieva mwẹ viẹn yọ mwẹ aro
Job31:10 ẹghẹ nii
Job31:11 Uwu ọ re ọ kere ne a ya gha rria ikhi emwi dan vberriọ.
Job31:12 Te ọ gha yevbe erhẹn omurhia ẹrinmwi erhẹn
Job31:13 “Ọkpa vbe uwu eguọmwadia mwẹ gha talọ ẹmwẹ mwẹ ma ọmwa
Job31:14 A deghẹ I ma ru vberriọ
Job31:15 Osanobua ọkpa nii ne ọ yi imẹ ọ re ọ vbe yi avbe eguọmwadia mwẹ.
Job31:16 “I ma he he ẹdẹ ne I ru iyobọ ne ovbiogue
Job31:17 ra ne I giẹ ohanmwẹ gbe emọ ne ẹ i mwẹ erha
Job31:18 Vbe ẹdẹ agbọn mwẹ hia
Job31:19 I gha miẹn ọmwa ne ọ vbabọ emwi
Job31:20 I ghi viọ ukpọn ne a ya eto do ne ẹẹn
Job31:21 “Adeghẹ I he mu ọmọ ne ẹ i mwẹ erha ru ẹdẹ
Job31:22 te ekuabọ mwẹ gha vbiolo ua
Job31:23 Rhunmwuda ighẹ ohan irria ikhi Osanobua mu mwẹ
Job31:24 “I ma he mu ẹtin yan ẹfe ẹdẹ
Job31:25 ra ne I ya ẹfe mwẹ gha hio.
Job31:26 I ma he gọn ugie ovẹn ne ọ yunmwu ẹdẹ
Job31:27 A ma he bibi mwẹ odẹ ya ọghọ ne iran ẹdẹ ne I hiẹnhiẹn atataobọ mwẹ ya ya ọghọ ne iran.
Job31:28 Uwu ọ re ọ kere ne a ya rria ikhi egbe orukhọ vberriọ
Job31:29 “I ma he ghọghọ vbe oghian mwẹ a gha rri oya ẹdẹ
Job31:30 I ma he rukhọ ne I na erhunmwu wẹ ne iran wulo ẹdẹ.
Job31:31 Emwa hia ni winna mẹ rẹnrẹn
Job31:32 Te I tie ekhẹn la owa mwẹ
Job31:33 “Emwa ọvbehe ho ne iran gha gbe gue orukhọ iran
Job31:34 Ohan ẹmwẹ ne emwa gha ta ma he mu mwẹ ẹdẹ
Job31:35 “A i miẹn ne ọ gha danmwehọ ẹmwẹ ne I guan ra? I vẹn ihẹn adeghẹ ẹ i re ẹmwata ehia khin. Gie Osanobua ne Udazi zẹ ẹmwẹ wanniẹn mwẹ. “Akpawẹ te a gbẹnnẹ ehia ye otọ nian
Job31:36 I gha muẹn yan izabọ ya gha hio
Job31:37 I gha talọ emwi ne I he ru hia ma Osanobua
Job31:38 “A deghẹ te I dẹ otọ ne ugbo mwẹ mu
Job31:39 a deghẹ I re vbe evbare ne ọ zọ vba
Job31:40 ẹghẹ nii
Job32:1 Rhunmwuda ighẹ ekhọe e Job wa ta ẹe rhuan ma rẹn nẹ wẹ rẹn ma rukhọ
Job32:2 Sokpan
Job32:3 Ohu avbe ọsie Job kevbe gha muẹn. Iran ma miẹn ewanniẹn rhie ye Job ẹmwẹ
Job32:4 Rhunmwuda ne Elihu na re ọvbokhan vbe evba
Job32:5 Ọ ghi miẹn wẹ iran eheha ma sẹtin rhie ewanniẹn ne Job
Job32:6 Ọre ọ na suẹn gha guan
Job32:7 I kegha ta ẹe ma egbe mwẹ wẹ
Job32:8 Sokpan
Job32:9 Ẹ i re a khian enọwanrẹn ọre ọ rhie ẹwaẹn ne ọmwa
Job32:10 Rhunmwuda ọnii nian
Job32:11 “Te I wa hẹko gbe ekhọe ke otọ gha danmwehọ vbe uwa guan
Job32:12 I kakabọ danmwẹ họ
Job32:13 Vbe uwa ghi na kha hẹ yi ighẹ uwa wan? Osanobua ọ ghi ra zẹ ẹmwẹ wanniẹn e Job
Job32:14 Wa ọre Job gha gu guan ighẹ ẹ i re imẹ. Sokpan
Job32:15 E Job
Job32:16 Te imẹ ghẹ ghi ye gha khẹ ra
Job32:17 Ẹn o
Job32:18 I i ghi sẹtin mudia ne I ghẹ guan I i ghi sẹtin khui ẹmwẹ ni ye unu.
Job32:19 Adeghẹ I ma miotọ na guan
Job32:20 Egbe mwẹ i guae
Job32:21 Mẹ i ra gbe ghe obọkpa vbe imuaemwẹ na
Job32:22 I gha vbe ru ẹe
Job33:1 “Banbanna nian
Job33:2 I mu egbe ne I ya ta ẹmwẹ ne ọ rrọmwẹ ekhọe.
Job33:3 Ẹmwẹ ne ọ ke ekhọe rre ọ re ẹmwẹ mwẹ hia khin ẹmwata ọ re I vbe ta.
Job33:4 Orhiọn Osanobua ọ re ọ yi mwẹ ọ na vbe rhie arrọọ mẹ.
Job33:5 “U ghi rhie ewanniẹn mẹ a deghẹ u gha sẹtin
Job33:6 Ọkpa ọ re mẹ vbe ruẹ khin vbe odaro Osanobua
Job33:7 Rhunmwuda ọnii
Job33:8 “Ẹmwẹ ne I họẹn vbe u ta ẹe ọ re ọna khin wẹẹ
Job33:9 ‘I ma rri abe. I ma rukhọ
Job33:10 Te Osanobua wa gheghe ho emwi ne ọ gha ru mwẹ re. Ọ na gha ru mwẹ zẹ vbe oghian rẹn.
Job33:11 Ọ rrọ ọgiọrọ yọ mwẹ owẹ
Job33:12 “Sokpan
Job33:13 Vbe uwa na ba Osanobua ifi ẹzọ hẹ wẹ
Job33:14 A gha rhe miẹn wẹ kugbakẹghẹrẹ ọ re Osanobua ya guan; a i miẹn ne ọ rhie ẹmwẹ ne ọ ta ẹe.
Job33:15 Emwa gha vbiẹ vbe asọn
Job33:16 Ọ ghi wẹ ne iran danmwehọ ẹmwẹ ne irẹn ta
Job33:17 Te Osanobua gu iran guan ne iran miẹn ehe na dobọ orukhọ ne a ru yi
Job33:18 Rẹn i ra kue ne a fuẹn iran an
Job33:19 Osanobua giẹ emianmwẹ ya dia ọmwa ye odẹ
Job33:20 Evbare i khọn ọmwa ne ọ khuọnmwi te evbare ne ọ ghi rhiẹnrhiẹn sẹ wia so ẹe.
Job33:21 Egbe ẹre ghi siẹn uan khian ọrhiae
Job33:22 ehe ne iran ni wulo nẹ ye ọ re ọ ghi ra gha rrie na.
Job33:23 “U gha ghe odibosa gha rrọ ẹre rre
Job33:24 Odibosa nii ghi ya itohan kha wẹẹ
Job33:25 Egbe ẹre ghi do dọlegbe gha ru ọvbokhan ọvbokhan
Job33:26 Ọ gha na erhunmwu
Job33:27 Ọ ghi ta ẹe ne agbọn họn wẹẹ
Job33:28 Ọ ma gunmwẹ gha rrie ehe ne iran ni wulo nẹ ye. I ye rre agbọn.’
Job33:29 Te Osanobua wa ru emwi vbenian yan egbe yan egbe
Job33:30 ọ gha miẹn ọmwa fan ye agbọn nẹ
Job33:31 Banbanna nian
Job33:32 Sokpan
Job33:33 Sokpan
Job34:1 Ọre Elihu na kha wẹẹ
Job34:2 
Job34:3 A gha danmwẹ evbare
Job34:4 Iwinna ima nọ ne a bu ohiẹn na.
Job34:5 E Job wẹẹ rẹn i mwẹ abe rhọkpa
Job34:6 Ọ keghi kha wẹẹ
Job34:7 “Wa he miẹn ọmwa ne ọ ye vbe Job na ẹdẹ ra? Ẹ i da ne Osanobua.
Job34:8 Ẹbu emwa dan ọ re ọ yẹ ọre
Job34:9 Ọ wẹ uhunmwu agbọn I zẹdẹ rrọ
Job34:10 “Wa danmwehọ mwẹ
Job34:11 Te irẹn san emwa ẹse emwi ne iran ru
Job34:12 Osanobua ne Udazi i ru emwi dan
Job34:13 Ọmwa ọvbehe rrọ ne ọ rhie ẹtin ne ọ gue Osanobua ne ẹẹn ra? Ọmwa rrọ ne ọ mu agbọn ne ẹẹn gha gbearoghe ra?
Job34:14 Osanobua gha rhie uhiọnrọnmwẹ arrọọ werriegbe
Job34:15 te emwa ni rrọ hia gha wulo. Iran ghi dọlegbe khian ekẹn.
Job34:16 Banbanna nian danmwehọ
Job34:17 Te uwẹ bu abe gbe Osanobua ne ọmwata ra? Te uwẹ ro ighẹ ohiẹn ẹmwata i yẹ ọre ra?
Job34:18 Osanobua ghi gha bu abe gbe avbe ọba kevbe iran ne irriegie
Job34:19 Ẹ i ya egbe ba iran ne irriegie
Job34:20 Ọmwa sẹtin wa wu uwu udomwurri vbe asọn
Job34:21 Ọ wa ghe owẹ hia ne dọmwadẹ ọghọe zẹ.
Job34:22 Ebiebi ne ọ so sẹ ne ọ gha degue ọmwa orukhọ ne Osanobua
Job34:23 Osanobua i vbe bu ẹdẹ yọ ne emwa ya rre ne irẹn bu ohiẹn iran.
Job34:24 Ẹ i vbe gualọ ọmwa ne ọ gha gualotọ emwi nẹ
Job34:25 Rhunmwuda ighẹ ọ rẹn emwi ne iran ru; asọn gha rre
Job34:26 Ọ ghi rrie emwa orukhọ oya vbe ehe ne emwa hia gha na miẹn ọẹn
Job34:27 rhunmwuda
Job34:28 Iran ghi ru ovbiogue ne iran ya tu nọ Osanobua iyobọ
Job34:29 Osanobua gha kha ighẹ rẹn i zẹdẹ guan yọ
Job34:30 Emwi ọkpa ne agbọn uhunmwu ẹvbo ra miẹn ru i rrọ
Job34:31 E Job
Job34:32 U nọ Osanobua nẹ ra ne ọ rhie abakuru ruẹ ma ruẹn? U vbe kue nẹ ra ne u dobọ emwi dan ne a ru yi?
Job34:33 Vbene uwẹ ghi na gui ye emwi ne Osanobua ru nii nian
Job34:34 Ọmwa ne ọ ghi wan nẹ hiehie gha yobọ yọ
Job34:35 a ma rẹn sẹ ọ re Job ya guan
Job34:36 Wa roro ẹmwẹ hia ne Job talọe wa gha miẹn wẹ te ọ guan vbe ọmwa dan.
Job34:37 Ọ vbe rhie isọtẹ ba orukhọ ne ọ ru
Job35:1 Elihu keghi wanniẹn wẹẹ
Job35:2 
Job35:3 ra ne u vbe gha nọ Osanobua wẹẹ
Job35:4 I gha rhie ewanniẹn ne uwẹ vbe avbe ẹse ruẹ ba ẹre.
Job35:5 Tọn aro mu ghe iso! Ghe vbene avbe ikpakpa iso rre hẹ!
Job35:6 U gha rukhọ
Job35:7 A deghẹ te u ghi vbe re ọmwata ọ mwẹ iyobọ ne u ya ẹe ru ne Osanobua ra? Emwi ọkpa irrọ ne Osanobua ra ho sẹ obọ ruẹ.
Job35:8 Ọmwa nagbọn ne ihua ọ re ọ rri oya orukhọ ne u ru
Job35:9 “A ghe zẹ emwa kpokpo
Job35:10 Sokpan
Job35:11 Iran i yo ọghe Osanobua ne ọ rhie ẹwaẹn ne ọmwa
Job35:12 Iran gha tu nọ iyobọ
Job35:13 Utumwẹ ne iran tu ladian i mwẹ esa ne ọ ye; Osanobua ne Udazi ma deghẹ iran a ma wẹ ọ gha vbe họn urhu iran.
Job35:14 E Job
Job35:15 U ro wẹ Osanobua i rri ọmwa oya
Job35:16 Ẹ i zẹdẹ mwẹ esa wẹ ne u ye gha guan khian; aro wa da ẹe wẹ
Job36:1 Elihu keghi rhie te ẹe wẹẹ
Job36:2 
Job36:3 Iruẹmwi mwẹ vẹwae
Job36:4 Ẹmwẹ ne I gha ta vbe odaro ruẹ
Job36:5 “U miẹn vbe Osanobua wegbe hẹ! Ẹ i ye aro gbe ọmwa rhọkpa re. Emwi ọkpa ne ọ ma rẹn otọ ẹre
Job36:6 Ẹ i giẹ emwa orukhọ wa gha rrọ khian
Job36:7 Ọ degue iran ni re ẹmwata ọ ghi vbe giẹ iran gha khaemwisẹ vbe ọba. Ọ ghi vbe giẹ a gha ya ọghọ ne iran ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ.
Job36:8 Sokpan
Job36:9 te Osanobua rhie orukhọ kevbe itengbemu iran ma iran.
Job36:10 Te ọ wẹ ne iran danmwehọ obọ ne ọ ya sekhae ne iran; ne iran lahin emwi dan rre.
Job36:11 Iran gha họn urhu Osanobua
Job36:12 Sokpan
Job36:13 “Ohu ohu ọ re iran ne emwa dan mu
Job36:14 Iran ghi wulo
Job36:15 Sokpan
Job36:16 “Osanobua rhie ruẹ ke uwu ibaro ladian
Job36:17 Banbanna nian
Job36:18 Mwẹ ẹwaẹn
Job36:19 Ugha tu nọ iyobọ ẹghẹ nii
Job36:20 Ghẹ gha rhie aro ye odẹ wẹ ne asọn rre
Job36:21 Mwẹ ẹwaẹn ne u ghẹ ya biegbe la emwi dan. Te a giẹ usẹ na guẹ ne ọ siọ ladian vbọ.
Job36:22 U ghi yerre vbene ẹtin Osanobua kpọlọ hẹ. Rẹn ọrọre ọmamwaemwi ne ọ kpọlọ sẹẹ vbe ehia.
Job36:23 Orhiọnkpa i sẹtin tama Osanobua wẹ ghe emwi ne Ọ gha ru
Job36:24 Urhomwẹ ọ re a rhie ne ẹẹn ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ ye emwi ne ọ ru
Job36:25 Aro emwa hia sẹ emwi ne ọ ru nẹ
Job36:26 Ma i sẹtin wa rẹn ukpọlọmwẹ ọnrẹn fo
Job36:27 Osanobua ọ re ọ rhie amẹ vbe otọe ọ ghi fi ẹe werriẹ ghe ikpẹ amẹ ne ọ rhọ.
Job36:28 Ọ ghi giẹ amẹ gha rhọ ke ikpakpa iso rre
Job36:29 Ọmwa ne ọ rẹn vbene ikpakpa iso ya khian hẹ i rrọ. Ra vbene avan nukhunmwu ya van la iso ne Osanobua ye gberra hẹ.
Job36:30 Ọ ghi giẹ ayan la iso khinkhian
Job36:31 Erriọ ọ re ọ ya koko avbe emwa
Job36:32 Ọ ghi ye obọ ẹre guara ayan rhie
Job36:33 Avan nukhunmwu ọ re ọ kha ighẹ okpẹhoho dee
Job37:1 “Nene okpẹhoho ye udu mwẹ fi kpikpikpi.
Job37:2 Wa hia
Job37:3 Ọ giẹ ayan ne ọ gbe iso dunmwu ke okhiẹ agbọn ọkpa sẹ nọkpa.
Job37:4 Ẹghẹ nii
Job37:5 emwi ọyunnuan ni bun kegha sunu vbe Osanobua giẹ vberriọ. Emwi ọyunnuan ne ima isẹtin rẹn otọ ẹre.
Job37:6 Ọ giẹ wẹ ne esia dele ye otọ
Job37:7 Ọ keghi dobọ iwinna emwa nagbọn yi
Job37:8 Avbe aranmwẹ oha la uvun iran
Job37:9 okpẹhoho nekhua ke odẹ ekẹn rre
Job37:10 Uhiọnrọnmwẹ Osanobua ye amẹ zeze
Job37:11 Ayan ke uwu ikpakpa iso yan ladian
Job37:12 vbe ehe ne iran na khian vbene Osanobua ho. Iran ru emwi hia ne Osanobua giẹ.
Job37:13 Osanobua giẹ amẹ ne ọ do gbe khakha otọ
Job37:14 E Job
Job37:15 U rẹn vbene Osanobua ya ta ẹe hẹ ra
Job37:16 Wẹ rẹn vbene amẹ ne ọ bi ya werriẹ khian hẹ vbe ikpakpa iso ra? Iwinna iguona ọyunnuan ọghe Osanobua?
Job37:17 Ẹn o
Job37:18 U gha sẹtin gu Osanobua tan iso ra? Ne u vbe ya ẹe wegbe zẹ vbe ematọn ne a fiọnghae yi.
Job37:19 Ma ima ẹmwẹ ne a gha tama Osanobua ẹwaẹn wi ima nẹ
Job37:20 Mẹ i ra nọ wẹ ne a rhie otọ mẹ ya gu Osanobua guan. Vbọzẹ ne I gha na giee miẹn otọ na do fuẹn mwẹ uan?
Job37:21 “Banbanna nian
Job37:22 A bẹghe erhẹn ne ọ baa ọghe igoru vbe odẹ okuọ
Job37:23 Ẹtin Osanobua kpọlọ sẹ vberriọ wẹ
Job37:24 Ẹkhabe ne ohan rẹn na mu emwa hia
Job38:1 Ẹre Nọyaẹnmwa na ke uwu O okpẹhoho zẹ ẹmwẹ wanniẹn e Job
Job38:2 ọ keghi kha wẹẹ
Job38:3 Kpaegbe mudia nian
Job38:4 Wẹ rre evba vbe I yi agbọn ra? Adeghẹ u gele rẹn emwi sẹ evba
Job38:5 Gha ọ ta ẹe vbene ọ gha kpọlọ sẹ hẹ yi? De ọmwa ne ọ tan okun ya mwa rẹn? Wẹ rẹn ewanniẹn na hia ra?
Job38:6 De emwi ne ọ da orre ne a ya da agbọn yi mwẹ yi. Gha ọ gbe ẹyotọ agbọn na?
Job38:7 Ẹdẹ ne ẹdẹrriọ ghi gbe avbe orhọnmwẹ keghi koko so ihuan. Ighele ẹrinmwi hia keghi we ne oghọghọ.
Job38:8 “De ọmwa ne ọ khui urho ke okun yi vbe ẹghẹ ne ọ na vẹ ke uwu otọ ladian?
Job38:9 Mẹ ọ re ọ ye amẹ gue okun
Job38:10 I vin uwu ye otọ ne okun
Job38:11 I keghi tama rẹn wẹẹ
Job38:12 E Job
Job38:13 U he tama uwanmwẹ ẹdẹ ne ọ siẹnrhu agbọn ra
Job38:14 Uwanmwẹ ẹdẹ ọ re ọ giẹ a rẹn ehe ne oke kevbe iya ye. Zẹ vbe ehe ne ukpọn na munọ yan egbe
Job38:15 Awanwan uwanmwẹ ẹdẹ wegbe ne ọmwa dan gbe
Job38:16 Wẹ he sẹ ehe ne amẹ ke kpe ladian vbe ototọ okun ra? We he ye owẹ khian vbe otọ okun nọkhua ra?
Job38:17 Iran he vbe ma ruẹn ẹkhu ne ọ khui urho odẹ ne ọ rrie ẹvbo ebiebi iran ni wulo nẹ ra?
Job38:18 We gha sẹtin mu idandan ọghe vbene agbọn na kpọlọ sẹ hẹ ra? Rhie ewanniẹn mẹ deghẹ u rẹn ọnrẹn.
Job38:19 “U rẹn ehe ne uwanmwẹ ke rre ra? Ra ẹzi ehe ne ebiebi ke rre?
Job38:20 U gha sẹtin ma iran ehe ne iran gha sẹ ra? Ra ne u khulo iran werriegbe?
Job38:21 Mẹ yayi wẹ u gha wa sẹtin
Job38:22 “Wẹ he sẹ avbe aza ne I viọ esia kevbe amẹ ne ọ zeze yi ra?
Job38:23 I viọ iran ye otọ khẹ ẹghẹ asobọyegbe
Job38:24 Wẹ he sẹ ehe ne ovẹn ke yan rre ra
Job38:25 “Gha ọ halọ uvun ne amẹ na rhọ rre yi? Ọ na wan odẹ ne avan nukhunmwu?
Job38:26 Gha ọ wẹ ne amẹ gha rhọ ye ehe ne emwa ma yin yi?
Job38:27 Gha ọ gbe amẹ khakha otọ ne ọ kae kevbe ne ohanmwẹ amẹ gbe
Job38:28 Ke amẹ
Job38:29 De ọmwa ne ọ re iye esia kevbe amẹ ne ọ zeze?
Job38:30 Gha ọ fi amẹ werriẹ khian okuta
Job38:31 “U gha gbalọ avbe orhọnmwẹ ne a tie ẹre iyọkhọkhọ kugbe ra
Job38:32 U gha sẹtin ma avbe orhọnmwẹ odẹ ra vbe dọmwadẹ ẹghẹ ne ukpo ya fiwerriẹ
Job38:33 U rẹn uhi ne a lo vbe iso ra
Job38:34 “U gha sẹtin van okan mu ikpakpa iso ra ne u wẹ ne iran rhọ amẹ kuọ ruẹ?
Job38:35 U gha tama avan nukhunmwu wẹ ne ọ van
Job38:36 De ọmwa ne ọ tama ovbi ahianmwẹ ẹghẹ ne e Naẹl gha ya ro
Job38:37 De ọmwa ne ẹwaẹn gba na sẹrriọ yi ne ọ ka amẹ ikpakpa iso ne ọ vbe biẹe gọ ne amẹ rhọ
Job38:38 amẹ ne ọ do gha ye ebubẹ mannọ kugbe?
Job38:39 “Wẹ ọ re ọ gualọ evbare ne avbe oduma re ra
Job38:40 vbe ẹghẹ ne iran na lẹre ye uwu uvun okuta iran
Job38:41 Gha ọ koko avbe ivbianumẹ yi vbe iran a gha hẹ yo hẹ rre vbe ohanmwẹ
Job39:1 “Wẹ rẹn ẹghẹ ne a na biẹ ẹwe oke ra?
Job39:2 U vbe rẹn inu ẹghẹ ne iran mu ovbi iran la ra? U vbe rẹn ẹghẹ ne iran ya biẹ ra?
Job39:3 U rẹn ẹghẹ ne iran gha ya rhuẹ ye otọ ra. Ne iran biẹ ovbi iran ye agbọn?
Job39:4 Ivbi iran ghi wan
Job39:5 “Gha ọ rhie ayan egbe ọmwa ne ekẹtẹkẹtẹ oha yi? Gha ọ rhan iran kua ne iran ya gha hẹ yo hẹ rre?
Job39:6 Mẹ rhie ato ne iran ne ọ gha re owa iran
Job39:7 Iran ghi wa gban egbe ne ore ẹvbo ni vuọn ne owogho
Job39:8 Avbe oke nekhua ọrọre otọ ne iran na rria
Job39:9 “Ede gha winna ne uwẹ ra? Ọ he rre ne ọ do gbe asọn ọkpa vbe aza emwirri ruẹ ra?
Job39:10 U gha sẹtin ya irri de ọkpa vbọ ra? Ne uwẹ ne ọ do gha vulo otọ?
Job39:11 U gha sẹtin mu ẹtin yan ẹtin ẹnrẹn nọkhua ra
Job39:12 Te u khẹ ọre ne ọ do viọ emwi orhọ ruẹ gha die owa ra
Job39:13 “Vbe okhian a kẹ ifuẹn ugomugo sẹ hẹ yi! Sokpan ugomugo i tin utinmwẹ ahua.
Job39:14 Te ugomugo sẹ ekẹn ọnrẹn rae ye otọ ne otọe ne ọ mwẹ ọghae gha mwẹ ọghae muẹn.
Job39:15 Ọ ma rẹn wẹ
Job39:16 Ọ ghi gha ru vbene a miẹn wẹ ẹ i re irẹn ọ re ọ yan ekẹn nii
Job39:17 Mẹ ọ re ọ ru ẹe ne ọ kọn
Job39:18 Sokpan
Job39:19 “E Job
Job39:20 Wẹ ọ ru ẹe ne iran gha san vbe irhiso ra ne iran na vbe tin ihin ya runran emwa?
Job39:21 Te ọ bọbọ ẹre egbe vbe ọ gha hin oke ra iya ẹtin ẹnrẹn hia ọ re ọ ya khọn la uwu okuo.
Job39:22 Iran ma rẹn emwi ne a ye ohan kha
Job39:23 Emwi igbinna ne ne ọ hin iran mu mwẹ
Job39:24 Vbe ne ọ na guọ kpakpakpa
Job39:25 Ẹghẹ ne okpe a rhirhi ya davan
Job39:26 “We ọ re ọ ma ahua vbene a ya tin hẹ ra vbe ọ gha rhan ifuẹn ọnrẹn uan ghe odẹ ekẹn?
Job39:27 Te oghohọn vbe mudia ne a tama rẹn nẹ ra Ọ ke ya bọ oko ye uhunmwu oke ne ọ yo gelete?
Job39:28 Oke okuta ne ọ yo sẹ
Job39:29 Evba ọ re ọ ke ghe urria ke ehe ne ọ sikẹ ọ re ne ọ na gualọ emwi ne ọ ra gbe re.
Job39:30 Avbe oghohọn ghi do lẹga ikun emwi ne ọ wu

Job40:20 Irunmwu ne a gha ya gha koko ẹe zọre vbe uhunmwu oke ne avbe aranmwẹ oha na kuu.
Job40:21 Ọ ghi lovbiẹ vbe ototọ ẹti igban
Job40:22 Ẹti igban kevbe irunmwu ni zọ vbe ọkpẹn ẹzẹ
Job40:23 Ohan ẹzẹ ne ọ lẹ ogbigbi zẹ vbene Jọdan ye i muẹn. Ọ ghi hẹko hunwan vbe Jọdan a gha sanmwẹ amẹ ye ọ re aro.
Job40:24 De ọmwa ne ọ gha sẹtin rhu ẹre aro ne ọ muẹn? Ra de ọmwa ne ọ gha sẹtin ye ifi mu ẹre ihue?
Job41:1 “U gha sẹtin ya ẹghọe ne a ya gbe ehẹn mu e Leviatan ra? Ra ne u ya irri de ẹre aranmwẹ ginna otọ?
Job41:2 U gha sẹtin fi irri la ẹre uvun ihue ra
Job41:3 Ọ gha rinmwian wẹ ne u giẹ irẹn gha rrie ra
Job41:4 Ọ gha gue ta ẹe ra wẹ ne irẹn gha ga uwẹ ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ?
Job41:5 U gha sẹtin muẹn gba ra zẹ vbe ahianmwẹ ne a koko vbe owa
Job41:6 Avbe ọgbehẹn gha miẹn ive ẹre ra? Ra ne ekpatẹ ya gha giagia ẹe khiẹn?
Job41:7 U gha sẹtin ye asoro ọgbehẹn vuọn ohian rẹn ra ne u ye ogala ha ẹre uhunmwu?
Job41:8 Ya ohọ kan rẹn ghe
Job41:9 Ọmwaikọmwa ne ọ bẹghe Leviatan te udu ẹre kpaẹn
Job41:10 A gha ho ẹre ẹmwẹ te ọ mu ohan
Job41:11 De ọmwa ne ọ gha gu ẹe gbinna
Job41:12 “Gunmwẹ giẹ owẹ e Leviatan ma ruẹn
Job41:13 Ai miẹn ọmwa ne ọ gha sẹtin ban ikpakpaọke-ukhunmwu hin ẹre egbe rre
Job41:14 De ọmwa ne ọ gha sẹtin yan ẹre agbanmwẹ nii
Job41:15 Iyeke ẹre
Job41:16 Te a wa kakabọ mama ọkpa ginna nọkpa
Job41:17 A gba ẹe kankaankan kugbe sẹrriọ wẹ emwi ọkpa ne ọ gha sẹtin wannọ ọẹn i rrọ.
Job41:18 Ọ gha tin ihin
Job41:19 Ogidi erhẹn ọ re ọ ke unu ẹnrẹn ladian ogiọnmwẹ erhẹn ghigha tue yọyọyọ ladian.
Job41:20 Ighogho ghi gha tue ke ihue ẹre ladian
Job41:21 Ọ gha hiọnrọn erhẹn ghi mu vẹn
Job41:22 Ẹyaẹn rẹn wegbe sẹrriọ wẹ
Job41:23 Ehe ne ọ khuẹrhẹ i rre ikpakpa ẹre ọ; ọ wegbe
Job41:24 Ẹkoko udu ẹre ne okuta ma rẹn ohan
Job41:25 Ọ gha guara kpaegbe
Job41:26 Umozo ne ọ sẹtin fian ẹre ẹwẹn i rrọ. A i miẹn asoro
Job41:27 Te ematọn ye khuẹrhẹ vbe obọ ẹre zẹ vbe irunmwu oze ye khuẹrhẹkhuẹrhẹ vbe erhan ne ọ kẹkẹe.
Job41:28 A i miẹn ifẹnmwẹ ne ọ gha sẹe lẹ na
Job41:29 Orhokhua
Job41:30 Te ẹko ẹre yevbe avbe osọnmwehẹn
Job41:31 Ọ ghi hughu okun vbe amẹ ne ọ ti
Job41:32 Ọ ghi zẹ uviẹn ne ọ fi wainwain ye odieke ẹre. Ọ ghi ya okun khian okun ne ọ hu.
Job41:33 Emwi ne a ya giẹ ẹre i rre agbọn na; aranmwẹ ne ọ ma rẹn ohan ọre nọ.
Job41:34 Te ọ ghe aranmwẹ ne ọ ghi wegbe sẹ silaa; rẹn ọrọre ọba avbe aranmwẹ oha hia.”
Job42:1 Ẹre Job na wanniẹn e Nọyaẹnmwa ẹmwẹ wẹẹ
Job42:2 “Nọyaẹnmwa mẹ rẹnrẹn wẹ u mwẹ ẹtin hia
Job42:3 U nọ rẹn wẹ vbọzẹ ne imẹ ne ọ ma rẹn na ye
Job42:4 U tama mwẹ wẹ ne I danmwehọ vbe uwẹ a gha guan kevbe wẹ ne I hia ne i rhie ewanniẹn ye ọta ne u nọ rẹn.
Job42:5 Ẹghẹ nii
Job42:6 Rhunmwuda ọnii
Job42:7 E Nọyaẹnmwa ghi gu e Job guan fo nẹ
Job42:8 Banbanna nian
Job42:9 Ẹlifaz
Job42:10 Ugbẹn vbe Job ghi na erhunmwu ne esiọ re eheha nẹ
Job42:11 Avbe etẹn e Job nikpia kevbe nikhuo kevbe avbe esiọ re
Job42:12 E Nọyaẹnmwa keghi fiangbe okiekie ẹdẹ agbọn e Job sẹ vbene ọ te ka fiangbe omuhẹn ọnrẹn. E Job kegha mwẹ ohuan arriaisẹn iwenẹ (14
Job42:13 Ọ keghi biẹlẹ emọ ikpia ihinrọn kevbe emọ ikhuo eha.
Job42:14 Ọ keghi he ovbi ẹre nokhuo ne ọdiọn Jamina
Job42:15 A Ma vbe miẹn ikhuo ni gha mose vbe ivbi e Job vbe uhunmwu otọ agbọn hia. Erha iran keghi vbe gha ukhu ne iran zẹ vbene ọ ghae ne etẹn iran nikpia.
Job42:16 Vbe iyeke ọnọna
Job42:17 Ọ keghi wu vbe ọ khian ọmaẹn ne ghẹghẹghẹ nẹ.

Psalms1:2 Sokpan
Psalms1:3 Iran yevbe erhan ni zọ vbe ọkpẹn ẹzẹ
Psalms1:4 Sokpan
Psalms1:5 Osanobua gha bu abe gbe emwa orukhọ
Psalms1:6 E Nọyaẹnmwa ọ re ọ su avbe emwata
Psalms2:1 Vbọzẹ ne avbe agbọn ẹvbo na si uma isọtẹ yi? Vbọzẹ ne emwa na vbe si uma akuọkan iran.
Psalms2:2 Avbe ọba iran sọtẹ
Psalms2:3 Iran khare wẹẹ
Psalms2:4 E Nọyaẹnmwa giee ke ẹkete ẹre vbe ẹrinmwi rre
Psalms2:5 Ọ ya ohu ya obọ sekhae ne iran ọ ya okuosu ẹre runran iran.
Psalms2:6 Ọ keghi kha wẹẹ
Psalms2:7 Ọba khare wẹẹ
Psalms2:8 Nọ vbe obọ mwẹ
Psalms2:9 U gha ya umọmọ rẹnkhẹn iran
Psalms2:10 Rhunmwuda ọnii
Psalms2:11 Wa ya ohan ga Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms2:12 ne uwa vbe ya uhunmwu rhanmwẹ otọ ne ẹẹn. Ne uwa ghẹ gie ohu ya mu ẹẹn
Psalms3:1 Eghian ne I mwẹ bun ẹsẹse Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms3:2 Iran na iyẹn mwẹ khian wẹẹ
Psalms3:3 Sokpan
Psalms3:4 I kpe tie Nọyaẹnmwa ne iyobọ. Ọ keghi wanniẹn mwẹ ẹmwẹ
Psalms3:5 Mẹ lovbiẹ
Psalms3:6 Ohan iran i mu mwẹ ighe avbe eghian mwẹ arriaisẹn
Psalms3:7 E Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms3:8 Ọghe Nọyaẹnmwa ọ re akhọnmiotọ ke rre. Te ọ gha fiangbe emwa rẹn.
Psalms4:1 Họn urhu mwẹ vbe i a gha na erhunmwu Osanobua ne ọ gbinna mẹ. Ẹghẹ ne I na gha rre uwu ukpokpo
Psalms4:2 Inu ẹghẹ
Psalms4:3 Wa yerre wẹ
Psalms4:4 Wa gha guọ ne ohan
Psalms4:5 Wa zọ ese ne ọ kere ghe Nọyaẹnmwa ne uwa mu ẹtin uwa yan rẹn.
Psalms4:6 Emwa nibun ọ re ọ na erhunmwu wẹẹ
Psalms4:7 Sokpan
Psalms4:8 I gha lovbiẹ
Psalms5:1 Rhie ehọ ye ẹmwẹ mwẹ Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms5:2 Danmwehọ utumwẹ ne I tu ya nọ iyobọ Osanobua mwẹ kevbe ọba mwẹ! Wẹ ọ re I na erhunmwu ghe Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms5:3 U ghi họn urhu mwẹ vbe owiẹwiẹmwọkpa ovẹn gha yan rre
Psalms5:4 Wẹ i re Osanobua ne ẹko ẹre rhiẹnrhiẹn ye ọkhọ ne a ru wẹ i vbe gie emwi dan gha rre ehe ne uwẹ ye.
Psalms5:5 Wẹ i ho ne u bẹghe emwa itengbemu
Psalms5:6 Wẹ fuẹn avbe ọhọn ohoghe fo fẹẹrẹ
Psalms5:7 Sokpan
Psalms5:8 E Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms5:9 A i sẹtin mu ẹtin yan ẹmwẹ ne avbe eghian mwẹ ta. Ne a fuẹn emwi ruan ọre iran ho. Ẹmwẹ iran rhiẹnrhiẹn vbe ehọ
Psalms5:10 Bu abe gbe iran
Psalms5:11 Sokpan iran hia ne uwẹ degue gha ghọghọ. Iran gha sẹtin gha so ihuan oghọghọ vbe ẹghẹ hia. Degue iran hia ni ho ẹmwẹ ruẹn; rhunmwuda ruẹ ọ re iran na ghọghọ oghọghọ ẹmwata.
Psalms5:12 Wẹ ọ re ọ fiangbe iran ni họn ẹmwẹ ruẹn Nọyaẹnmwa. Ahoẹmwọmwa ruẹn ọ re ọ degue iran zẹ vbe asa.
Psalms6:1 E Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms6:2 Egbe wọ mwẹ nẹ Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms6:3 Egbe ma rọkhọ mwẹ hiehie
Psalms6:4 Gha de do miẹn mwẹ fan
Psalms6:5 A i ye ruẹ rre vbe ẹvbo iran ni wulo nẹ
Psalms6:6 Akhiẹ dunmwu mwẹ uan nẹ
Psalms6:7 I i ghi bẹghe odẹ ẹse
Psalms6:8 Wa kpao vbe ehe ni I ye rre
Psalms6:9 Ọ danmwehọ eve ne I viọ nọ iyobọ
Psalms6:10 Efaa ọmwa ne a mu gbotọ
Psalms7:1 E Nọyaẹnmwa Osanobua mwẹ
Psalms7:2 Ne iran ghẹ ya mu mwẹ gha rriẹ
Psalms7:3 E Nọyaẹnmwa Osanobua mwẹ
Psalms7:4 
Psalms7:5 gie eghian mwẹ khu mwẹ ne obọ iran vbe vba mwẹ. Gie iran rhie mwẹ fianmwẹ otọ
Psalms7:6 Guakpao vbe ohu ruẹ Nọyaẹnmwa. Kpaegbe mu aro igbinna da okuosu avbe eghian mwẹ
Psalms7:7 Rhunmwuda ọnii
Psalms7:8 Wẹ ọrọre nọbuohiẹn emwa hia. Bu asẹ mẹ Nọyaẹnmwa. Wẹ rẹnrẹn wẹ mẹ ma rri abe.
Psalms7:9 Osanobua ẹmwata ọ re uwẹ khin
Psalms7:10 Osanobua ọrọre ne ọ degue mwẹ
Psalms7:11 Nọ bu ohiẹn ẹmwata ọre Osanobua khin. Ọ vbe bu abe gbe emwa dan vbe ẹghẹ hia.
Psalms7:12 A deghẹ iran ma fi ekhọe werriẹ
Psalms7:13 Ọ viọ emwi igbinna rẹn ne ẹi gbe emwi kẹe mwẹ nẹ. Ọ vbe ya ifẹnmwẹ erhẹn ọnrẹn kọn emwi nẹ
Psalms7:14 Ghe vbene emwa dan zẹ iro dan hẹ: Iran ghi gha khuẹn ifi ọlọghọmwa
Psalms7:15 Sokpan
Psalms7:16 Rhunmwuda ọnii
Psalms7:17 I kpọnmwẹ e Nọyaẹnmwa ye ohiẹn ẹmwata ne ọ bu. I so ihuan urhomwẹ ghe Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms8:1 E Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms8:2 Avbe ibiẹka kevbe avbe emobọ hia
Psalms8:3 Mẹ gha ghe iso ne uwẹ yi
Psalms8:4 Vbe ọmwa khin
Psalms8:5 Sevba
Psalms8:6 U ya ẹe ru enọkhaemwisẹ yan emwi ne uwẹ yi hia
Psalms8:7 Avbe ohuan
Psalms8:8 Avbe ahianmwẹ kevbe avbe ehẹn kevbe emwi ne a yi ni rre uwu avbe okun.
Psalms8:9 E Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms9:1 I gha ya ekhọe mwẹ hia rho ruẹ Nọyaẹnmwa. I gha na iyẹn emwi ọyunnuan hia
Psalms9:2 I gha ya oghọghọ so ihuan rhunmwuda ruẹ. I gha so ihuan urhomwẹ ghe ruẹ Osanobua ne Udazi.
Psalms9:3 Eghian mwẹ lẹ werriegbe vbe uwẹ ladian. Iran dele gbe otọ
Psalms9:4 Ohiẹn nọgbae
Psalms9:5 U bu abe gbe iran nigẹbọ nẹ
Psalms9:6 Avbe eghian mwa gbẹro nẹ ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ. U fuẹn ẹvbo iran an nẹ
Psalms9:7 Sokpan
Psalms9:8 Odẹ ẹmwata ọ re ọ ya khaemwisẹ yan agbọn na. Ohiẹn ẹmwata ọ re ọ bu ne agbọn vbọ.
Psalms9:9 E Nọyaẹnmwa ọrọre ehe ne iran na khu khian lẹ fi ehe ne ẹbe i ye vbe ẹghẹ ọlọghọmwa.
Psalms9:10 Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms9:11 Wa so ihuan ghe Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms9:12 Osanobua ye iran ne usẹ sẹ rre
Psalms9:13 Tohan mwẹ Nọyaẹnmwa. Ghe ọlọghọmwa ne avbe eghian mwẹ si yọmwẹ egbe. Fan mwẹ ye otọ vbe obọ uwu
Psalms9:14 ne imẹ miẹn ehe na mudia vbe odaro ivbi e Jerusalẹm. Ne I tama iran
Psalms9:15 Iran ni ma yayi dele ye uvun ne iran tọẹn. Ifi ne iran khuẹn munọ iran.
Psalms9:16 E Nọyaẹnmwa ye egbe ne a miẹn
Psalms9:17 Uwu ọrọre ne a zẹ khẹ emwa dan hia. Kevbe ọghe iran hia ni he Osanobua ye otọ.
Psalms9:18 A i ra mianmian ne ẹi mwẹ rhinrin ẹdẹ. A i ra vbe fuẹn idaehọ ovbiogue ua ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ.
Psalms9:19 Gha dee Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms9:20 Runran iran Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms10:1 Vbe u a na khian rrei sẹrriọ hẹ yi
Psalms10:2 Iran ne emwa dan tọn egbe mu
Psalms10:3 Ọmwa dan ya emwi dan ne ọ khọnrẹn ghagha. Ọmwa uzuanmwẹ kpa unu ghe Osanobua
Psalms10:4 Ọmwa dan i vbe zẹ ye Nọyaẹnmwa re vbe uwu itengbe mu ẹnrẹn
Psalms10:5 Ọmwa dan wa miẹn ọ dunnaẹn vbe emwi ne ọ ru hia
Psalms10:6 Rẹn ghi tama egbe ẹre wẹẹ
Psalms10:7 Ihẹn ne a tie
Psalms10:8 Ọ ghi ya lẹre ye uwu igue ọ ghi gha khọ emwa ne ọ ma rriabe ne ọ gha gbe ua. Ọ ghi gha baba ivbi ẹrrẹe
Psalms10:9 Ọ ghi rhuẹ ye ehe ne ọ lẹre yi zẹ vbe oduma
Psalms10:10 Ivbiẹrrẹe ne obọ ẹre vbare
Psalms10:11 Ọmwa dan ghi tama egbe ẹre wẹẹ
Psalms10:12 E Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms10:13 Vbọzẹ ne ọmwa dan gha na gha zan Osanobua yi

Psalms10:15 Guọghọ ẹtin emwa dan ni zẹ iba
Psalms10:16 E Nọyaẹnmwa ọrọre ọba ẹdẹ kevbe ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ. A gha ho iran ni ga ẹbọ bẹkun
Psalms10:17 E Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms10:18 U gha họn
Psalms11:1 E Nọyaẹnmwa ọ re I mu ẹtin yan ne ọ wan ẹbe yo mẹ. Te uwa kọẹn ne uwa na tama mwẹ wẹẹ
Psalms11:2 Rhunmwuda avbe emwa dan si uhanbọ iran tua nẹ
Psalms11:3 Emwi hia gha kulo nẹ
Psalms11:4 E Nọyaẹnmwa rre uwu Ọgua Osa ẹre ne ọ huanrẹn
Psalms11:5 Rẹn ọ re ọ ghe ọmwa esi
Psalms11:6 Ọ ghi rhurhẹ erhẹn ẹyin ne ọ giẹn kevbe isonwẹn ne ọ tọn yan emwa dan. Ọ ya ẹhoho ne ọ tọn rri iran oya.
Psalms11:7 Ọmwata ọ re Nọyaẹnmwa khin
Psalms12:1 Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms12:2 Te iran hia wa ta ohoghe ma egbe. Iran ghi gha ye arhẹrhẹ mu egbe rẹrẹ.
Psalms12:3 Gbe eta ye iran unu aranmwẹ erẹrẹ. Gue iran unu ne iran ya rhuọ nii
Psalms12:4 “Ẹmwẹ unu ima ọ re ima ya miẹn emwi nẹ ima ho. Emwi ne ọ khọn ima ọre ima ra gha ta. Ọmwa ne ọ gha sẹtin gbe eta ye ima unu
Psalms12:5 Sokpan
Psalms12:6 Ne ọ gia mu ẹtin yan
Psalms12:7 emwa dan wa gba ehe hia

Psalms13:1 Inu ẹghẹ u ghi ra ye mianmian mwẹ la yi Nọyaẹnmwa? Ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ nọ ra? Inu ẹghẹ u ghi ra ye rhie aro lẹ mẹ la?
Psalms13:2 Inu ẹghẹ
Psalms13:3 Tọn aro mu ghe mwẹ Nọyaẹnmwa. Ne u zẹ ẹmwẹ wanniẹn mwẹ. Rhie orhiọn mwẹ werriegbe ye ihe; ghẹ gun mwẹ wu.
Psalms13:4 Ghẹ gie avbe eghian mwẹ kha wẹẹ
Psalms13:5 Ahoẹmwọmwa ruẹn ne ẹi fiwerriẹ ọre I mu ẹtin yan. I gha ghọghọ rhunmwuda
Psalms13:6 I gha so ihuan rho ruẹ Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms14:1 Avbe akpa ye ekhọe tae wẹẹ
Psalms14:2 E Nọyaẹnmwa keghi ke odukhunmwu ghe emwa nagbọn ghe

Psalms14:4 E Nọyaẹnmwa keghi nọ wẹẹ

Psalms14:7 Erhunmwu ne I na ọrọre wẹ
Psalms15:1 Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms15:2 Ọmwa ne ọ họn ẹmwẹ ne Osanobua vbe emwi hia. Ne ọ ru emwi ne ọ gbae ẹghẹ hia. Ne ẹmwẹ unu ẹnrẹn re ẹmwata kevbe ne ọ sẹ otọ ẹko
Psalms15:3 ọmwa ne ẹi zan emwa ọvbehe. Ọmwa ne ẹi fidọn ghe avbe esiọre
Psalms15:4 Ọmwa ne emwa ne Osanobua kan fua sọnnọ
Psalms15:5 Ọ rhie ne emwa mọmọ vbene ẹi na vbe nọ igho isu. Ai vbe sẹtin ya igho dẹ ọe
Psalms16:1 Rhie mwẹ lẹre Osanobua
Psalms16:2 Mẹ tama Nọyaẹnmwa wẹẹ
Psalms16:3 Wẹ miẹn uyi ne ọ rre iran egbe. Ighe iran ni guobọ e Nọyaẹnmwa. Ne I gha rre uwu ẹbu iran
Psalms16:4 Ọlọghọmwa nibun
Psalms16:5 Wẹ ọkpa ọre I mwẹ Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms16:6 Okhekhe ọ re emwi ne u ya mẹ hia khin u miẹn vbe iran ma hẹ!
Psalms16:7 I rhie urhomwẹ ne Nọyaẹnmwa rhunmwuda
Psalms16:8 Ẹghẹ hia mẹ ya rẹn wẹ
Psalms16:9 Rhunmwuda ọnii
Psalms16:10 rhunmwuda wẹ degue mwẹ hin ẹtin uwu rre nẹ. Ọmwa ne uwẹ ho ẹmwẹ ọnrẹn nẹ
Psalms16:11 Wẹ gha ma mwẹ odẹ ne ọ rriẹ arrọọ
Psalms17:1 Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms17:2 We gha bu ohiẹn mẹ
Psalms17:3 U gba ekhọe mwẹ. Wẹ ka bu mwẹ rre yi vbe asọn
Psalms17:4 Zẹ vbene emwa eso ru I ru zẹ vbene u yi ẹre iyi I ma vbe khian vbe odẹ ọkhọ.
Psalms17:5 Odẹ ruẹ ọ re I la khian ẹdẹ
Psalms17:6 Rhunmwuda ne u na họn urhu mwẹ
Psalms17:7 Rhie ahoẹmwọmwa ọyunnuan ruẹn maa
Psalms17:8 Degue mwẹ
Psalms17:9 Hin adekun ọmwa ọghe emwa dan. Eghian ni ho ọmwa uwu lẹga mwẹ
Psalms17:10 iran i mwẹ itohan
Psalms17:11 Iran wa lẹga mwẹ nian
Psalms17:12 Iran ye vbe oduma
Psalms17:13 Gha dee
Psalms17:14 fanmwẹ ye otọ vbe obọ iran ne emwi agbọn na ne iran ho hia
Psalms17:15 Sokpan
Psalms18:1 A miẹn vbene I ho ẹmwẹ ruẹn hẹ Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms18:2 Nọyaẹnmwa ọrọre ne ọ degue mwẹ
Psalms18:3 I tu tie Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms18:4 Ebe ọghe uwu te wa lẹga mwẹ nẹ
Psalms18:5 Ebe ọghe uwu te lẹga mwẹ nẹ idin keghi te rhuẹ ifi khẹ mwẹ
Psalms18:6 vbe uwu ibaro mwẹ
Psalms18:7 Ẹghẹ nii
Psalms18:8 Ighogho vẹ ke uvun ihue ẹre ladian
Psalms18:9 Ọ valọ iso ua
Psalms18:10 Ọ keghi giẹgiẹ ye emwi ne a yi ọghọe ne ọ mwẹ ifuẹn
Psalms18:11 Ọ ya ebiebi gue egbe ẹre
Psalms18:12 Isan avan kevbe erhẹn ne ọ kpannọ kua keghi ke ayan ne ọ rre odaro ẹre ladian
Psalms18:13 Ẹkpo nii
Psalms18:14 Ọ fi ifẹnmwẹ ọnrẹn
Psalms18:15 A keghi gie emwa miẹn ototọ okun nọkhua
Psalms18:16 E Nọyaẹnmwa ke odukhunmwu niẹn obọ rre
Psalms18:17 Ọ miẹn mwẹ fan vbe obọ avbe eghian mwẹ ni wegbe kevbe iran ni khuiwu mwẹ
Psalms18:18 Ugbẹn vbe I rre uwu ọlọghọmwa
Psalms18:19 Ọ yọ mwẹ obọ la hin uwu ẹbe rre ọ miẹn mwẹ fan rhunmwuda
Psalms18:20 E Nọyaẹnmwa san mwẹ ẹse
Psalms18:21 Mẹ mu uhi e Nọyaẹnmwa sẹ nẹ
Psalms18:22 I ru nẹ zẹ vbene uhi ẹre hia khare I ma de iyi ẹre rhọkpa.
Psalms18:23 Rẹn rẹnrẹn wẹ abakuru i rrọ mẹ kevbe wẹ
Psalms18:24 Rhunmwuda ọnii
Psalms18:25 Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms18:26 Wẹ re ọmwa ne ọ huanrẹn ne iran ne ọ huanrẹn sokpan
Psalms18:27 Wẹ miẹn iran ni mu egbe rriotọ fan sokpan
Psalms18:28 E Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms18:29 U rhie ẹtin mẹ ne I ya gu avbe eghian mwẹ gbinna ke ẹtin ne I ya guọghọ emwi ne iran ya khẹ egbe.
Psalms18:30 Osanobua na
Psalms18:31 E Nọyaẹnmwa ọkpa ọrọre Osanobua
Psalms18:32 Rẹn ọrọre Osanobua ne ọ ya mwẹ wegbe ne ọ viọ ẹbe hin urodẹ mwẹ rre.
Psalms18:33 Ọ ya owẹ mwẹ khẹ ye egbe vbe ọ ghe ẹrhuẹ
Psalms18:34 Ọ ma mwẹ vbene a khọn okuo hẹ sẹrriọ ne I na sẹtin lo uhanbọ ne ọ wegbe sẹẹ.
Psalms18:35 Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms18:36 We ọ re ọ ma gie obọ gba mwẹ
Psalms18:37 I khu avbe eghian mwẹ
Psalms18:38 I gbele iran ku otọ
Psalms18:39 U rhie ẹtin mẹ ya khọn nene okuo kevbe akhọnmiotọ vbe uhunmwu eghian mwẹ.
Psalms18:40 U gie avbe eghian mwẹ lẹ mẹ
Psalms18:41 Iran tu nọ iyobọ sokpan
Psalms18:42 I rẹnkhẹn iran an iran na do yevbe ebubẹ ne ẹhoho kpolo rriẹ. I ya owẹ rri iran ginna otọ zẹ vbe ọrho vbe adesẹ ore.
Psalms18:43 U miẹn mwẹ fan vbe obọ avbe isọtẹ u keghi ya mwẹ khian ne ọ khaemwisẹ yan avbe uhunmwu ẹvbo. Avbe emwa ne imẹ ma rẹn
Psalms18:44 Avbe orhunmwuyẹn ghi gha diguẹ mẹ. Iran gha họn urhu mwẹ iran ghi gha ru vbene I khare.
Psalms18:45 Te afianma ghi fian iran
Psalms18:46 E Nọyaẹnmwa rrọọ
Psalms18:47 Ọ rhie akhọnmiotọ mẹ vbe uhunmwu avbe eghian mwẹ
Psalms18:48 Ọ keghi miẹn mwẹ fan vbe obọ avbe eghian mwẹ. Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms18:49 Rhunmwuda ọnii
Psalms18:50 Osanobua rhie akhọnmiotọ ne ọba ẹre
Psalms19:1 U miẹn vbe iso rhie uyi Osanobua ma hẹ! Ọ na vbe rhie iwinna obọ ẹre ma fẹẹrẹ.
Psalms19:2 Ẹdẹ ọkpọkpa ghi gha tae ma ne ọ lelẹe
Psalms19:3 Ẹi re te a guan ya tae ai vbe họn owogho vbọ
Psalms19:4 Sevba urhu iran ghi ya sẹ uhunmwu otọ agbọn hia a ghi vbe họn vbe ehe ne agbọn sẹe. Osanobua bọ owa ne owẹn vbe iso;
Psalms19:5 ọ ghi ladian vbe owiẹ zẹvbe ọdafẹn ọha ne ẹko ẹre rhiẹnrhiẹn zẹvbe ọmọ ne egbe sasa ne ulẹ ne a rhie wa khọn.
Psalms19:6 Ọ ghi suẹn vbe obọkpa vbe iso ọ ghi wa fiaẹn rra gha rriẹ obọ nọkpa. Emwi ọkpa i rrọ ne ọ sẹtin
Psalms19:7 Te uhi e Nọyaẹnmwa wa gba te ọ rhie ẹtin ọgbọn ye ọmwa iwu. Iyi e Nọyaẹnmwa gia mu ẹtin yan
Psalms19:8 Emwi ne ọ kere ọre uhi e Nọyaẹnmwa khin
Psalms19:9 Ugamwẹ e Nọyaẹnmwa maa te ọ khian gha rrọọ ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ. Ẹmwata ọ re avbe ibu ohiẹn e Nọyaẹnmwa khin; emwi ne a ru ẹse wa nọ ẹghẹ hia.
Psalms19:10 A rhie aro yọ sẹ igoru ne ọ ghi hian sẹẹ iran rhiẹnrhiẹn sẹ owọn ne ọ ghi hian sẹ.
Psalms19:11 Iran rhie irẹnmwi ne imẹ ne ọguọmwadia ruẹ
Psalms19:12 A i miẹn ne ọ kha i ghẹ rẹn i gbe ẹse Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms19:13 Vbe fanmwẹ vbe obọ orukhọ ọmaru
Psalms19:14 Gie ẹmwẹ ne unu mwẹ
Psalms20:1 Te Nọyaẹnmwa gha họn urhu ruẹ vbe ẹdẹ ibaro. Te Osanobua Jekọb gha de gue ruẹ.
Psalms20:2 Te ọ gha gie iyobọ guẹ
Psalms20:3 Te ọ gha rhan obọ miẹn emwi imuohan ruẹn hia
Psalms20:4 Te ọ gha viọ emwi ne u ho hia nuẹn
Psalms20:5 Ẹghẹ nii
Psalms20:6 Eban nian
Psalms20:7 Arhin eso mu ẹtin yan ikẹkẹ okuo iran
Psalms20:8 Emwa vberriọ gha rrua owẹ
Psalms20:9 Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms21:1 Ẹko ọba rhiẹnrhiẹn
Psalms21:2 U rhie emwi ne ekhọe ẹre ho ne ẹẹn nẹ
Psalms21:3 U rhie afiangbe nibun bu ẹre gha dee
Psalms21:4 Ọ nọ arrọọ
Psalms21:5 Uyi ẹre kpọlọ rhunmwuda iyobọ ruẹ
Psalms21:6 Afiangbe ruẹ gu ẹe rrọọ rhinrin ẹdẹ. Rẹn vuọn ne oghọghọ rhunmwuda wẹ gu ẹe rre evba.
Psalms21:7 Ọba mu ẹtin yan e Nọyaẹnmwa ne Udazi
Psalms21:8 Ọba gha khọn munọ avbe eghian rẹn hia. Rẹn gha khọn munọ
Psalms21:9 Ọ gha fuẹn iran hia a zẹvbe okperhẹn
Psalms21:10 Ọkpa ne ọ gha miẹn uhunmwu vbe ivbi uniẹn iran i rrọọ. Ọba gha gbele iran hia a fẹẹrẹ.
Psalms21:11 Iran si uma
Psalms21:12 Ọ gha ya ifẹnmwẹ ọnrẹn filo iran. Ọ gha ya iran fi ọdelegbe
Psalms21:13 Mẹ rho ruẹn Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms22:1 Osanobua mwẹ
Psalms22:2 Vbe ẹghẹ avan
Psalms22:3 Sokpan
Psalms22:4 Avbe erha mwa odede mu ẹtin iran yan ruẹn
Psalms22:5 Iran tu tie ruẹ
Psalms22:6 Sokpan
Psalms22:7 Emwa ni miẹn mwẹ hia
Psalms22:8 Iran wẹẹ
Psalms22:9 Wẹ ọ re ọ gie a biẹ mwẹ hẹnnẹdẹn. Ẹghẹ ne I na re ọmobọ
Psalms22:10 Wẹ ọ re I mu ẹtin yan
Psalms22:11 Ghẹ khian rrei mẹ rhunmwuda
Psalms22:12 Eghian nibun lẹga mwẹ zẹvbe ẹkhuia ẹmila. Iran hia wa lẹga mwẹ zẹvbe ẹkhuia ẹmila ne ọ khọ
Psalms22:13 Iran rhan unu iran zẹvbe oduma
Psalms22:14 Orhiọn mwẹ tin fua
Psalms22:15 Ẹho mwẹ kae zẹvbe ikpekhae
Psalms22:16 Otu emwa dan ghae ga mwẹ zẹvbe oghẹn ekita
Psalms22:17 Te a ghi bẹghe ugboloko mwẹ hia. Avbe eghian mwẹ yan aro gha ghe mwẹ.
Psalms22:18 Iran yan uta ye ukpọn mwẹ
Psalms22:19 E Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms22:20 Miẹn mwẹ fan hin umozo rre
Psalms22:21 Yuo mwẹ hin obọ avbe oduma na rre; mẹ i sẹtin ru emwi rhọkpa
Psalms22:22 I gha na iyẹn emwi ne u ru mẹ
Psalms22:23 “Wa ne eguọmwadia e Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms22:24 Rẹn i mianmian ivbiogue
Psalms22:25 I gha rho ruẹ ye emwi ne u ru
Psalms22:26 Avbe ivbiogue gha re vbene iran ho
Psalms22:27 Agbọn ẹvbo hia gha ye Nọyaẹnmwa rre
Psalms22:28 E Nọyaẹnmwa ọrọre ọba
Psalms22:29 Emwa ni tọn egbe mu hia gha ya uhunmwu rhanmwẹ otọ ne ẹẹn. Emwa ne ọ sẹtin wu hia gha ya uhunmwu rhanmwẹ otọ ne ẹẹn.
Psalms22:30 Avbe orre ni dee hia
Psalms22:31 A gha tama emwa ne a ma he biẹ hia wẹẹ
Psalms23:1 E Nọyaẹnmwa ọrọre ọsuohuan mwẹ
Psalms23:2 Ọ mu mwẹ lovbiẹ vbe oha ne ọ furre
Psalms23:3 Ọ fu ekhọe mwẹ egbe rre ọ su mwẹ vbe odẹ ẹmwata
Psalms23:4 Vbe ẹmwata
Psalms23:5 Wẹ ye evbare mẹ re
Psalms23:6 Aro mwẹ dae wẹ aro ne ọma kevbe aho ẹmwẹ ọmwa ruẹn
Psalms24:1 E Nọyaẹnmwa ọ re ọ yan agbọn na
Psalms24:2 Ọ bọ ẹe yan odin amẹ ne ọ rre uwu otọ. Ọ kevbe gbe ẹyotọ ẹre yan orinmwi amẹ okun.
Psalms24:3 De ọmwa ne ọ kere nọ gha hin uhunmwu oke Nọyaẹnmwa? De ọmwa ne ọ gha lao Ọgua Osa ẹre ne ọ huanrẹn?
Psalms24:4 Iran ne emwa ni khuiae vbe emwi ne a ru kevbe iro ne a zẹ
Psalms24:5 E Nọyaẹnmwa gha fiangbe iran
Psalms24:6 Iran na ọrọre emwa ni bu Osanobua dee
Psalms24:7 Wa bilo urho nii ye otọ gbodoo wa kie avbe ẹkhu arre ni uan
Psalms24:8 De ọmwa ne ọ re ọba nọkhua na? Rẹn nọ ighẹ e Nọyaẹnmwa ne ọ wegbe kevbe ne ọ mwẹ ẹtin. E Nọyaẹnmwa ne ọ khọnmiotọ vbe okuo.
Psalms24:9 Wa bilo urho nii ye otọ gbodoo
Psalms24:10 De ọmwa ne ọ re ọba nọkhua na? E Nọyaẹnmwa ne ọ khọnmiotọ rẹn ọrọre ọba nọkhua.
Psalms25:1 E Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms25:2 Osanobua mwẹ
Psalms25:3 A i mu emwa ni mu ẹtin yan ruẹn gbotọ sokpan iran ni zẹgiẹgiẹ sọtẹ ruẹ.
Psalms25:4 Ma mwẹ odẹ ruẹ Nọyaẹnmwa ya iran khian ne a rẹnrẹn mẹ.
Psalms25:5 Ma mwẹ re ne I gha ya ẹmwata ruẹ ru emwi rhunmwuda
Psalms25:6 E Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms25:7 Ya orukhọ kevbe abakuru ẹghẹ ọvbokhan mwẹ bọ mwẹ
Psalms25:8 Rhunmwuda ighe ọmwata kevbe ne ọ maa ọ re Nọyaẹnmwa khin. Ọ ma avbe emwa orukhọ odẹ ne iran gha lele.
Psalms25:9 Ọ su ọmẹhẹ
Psalms25:10 A gia mu ẹtin yan
Psalms25:11 Mu eyan ruẹn sẹ Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms25:12 Iran ni họn ẹmwẹ ne Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms25:13 Agbọn gha ma iran ẹghẹ hia
Psalms25:14 Ọse iran ni họn ẹmwẹ ne ẹẹn
Psalms25:15 Aro e Nọyaẹnmwa ọ re imẹ ghe ne iyobọ vbe ẹghẹ hia. Ọ kevbe gha miẹn mwẹ fan vbe ẹbe.
Psalms25:16 Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms25:17 Mu ohawa mwẹ hin mwẹ uhunmwu rre. Ne u vbe fan mwẹ vbe ibaro mwẹ hia.
Psalms25:18 Roro usẹ kevbe oya mwẹ ne u vbe ya orukhọ mwẹ hia bọ mwẹ.
Psalms25:19 Ghe vbene eghian ne I mwẹ bun hẹ
Psalms25:20 Degue mwẹ ne u miẹn mwẹ fan; ghẹ gie obọ gba mwẹ. Wẹ ọ re imẹ lẹgbinna.
Psalms25:21 Gie umamwẹ kevbe a ta ẹmwata mwẹ rhie mwẹ lẹre
Psalms25:22 Osanobua
Psalms26:1 Bu asẹ mẹ
Psalms26:2 Gualọ otọ mwẹ ne u vbe danmwẹ mwẹ ghe Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms26:3 Aho ẹmwẹ ọmwa ruẹn ne ẹi beghe ọ re ọ su mwẹ khian. A gia mu ẹtin yan ọwuẹ ọ re ọ ma mwẹ odẹ khian.
Psalms26:4 Mẹ i gu emwa ẹwobi mu obọ
Psalms26:5 Ohu otu emwa dan mu mwẹ
Psalms26:6 Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms26:7 Mẹ so ihuan ekpọnmwẹ I ghi vbe na iyẹn iwinna ọyunnuan ruẹn hia.
Psalms26:8 Owa ne u ye wa yẹ mwẹ Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms26:9 Ghẹ fuẹn mwẹ uan ba avbe emwa orukhọ. Ghẹ gie emwi ne ọ rruan izigha rruan mwẹ.
Psalms26:10 Emwa ni wa ru emwi dan vbe ẹghẹ hia
Psalms26:11 Zẹ vbe ọghomwẹ
Psalms26:12 I fe vbe obọ ẹbe hia
Psalms27:1 E Nọyaẹnmwa ọrọre uwanmwẹ mwẹ kevbe imiẹnfan mwẹ
Psalms27:2 Ugbẹn vbe iran ne emwa dan
Psalms27:3 Ọ gha khọn rẹn wẹ
Psalms27:4 Emwi ọkpa
Psalms27:5 Ọ gha degue mwẹ vbe ẹghẹ ibaro ọ gha rhie mwẹ lẹre vbe uwu Ọgua Osa ẹre
Psalms27:6 Erriọ ọ re I gha na khọnmiotọ vbe uhunmwu avbe eghian mwẹ ni lẹga mwẹ. I gha ya urhu oghọghọ ne ọ la zọ ese vbe uwu Ọgua Osa ẹre. I gha so ihuan
Psalms27:7 Họn ọghomwẹ Nọyaẹnmwa vbe I gha da tie ruẹ tohan mwẹ
Psalms27:8 Ẹkpo ne uwẹ na kha wẹẹ
Psalms27:9 Ghẹ rhie egbe lẹre mẹ ghẹ muohu mwẹ
Psalms27:10 Erha mwẹ vbe iye mwẹ sẹtin he mwẹ yotọ
Psalms27:11 E Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms27:12 Ghẹ sẹ mwẹ rae ne avbe eghian mwẹ
Psalms27:13 Mẹ rẹnrẹn i ghẹ I gha tọ miẹn ọma ọghe Nọyaẹnmwa vbe arria na.
Psalms27:14 Mu ẹtin yan e Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms28:1 E Nọyaẹnmwa ugue mwẹ
Psalms28:2 Họn urhu mwẹ vbe imẹ a gha tu tie ruẹ nọ iyobọ. Vbe I gha viọ obọ mwẹ da ukhunmwu ghe Ọgua Osa ruẹ ne ọ huanrẹn.
Psalms28:3 Ghẹ bu abe gbe mwẹ ba avbe emwa dan
Psalms28:4 Rria iran ikhi ye emwi ne iran ru
Psalms28:5 Iran i vbe zẹdẹ bẹghe iwinna Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms28:6 Wa rhie urhomwẹ ne Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms28:7 E Nọyaẹnmwa degue mwẹ
Psalms28:8 E Nọyaẹnmwa degue emwa rẹn
Psalms28:9 Miẹn emwa ruẹn fan Nọyaẹnmwa ne u vbe fiangbe emwa ni re ọwuẹ. Gha re ọsuohuan iran
Psalms29:1 Wa rho e Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms29:2 Wa rho eni uyi ọghe Nọyaẹnmwa gbe uhunmwu ke otọ ne Ne ọ huarẹn ọghọe vbe ọ gha ya egbe ladian.
Psalms29:3 A họn urhu e Nọyaẹnmwa vbe uhunmwu avbe okun
Psalms29:4 A họn urhu e Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms29:5 Urhu e Nọyaẹnmwa guọghọ avbe sida rua
Psalms29:6 Ọ ya avbe oke Lebanọn gha san vbe ogho
Psalms29:7 Urhu e Nọyaẹnmwa ye ayan yan.
Psalms29:8 Urhu ẹre mu otọ rueghe ọ mu ẹgbo Kedẹs rueghe.
Psalms29:9 Urhu e Nọyaẹnmwa rueghe okan ọ kevbe bọnmwẹ ẹbe hin erhan nii rre. Vbene emwa ni rre Ọgua Osa ẹre na go kha wẹẹ
Psalms29:10 E Nọyaẹnmwa ọ re ọ kha yan avbe ogiamẹ
Psalms29:11 E Nọyaẹnmwa ọ re ọ rhie ẹtin ne emwa rẹn
Psalms30:1 I rho ruẹ Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms30:2 Nọyaẹnmwa Osanobua mwẹ
Psalms30:3 u fan mwẹ vbe obọ idin. I te khian rriẹ ne vuun nẹ vbe uwu otọ u keghi dọlegbe rhie arrọ mwẹ mẹ.
Psalms30:4 Wa so ihuan urhomwẹ ghe Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms30:5 Ovbi ẹghẹ kherhe ọre izohu ẹre ya umamwẹ ọnrẹn keghi re ọghe ẹdẹ agbọn hia. Ameve sẹtin gha rhọkua vbe
Psalms30:6 Ugbẹn vbe I roro ẹẹ wẹ ẹkun sẹ mwẹ otọ nẹ
Psalms30:7 Wẹ keghi wa gha ma mẹ Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms30:8 I keghi tu tie ruẹ Nọyaẹnmwa I keghi rinmwian iyobọ ruẹ:
Psalms30:9 “De ere ne ọ rrọ nuẹn deghẹ I wu? De ere ne ọ rrọ deghẹ I la idin? Avbe orinmwi vbe sẹtin rho ruẹ ra? Iran gha sẹtin mu itohan ruẹn ne ẹi fira go ra?
Psalms30:10 Họn urhu mwẹ Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms30:11 U ya eve mwẹ khian iku ọyẹnmwẹ nẹ. U mu akhiẹ hin mwẹ egbe rre u kevbe viọ oghọghọ lẹga mwẹ.
Psalms30:12 Rhunmwuda ọnii
Psalms31:1 I rre do lẹ gbinna an Nọyaẹnmwa ghẹ gie obọ gba mwẹ ẹdẹ. Osanobua ẹmwata wẹ khin lahọ miẹn mwẹ fan.
Psalms31:2 Họn urhu mwẹ
Psalms31:3 Wẹ ọrọre ugue kevbe ne ọ gbinna mẹ. Dia mwẹ ne u vbe gha su mwẹ khian
Psalms31:4 Degue mwẹ hin obọ ifi ne a rhuẹ ye otọ khẹ mwẹ tan ifuẹn gue mwẹ hin ẹbe rre.
Psalms31:5 Wẹ ọ re I lẹ gbinna u ghi miẹn mwẹ fan Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms31:6 Wẹ khuiwu iran ni ga ẹbọ ohoghe sokpan mẹ mu ẹtin yan ruẹn.
Psalms31:7 I gha sẹ ọyẹnmwẹ
Psalms31:8 U ma gie obọ eghian mwẹ gba mwẹ. U rhie ẹtin mẹ
Psalms31:9 Tohan mwẹ Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms31:10 Egbe wọ mwẹ rhunmwuda akhiẹ. Eve fian ẹdẹ mwẹ kanmwa. Olọghọ ne I ye guọghọ mwẹ egbe ye otọ. Te avbe ugboloko mwẹ ghi rẹnhuan.
Psalms31:11 Te avbe eghian mwẹ hia
Psalms31:12 Te emwa hia ghi mianmian mwẹ
Psalms31:13 I họn ewẹwẹwẹ
Psalms31:14 Sokpan
Psalms31:15 wẹ ọ re ọ gbe aro ghe mwẹ vbe ẹghẹ hia. Miẹn mwẹ fan vbe obọ avbe eghian mwẹ
Psalms31:16 Ye aro itohan ghe ọguọmwadia ruẹ
Psalms31:17 I tu tie ruẹ Nọyaẹnmwa ghẹ gie iran fa mwẹ uan. Efaa ọ re ọ gha rruan ọmwa dan
Psalms31:18 Gue avbe ọhọn ohoghe ni unu iran ni tọn egbe mu kevbe ni hio. Iran ni ye ukpe iran sakan avbe emwa ẹmwata.
Psalms31:19 Umiẹn vbe ehia mose hẹ ighe avbe emwi esi ne u hẹ ye otọ
Psalms31:20 U viọ iran lẹre ye ẹbe fo
Psalms31:21 Wa rho e Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms31:22 Afianma te gha fian mwẹ I keghi te ro wẹ ọ khu mwẹ fua hin ehe ne irẹn ye rre nẹ. Sokpan
Psalms31:23 Wa ho ẹmwẹ e Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms31:24 Wa wegbe
Psalms32:1 Afiangbe ọrọre ọghe iran ne a ya orukhọ iran bọ kevbe emwa ne a ye alagberra iran ma.
Psalms32:2 Afiangbe nọ ne ọmwa ne Nọyaẹnmwa ma ka abakuru ye ọre owẹ. Kevbe ne ẹi mwẹ erẹrẹ hiehiere.
Psalms32:3 Ẹghẹ ne I ma na miẹn orukhọ mwẹ kue
Psalms32:4 Ke asọn kevbe avan ọ re u ya rriọmwẹ oya
Psalms32:5 Ẹghẹ nii
Psalms32:6 Erriọ ọ re emwa ruẹn ni mudia ẹse hia
Psalms32:7 Wẹ ọrọre ehe ne I lẹre yi
Psalms32:8 E Nọyaẹnmwa khare wẹẹ
Psalms32:9 Wẹ ghẹ zurọ ua zẹvbe ẹsin ra ẹmila
Psalms32:10 Ẹi mwẹ ne ọmwa dan ghẹ rri oya
Psalms32:11 Wa gha ghọghọ
Psalms33:1 Wa hia ni re ẹmwata
Psalms33:2 Wa ye emwi ihuan ne ọ mwẹ irri so ihuan.
Psalms33:3 Wa so ihuan ọgbọn ghe ẹre
Psalms33:4 Ẹmwata ọ re ẹmwẹ e Nọyaẹnmwa khin
Psalms33:5 E Nọyaẹnmwa ho ẹmwẹ emwi ẹmwata
Psalms33:6 Ẹmwẹ unu ọ re Nọyaẹnmwa ya yi avbe ẹrinmwi
Psalms33:7 Ọ si avbe okun hia koko ye ihọkpa ọ keghi khui avbe odin amẹ okun ye aza ẹre.
Psalms33:8 Wa ya ọghọ ne Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms33:9 Rẹn guanrẹn
Psalms33:10 E Nọyaẹnmwa ọ re ọ duẹ uma agbọn ẹvbo hia a
Psalms33:11 Sokpan
Psalms33:12 Afiangbe ọrọre ọghe uhunmwu ẹvbo ne Nọyaẹnmwa re Osanobua ẹre. Afiangbe ọrọre ọghe emwa ne irẹn zẹ ya ru ọghọe.
Psalms33:13 E Nọyaẹnmwa gbearoghe otọe ke ẹrinmwi rre. Ọ keghi bẹghe emwa nagbọn hia.
Psalms33:14 Ehe ne ọ na khaemwisẹ ọ re ọ ke ghe otọe ghe emwa hia ni rre agbọn.
Psalms33:15 Rẹn mwamwa iziro ekhọe iran
Psalms33:16 Ẹi re rhunmwuda iyokuo ẹre ne ọ wegbe
Psalms33:17 Avbe ẹsin okuo imwẹ asa vbe akhọnmiotọ
Psalms33:18 E Nọyaẹnmwa ọ re ọ gbearoghe iran ni ya ọghọ ne ẹẹn. Iran ni mu ẹtin yan ahoẹmwọmwa rẹn ne ẹi beghe.
Psalms33:19 Ọ miẹn iran fan vbe obọ uwu
Psalms33:20 Ma mu ẹtin mwa yan e Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms33:21 Rhunmwuda irẹn ọ re ima na ghọghọ ma mu ẹtin yan eni ẹnrẹn ne ọ huanrẹn.
Psalms33:22 Gie ahoẹmwọmwa ruẹn ne ẹi beghe
Psalms34:1 I gha kpọnmwẹ Nọyaẹnmwa vbe ẹghẹ hia. Mẹ i ra dobọ urhomwẹ ọnrẹn yi ẹdẹ.
Psalms34:2 1 gha rho ẹre ye iwinna ne ọ winna ẹn. Wa gie emwa ne a zẹ kpokpo hia
Psalms34:3 Wa gunmwẹ wewe u kpọlọ mwẹ e Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms34:4 I na erhunmwu ghe Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms34:5 Iran ne a zẹ kpokpo ye aro kọe
Psalms34:6 Iran ne ẹtin fo nẹ kpe tie ẹre
Psalms34:7 Avbe odibosa ẹre ọ re ọ gbearoghe iran ni ya ọghọ ne Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms34:8 Wẹ tobọ gualọ otọ ẹre miẹn vbene Nọyaẹnmwa maa hẹ. Afiangbe ọrọre ọghe iran ni lẹgbinna ẹẹn.
Psalms34:9 Wa gha ya ọghọ ne Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms34:10 Avbe oduma sẹtin gha vbabọ evbare
Psalms34:11 Wa larre
Psalms34:12 Wẹ ho ne u ya ẹdẹ ruẹ zọmọ ra? U ho utọmwẹ kevbe uwa ra?
Psalms34:13 Adeghẹ erriọ nọ
Psalms34:14 Fi iyeke gbe emwi dan
Psalms34:15 E Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms34:16 Sokpan
Psalms34:17 Ẹmwata gha kpe tie Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms34:18 E Nọyaẹnmwa sikẹ iran
Psalms34:19 Ọlọghọmwa nibun
Psalms34:20 Te Nọyaẹnmwa wa degue ẹre fo
Psalms34:21 Ọkhọ ọ ra gbe ọmwa dan. Obọ gha vba iran ni khuiwu ọmwata.
Psalms34:22 E Nọyaẹnmwa gha miẹn emwa rẹn fan emwi rhọkpa i ra ru iran ni lẹgbinna ẹn.
Psalms35:1 E Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms35:2 Mu asa kevbe ẹwu okuo ruẹ ne u do wọlọ mwẹ ladian.
Psalms35:3 Viọ asoro kevbe ogala ruẹ ladian ne u mu aro da iran ni khu mwẹ khian tama mwẹ wẹẹ u gha miẹn mwẹ fan.
Psalms35:4 Iran ni ho ne iran gbe mwẹ uan
Psalms35:5 Te iran gha ye vbe ẹbe nọkakae ne ẹhoho hoho khian ne odibosa e Nọyaẹnmwa gha khu iran khian.
Psalms35:6 Te odẹ iran gha so ebiebi
Psalms35:7 Vbene ẹi na mwẹ otọe
Psalms35:8 Sokpan
Psalms35:9 Ẹkpo nii
Psalms35:10 Me gha ye ekhọekekhọe mwẹ tama Nọyaẹnmwa wẹẹ
Psalms35:11 Avbe emwa dan sẹ osẹe gbe mwẹ iran ba mwẹ ifi ẹzọ vbe I ma rẹn ọkpa I ma rẹn eva.
Psalms35:12 Iran ya oghodan kpọnmwẹ mwẹ ẹse
Psalms35:13 Vberriọ
Psalms35:14 Zẹ vbene I gha na erhunmwu ne osẹ mwẹ ra ọtẹn mwẹ. Akhiẹ keghi so mwẹ uke
Psalms35:15 Sokpan
Psalms35:16 Iran keghi gọn aro ikhuiwu ghe mwẹ zẹ vbe emwa ni ye uke gbogiẹ.
Psalms35:17 Vbe u a ra hunwan gha ghe ọna sẹ hẹ yi Nọyaẹnmwa? Wọlọ mwẹ hin ugbemwẹ iran rre
Psalms35:18 Ẹghẹ nii
Psalms35:19 Ghẹ gie iran ne eghian mwẹ
Psalms35:20 Iran i gu ọmwa guan ẹmwẹ osẹ
Psalms35:21 Iran ba mwẹ ifi ẹzọ
Psalms35:22 Sokpan
Psalms35:23 Guọnmwegbe kpaegbe Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms35:24 Ọmwata ọ re uwẹ khin Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms35:25 Ghẹ gie iran tama egbe iran wẹẹ
Psalms35:26 Iran ni gbe igiogio ye usẹ ne ẹse mwẹ
Psalms35:27 Iran ni ho ne a bu ohiẹn mẹ
Psalms35:28 Rhunmwuda ọnii
Psalms36:1 Orukhọ gu ọmwa dan guan vbe uwu ekhọe ẹre
Psalms36:2 Rhunmwuda ukpo ne ọ yo ne ọ ro egbe ẹre yi
Psalms36:3 Ẹmwẹ dan ọ re ọ ke unu ẹnrẹn rre
Psalms36:4 Ọ ghi gha zẹ iro emwi dan a i ghi miẹn emwiọkpa ne ọ maa ne ọ ru. Rẹn i vbe fieghe uhunmwu ye emwi dan.
Psalms36:5 Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms36:6 Umamwẹ ruẹn gbe ogege vbe oke ne ọ yo. Ẹmwata ruẹ yevbe orinmwiamẹ okun
Psalms36:7 Osanobua
Psalms36:8 Evbare ọrhẹnrhẹn ne u hẹ ma ọ re ima re; u kevbe gie ima vbe gha wọn vbe ẹzẹ iruemwiẹse ruẹ.
Psalms36:9 Ehe ne u ye ọ re arrọọ hia ke rre
Psalms36:10 Ye gha ho ẹmwẹ iran ni rẹn ruẹn ne u vbe gha ru iran ne ẹmwata emwi esi.
Psalms36:11 Ghẹ gie iran ni tọn egbe mu gunmwẹ gbinna
Psalms36:12 Wa do ghe ehe ne emwa dan dele yi
Psalms37:1 Ghẹ si osi ba ẹmwẹ ọmwa dan
Psalms37:2 A gha ho iran bẹkun wan
Psalms37:3 Mu ẹtin yan e Nọyaẹnmwa ne u gha ru emwi ẹse
Psalms37:4 Gha gualọ ọyẹnmwẹ ruẹn vbe uwu e Nọyaẹnmwa; rẹn gha vbe rhie iho ekhọe ruẹ ne uẹn.
Psalms37:5 Rhie egbe ruẹ ne Nọyaẹnmwa mu ẹtin yan rẹn ọ gha yi uẹ obọ.
Psalms37:6 Ọ gha vbe ya ẹmwata ruẹ wan uwanmwẹ zẹvbe owẹn oghọghọ.
Psalms37:7 Zin egbe ne u rhie ẹghẹ ne Nọyaẹnmwa ya winna. Ghẹ si osi ye ẹmwẹ iran ne agbọn maa rẹn
Psalms37:8 Ghẹ rhie otọ ne ohawa ra ohu
Psalms37:9 Iran ni mu ẹtin yan e Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms37:10 Vbe ọ ma he kpee wan
Psalms37:11 Sokpan avbe ọmẹhẹ ọ re ọ ra yan otọe nii iran ghi vbe gha ye ọfumwegbe zọmọ vbe uwu ẹre.
Psalms37:12 Ọmwa dan khuan khẹ ọmwa esi ọ kevbe ye ikhuiwu gha ghe ẹre kọn-ọn.
Psalms37:13 Sokpan e Nọyaẹnmwa gha giẹ emwa dan rhunmwuda ọ rẹnrẹn ighe a gha fuẹn iran an ban.
Psalms37:14 Avbe emwa dan yuo umozo iran an
Psalms37:15 Sokpan
Psalms37:16 Ive emwi kherhe ne ọmwata mwẹ
Psalms37:17 rhunmwuda Nọyaẹnmwa gha ya ẹtin fo iran ne emwa dan
Psalms37:18 E Nọyaẹnmwa ọ re ọ gbearoghe iran ni họn ẹmwẹ ne ẹẹn
Psalms37:19 Iran i ra sẹ usẹ vbe ẹghẹ emwi dan; iran gha mwẹ zẹ vbene iran ho vbe ẹghẹ ukhunmwu.
Psalms37:20 Sokpan
Psalms37:21 Ọmwadan mọmọ emwi
Psalms37:22 Iran ne Nọyaẹnmwa fiangbe ọ re ọ yan otọe nii. Sokpan
Psalms37:23 E Nọyaẹnmwa ọ re ọ dia ọmwa ye odẹ ne ọ gha la
Psalms37:24 Deghẹ iran de
Psalms37:25 Ọmaẹn ọ re I ghi khin na
Psalms37:26 Ẹghẹ hia ọ re ọ ya zẹ emwi obọ
Psalms37:27 Fi iyeke gbe ọkhọ
Psalms37:28 Rhunmwuda
Psalms37:29 Ọmwata ọ re ọ ra yan otọe nii ọ ghi vbe yin ẹnrẹn rhinrin ẹdẹ.
Psalms37:30 Ẹmwẹ ọmwa esi
Psalms37:31 Ọ ghi rhie uhi Osanobua ẹre ye ekhọe ẹi vbe bi egbe hin rre ẹdẹ.
Psalms37:32 Ọmwa dan ghi gha baba ọmwa esi
Psalms37:33 Sokpan
Psalms37:34 Hẹnhẹn idaehọ ruẹ yan e Nọyaẹnmwa gha mu uhi ẹre sẹ ọ gha mu otọe ni ne uẹn. Ne ọ ya mu ọghọ yuẹ egbe. U gha vbe miẹn ọẹn vbe a gha khulo emwa dan ladian.
Psalms37:35 I rẹn ọmwa dan ọkpa ne akuobisi yi
Psalms37:36 Sokpan
Psalms37:37 Yi ọmwa esi ẹro
Psalms37:38 sokpan
Psalms37:39 E Nọyaẹnmwa ọ re ọ miẹn ẹmwata fan ọ ghi degue iran vbe ẹghẹ orueghe.
Psalms37:40 Ọ yi iran obọ
Psalms38:1 Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms38:2 U ya ifẹnmwẹ ruẹn kuan mwẹ nẹ
Psalms38:3 Uwu obalọ ọ re I ghi ye
Psalms38:4 Ẹzẹ esagiẹn orukhọ mwẹ lẹ mwẹ rriẹ ihẹ ọre khua gberra ne a sẹtin mu.
Psalms38:5 Ẹtẹ mwẹ wia
Psalms38:6 Te I ghi hie fo vbe uhanbọ
Psalms38:7 Emwirraro ye egbe mwẹ giẹn uan I sikẹ uwu fo.
Psalms38:8 I sin uan fo fẹẹrẹ
Psalms38:9 Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms38:10 Ẹkoko udu mwẹ gha ha ọka
Psalms38:11 Avbe osẹ kevbe ẹdogbo mwẹ i ghi sikẹ mwẹ
Psalms38:12 Iran ni ho ne iran gbe mwẹ uan
Psalms38:13 Te imẹ ye vbe ayin ehọ ne ẹi họn ẹmwẹ I ye vbe odin ne ẹi sẹtin guan.
Psalms38:14 I ye vbe ọmwa ne ọ ma khuẹnniẹn rhunmwuda ighẹ ọ yin ehọ.
Psalms38:15 Sokpan
Psalms38:16 Ghẹ gie avbe eghian ye igiogio gbe usẹ ne ọ sẹ mwẹ. Ghẹ gie iran ye udemwẹ mwẹ gha rhuọ.
Psalms38:17 Te I ghi ra de
Psalms38:18 Imiẹn orukhọ mwẹ kue
Psalms38:19 Egbe rran avbe eghian mwẹ iran vbe wegbe
Psalms38:20 Iran ni ya ọkhọ san ẹse mu aro igbinna da mwẹ rhunmwuda
Psalms38:21 Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms38:22 Do yọmwobọ nian
Psalms39:1 Mẹ khare wẹẹ
Psalms39:2 Mẹ wa hunwan
Psalms39:3 Ohawa keghi gbe mwẹ fi otọ vbene I ya muẹn ro
Psalms39:4 “Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms39:5 A miẹn vbene u ru ẹdẹ agbọn mwẹ kanmwa hẹ! Ẹdagbọn mwẹ i zẹdẹ mwẹ esa vba aro ruẹ. Vbẹmwata ọmwa nagbọn ma vbe sẹẹ
Psalms39:6 Ọ ma vbe gberra aghọnghọn
Psalms39:7 Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms39:8 Miẹn mwẹ fan vbe obọ orukhọ mwẹ hia ghẹ vbe gie avbe akpa ya mwẹ gha gbogiẹ.
Psalms39:9 I gha hẹko hunwan
Psalms39:10 Ghẹ ghi rriọmwẹ oya sẹ ọna. Te avbe emwi ne u fi mwẹ re ghi ra gbe mwẹ uan.
Psalms39:11 Ẹzọ ne u gu ọmwa gui
Psalms39:12 Họn erhunmwu mwẹ Nọyaẹnmwa ne u vbe rhie ehọ ye eve mwẹ larre ne u do yọmwẹ obọ vbe I a gha viẹ. Ẹghẹ kherhe ọ re I mwẹ ne I gha ya vbe ehe ne u ye. Zẹ vbene avbe erha mwẹ odede vbe ye.
Psalms39:13 Rhie obọ hin mwẹ ẹkun rre
Psalms40:1 I hẹko ya izin egbe mudia khẹ iyobọ e Nọyaẹnmwa rẹn keghi danmwehọ
Psalms40:2 Ọ si mwẹ ke uwu uye dan ladian hin uwu odin amẹ ekhae ne ọ gbe ọmwa an. Ọ mu mwẹ mudia yan uhunmwu okuta vbe ne ai na mwẹ ẹbe
Psalms40:3 Ọ ma mwẹ ihuan ọgbọn ne I gha so ihuan urhomwẹ ghe Osanobua mwa. Emwa nibun gha miẹn ọna wan
Psalms40:4 Afiangbe ọrọre ọghe iran ni mu ẹtin yan e Nọyaẹnmwa ni ma gbee ghe ọghe ẹbọ ra ne iran kegbe ba iran ni ga ẹbọ ohoghe.
Psalms40:5 U ru emwi nibun ne ima nẹ Nọyaẹnmwa Osanobua mwa; ọmwa ne ọ yevbe uwẹ rrọọ! Emwamwa ọyunnuan nibun ọ re u ru ye otọ khẹ ima. Mẹ ira sẹtin talọ ehia iran mobọ bun ẹsẹsẹmwẹse.
Psalms40:6 Wẹ ẹi gualọ ese ra imuohan; u ma vbe nọ aranmwẹ ne a giẹn ọ re ohoho vbe aka ra ne a ya zọese ne ọ kpe orukhọ kua. Sokpan
Psalms40:7 Rhunmwuda ọnii
Psalms40:8 U miẹn vbe iho ruẹ ne a ru yẹ mwẹ hẹ Osanobua mwẹ! I rhie iruẹmwi ruẹn ye uwu ekhọe mwẹ.”
Psalms40:9 Vbe ehe ne avbe emwa ruẹn na si koko Nọyaẹnmwa mẹ keghi na iyẹn nọma ni wẹ
Psalms40:10 Mẹ ma rhie iyẹn imiẹnfan nii hinrre ne egbe mwẹ ọkpa
Psalms40:11 Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms40:12 Orueghe nibun lẹga mwẹ ọ bun gbe
Psalms40:13 Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms40:14 Te obọ gha ke ukhunmwu ne iran ni ho ne iran gbe mwẹ uan te iro gha han iran. Iran ni ghọghọ ye ọlọghọmwa ne I ye
Psalms40:15 Iran ni ya mwẹ gbogiẹ te obọ gha vba iran ne iran gha ghe gbọọ.
Psalms40:16 Iran hia ni bu ruẹ rre te iran gha ghọghọ ne iran vbe gha sẹ ọyẹnmwẹ te iran hia ni kpọnmwẹ ye imiẹnfan ruẹn gha kha wẹẹ
Psalms40:17 Ovbiogue kevbe nọ ma wegbe ọ re imẹ khin Nọyaẹnmwa. Sokpan
Psalms41:1 Afiangbe nọ ne ọmwa ne ọ mu ọghe ovbiogue ro; e Nọyaẹnmwa gha ye iran obọ vbe ẹghẹ ibaro.
Psalms41:2 E Nọyaẹnmwa gha degue iran vbe rhie ẹdagbọn iran lẹre. Ọ gha ya ekhọe iran gha rhiẹnrhiẹn vbe otọe nii rẹn i ra vbe sẹ iran rae ye obọ ẹtin avbe eghian iran.
Psalms41:3 Nọyaẹnmwa gha rhie iran lẹre vbe ẹghẹ egbe ne ọ ma rran ọ ghi vbe mu iran egbe rran.
Psalms41:4 Mẹ khare wẹẹ
Psalms41:5 Avbe eghian mwẹ wa guan ẹmwẹ dan vbe ekpa mwẹ; iran ho ne I wu kevbe ne I vbe khian ne a mianmiaẹn.
Psalms41:6 Iran ne ọ do gha tuẹ mwẹ i vbe re emwa ekhọe esi. Iran gha do ye ehọ viọ iyẹn dan nẹ vbe ekpa mwẹ
Psalms41:7 Iran ni khuiwu mwẹ hia gha ta ewẹwẹwẹ ma egbe vbe ekpa mwẹ iro dan ne ọ ghi rhia sẹ ọ re iran zẹ vbe ekpa mwẹ.
Psalms41:8 Iran ghi wẹẹ
Psalms41:9 Uhin wẹ osẹ mwẹ ne ọ sikẹ mwẹ sẹẹ
Psalms41:10 Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms41:11 Obọ iran i ra ke ukhunmwu mẹ
Psalms41:12 U gha yọmwẹ obọ rhunmwuda
Psalms41:13 Wa rho e Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms42:1 Vbene ẹrhuẹ yan gualọ ẹzẹ amẹ ne ọ furre
Psalms42:2 Ohanmwẹ amẹ ruẹn gbe mwẹ
Psalms42:3 Asọn kevbe avan ọ re I ya viẹ egbe
Psalms42:4 I gha ye ẹghẹ ne ọ gberra rre
Psalms42:5 Vbọzẹ yi ne ekhọe mwẹ na rhia vbenian? Vbọzẹ ne orhiọn mwẹ ma na sẹ otọ? I gha hẹnhẹn idaehọ mwẹ yan Osanobua I gha vbe dọlegbe rho ẹre ọmiọnmwafan mwẹ kevbe Osanobua mwẹ.
Psalms42:6 Te udu mwẹ ghi ra kpaẹn vbe ehe ne I na rre iwe rhunmwuda ọnii
Psalms42:7 
Psalms42:8 E Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms42:9 Mẹ tama Nọyaẹnmwa ne ọ gbinna mẹ wẹẹ

Psalms43:1 Osanobua
Psalms43:2 Wẹ ọ re ọ degue mwẹ
Psalms43:3 Gie uwanmwẹ ruẹn
Psalms43:4 Ẹghẹ nii
Psalms43:5 Vbọzẹ yi ne ekhọe mwẹ na rhia vbenian vbọzẹ ne orhiọn mwẹ ma na sotọ I gha hẹnhẹn idaehọ mwẹ yan Osanobua I gha vbe dọlegbe rho ẹre ọmiọnmwafan mwẹ Osanobua mwẹ.
Psalms44:1 Osanobua
Psalms44:2 Vbene u tobọọ khulo avbe nigẹbọ ladian hẹ u na gbe avbe emwa ruẹn ẹkun sotọ ye otọe iran. vbene u rri avbe agbọn ẹvbo nekpa oya hẹ. u na gie agbọn ma iran ne emwa ruẹn.
Psalms44:3 Ẹ i re umozo iran
Psalms44:4 Wẹ ọrọre ọba mwẹ kevbe Osanobua mwẹ wẹ ọ re ọ rhie akhọnmiotọ ne emwa ruẹn.
Psalms44:5 Ẹtin ruẹn ọ re ima ya khọn eghian mwa muotọ.
Psalms44:6 Mẹ ma mu ẹtin yan uhanbọ mwẹ ra umozo mwẹ ne ọ miẹn mwẹ fan;
Psalms44:7 sokpan
Psalms44:8 Ma gha rho ruẹ vbe ẹghẹ hia ma ghi vbe gha rhie ekpọnmwẹ nuẹn rhinrin ẹdẹ.
Psalms44:9 Sokpan
Psalms44:10 U gie ima lẹ ne avbe eghian mwa iran keghi viọ emwi ni te re ọghe ima
Psalms44:11 U gie iran lọkọ ima an zẹvbe ohuan u zagha ima kua lele ẹvbo ẹrrẹe.
Psalms44:12 U khiẹnnẹ emwa ruẹn ọpuẹkẹ kua vbene a miẹn wẹ ive tunnẹ ọre u tie ye iran uhunmwu.
Psalms44:13 Avbe ẹdogbo mwa
Psalms44:14 U ya ima khian emwi igbogiẹ vbe uwu ẹbu agbọn ẹvbo nibun iran gha fieghe uhunmwu iran da ima vbe ọghe ozan.
Psalms44:15 Uwu efaa ọ re I ye vbe ẹghẹ hia ekhue gba mwẹ egbe hia.
Psalms44:16 Vbe I gha miẹn ihue ozan ne iran vin yọmwẹ akhọe; ighe avbe eghian mwẹ kevbe iran ni khuiwu mwẹ.
Psalms44:17 Ena hia ọ re ọ sunu vbe egbe mwa a gha rhe miẹn ighe ma ma mianmian an ra ne ima rra ile ne u gu ima ta.
Psalms44:18 Ma ma he fi owẹ dọn ghe ruẹ ma ma he rra iyi ne u yi.
Psalms44:19 Sevba
Psalms44:20 Adeghẹ te ima dobọ Osanobua mwa ne a ga yi
Psalms44:21 wẹ gha wa gualọ ẹe miẹn nẹ
Psalms44:22 Sokpan
Psalms44:23 Rhiọrre
Psalms44:24 Vbua ghi na rhie aro lẹre ne ima hẹ yi? Ghẹ mianmian oya kevbe ukpokpo mwa.
Psalms44:25 Ma dele a keghi lọkọ ima ginna otọ ma lovbiẹ ye uwu ebubẹ ne a gbele ima yi.
Psalms44:26 Gha dee do yi ima obọ rhunmwuda ahoẹmwọmwa ruẹn ne ẹ i beghe miẹn mwa fan.
Psalms45:1 Ẹmwẹ ni rhiẹnrhiẹn wa vuọn ekhọe mwẹ
Psalms45:2 Wẹ ọ re ọ ghi mose sẹ vbe uwu avbe ikpia hia ọmwa ne ẹmwẹ ma ẹre unu ọre u khin. Te Osanobua wa fiangbe uẹ vbe ẹghẹ hia.
Psalms45:3 Rro umozo ruẹ mu ẹkun
Psalms45:4 Gha hin ẹsin khian vbe ọba ne u ya khọnmiotọ
Psalms45:5 Ifẹnmwẹ ruẹn wa mu
Psalms45:6 Arriọba ne Osanobua mu ne uẹn
Psalms45:7 Wẹ ho ẹmwẹ emwi ne ọgbae u keghi khuiwu emwi ne ẹ i maa ọnii ọ re ọ siẹe ne Osanobua awẹ Osanobua ruẹ na hannọ uẹn zẹ ọ na ya ọyẹnmwẹ wẹ uẹ sẹẹ avbe ọba nekpa hia.
Psalms45:8 Uwinhinmwẹ oziya kevbe alọe rre ukpọn ruẹn; avbe ikpezikẹn ghi gha ku ne uẹn ghe
Psalms45:9 Avbe ivbiọba nikhuo rre avbe ikhuo ni rre ẹrriẹ ruẹ amwẹ ọba vbe mudia ye obọ erha ọmwa ẹkete ruẹ
Psalms45:10 Ovbiọha ọba
Psalms45:11 Ose ruẹ gha ya ọba ho ẹmwẹ ruẹn
Psalms45:12 Ivbi e Taia gha ha oko guẹ
Psalms45:13 Ovbi ọba nokhuo rre uwu ẹguae
Psalms45:14 A rhie ẹre gha rriẹ ẹguae kẹe kevbe ẹwu ẹre ne mose mose. Iran ne eguọmwadia ẹre nikhuo vbe lele ẹe a kevbe viọ iran bu ẹre gha dee.
Psalms45:15 Iran hia keghi la uwu ẹguae ọba vbe oghọghọ kevbe ọyẹnmwẹ.
Psalms45:16 Wẹ ne ọba mwẹ u gha biẹlẹ emọ ikpia nibun ni gha rri ọba lele avbe erha a odede
Psalms45:17 Ihuan mwẹ gha gie otiti ruẹ gha rrọ rhinrin ẹdẹ emwa hia ghi vbe gha rho ruẹ vbe ẹghẹ hia ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ.
Psalms46:1 Osanobua ọrọre ugue kevbe ẹtin mwa
Psalms46:2 rhunmwuda ọnii
Psalms46:3 Ọ gha khọn okun ne ọ gha hu ne ọ vbe gha gbinna ne utuamwẹ ọnrẹn mu avbe oke rueghe.
Psalms46:4 Ẹzẹ ọkpa rrọ ne ọ rhie oghọghọ rri ẹvbo Osanobua
Psalms46:5 Osanobua rre ẹvbo nii
Psalms46:6 Ohan mu avbe okpẹvbo a vbe mu avbe otọ arriọba rueghe; Osanobua van avan otọ agbọn keghi ranran an.
Psalms46:7 E Nọyaẹnmwa ne Oghodua gu ima rrọọ Osanobua Jekọb ọrọre ugue ne ima.
Psalms46:8 Wa larre ne uwa do ghe
Psalms46:9 Ọ dobọ okuo yi vbe uhunmwu otọ agbọn hia ọ bunnọ avbe uhanbọ ọ vbiolo avbe asoro ọ keghi vbe giẹn avbe asa a vbe erhẹn.
Psalms46:10 Rẹn keghi kha wẹẹ
Psalms46:11 E Nọyaẹnmwa ne Oghodua rrọ yaba mwa Osanobua Jekọb ọrọre ugue mwa.
Psalms47:1 Wa hia ya oghọghọ kpe obọ wa ne emwa hia
Psalms47:2 E Nọyaẹnmwa ne Ne ọ yo sẹẹ Ehia ọmwa ne a mu ohan rẹn nọ; ọba nọkhua ọ re nọ
Psalms47:3 Ọ gie ima khọnmiotọ vbe uhunmwu avbe emwa nii: ọ ya ima gha khaemwisẹ yan avbe uhunmwu ẹvbo.
Psalms47:4 Rẹn ọ re ọ zẹ otọe ne ima ye ne ima
Psalms47:5 Osanobua hin ẹkete ẹre gha khian. Uwemwẹ oghọghọ rrọ deba okpe ne a kpee vbe ẹghẹ ne Nọyaẹnmwa na gha hin khian.
Psalms47:6 Wa so ihuan urhomwẹ ghe Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms47:7 Osanobua ọrọre ọba uhunmwu otọ agbọn hia wa so ihuan rho ẹre!
Psalms47:8 Osanobua miẹndia vbe ẹkete ẹre ne ọ huanrẹn
Psalms47:9 Iran ni khaemwisẹ avbe agbọn ẹvbo si koko deba emwa Osanobua Ebraham rẹn ọ re ọ mwẹ ẹtin sẹẹ avbe ivbiyokuo hia rẹn ọkpa ọ khaemwisẹ vbe ehe ne ọ yo sẹẹ ehia.
Psalms48:1 E Nọyaẹnmwa kpọlọ ne avbe kakabọ rho ọre nọ vbe ẹvbo Osanobua mwa; vbe uhunmwu oke ne ọ huanrẹn ọghọe.
Psalms48:2 E Zaiọn ne oke Osanobua oke ne ọ yo kevbe ne ọ mose nọ ẹvbo ọba nọkhua
Psalms48:3 Osanobua rhiema nẹ wẹ rẹn sẹe ne a lẹ gbinna vbe uwu ehe ne a gbe odin lẹga ọghe ẹvbo nọkhua nii.
Psalms48:4 Avbe ọba sii koko iran keghi mu okuo gha die Oke Zaiọn.
Psalms48:5 Sokpan
Psalms48:6 Evba ọ re oguozizi kevbe irriakọn na dobọ mu iran ẹkun. Zẹvbe okhuo ne emwi ubiẹmwẹ ru.
Psalms48:7 Zẹvbe okọ ne ogbigbi ẹhoho bi yo bi rre vbe uhunmwu ẹzẹ.
Psalms48:8 Ma ka họn emwi ne Osanobua ru nẹ banbanna nian aro mwa sẹ ọe vbe ẹvbo Osanobua mwa. E Nọyaẹnmwa ne Oghodua; ọ gha rhie ẹvbo ni lẹre ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ vbe ne ẹi na mwẹ ẹbe.
Psalms48:9 Vbe uwu Ọgua Osa Nọyaẹnmwa ma mu ẹmwẹ ahoẹmwọmwa ruẹn ne ẹi beghe ro.
Psalms48:10 Ehe hia ọ re emwa na rho ruẹ otiti ruẹ vbe gba otọ agbọn hia ẹmwata ọ re u ya khaemwisẹ.
Psalms48:11 Wa gie ẹko iran ni rre Zaiọn gha rhiẹnrhiẹn! Ohiẹn ẹmwata ọ re uwẹ bu
Psalms48:12 Wa ne emwa Osanobua wa khian lẹga e Zaiọn
Psalms48:13 Wa gbe aro kotọ ghe ekẹn ne a gbe vbọ ne uwa vbe kakabọ ghe avbe odin ni rrọọ ne uwa miẹn ehe na miẹn iyẹn ọnrẹn na ma orre ne ọ dee wẹẹ
Psalms48:14 “Osanobua na Osanobua ima nọ ẹdẹ kevbe ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ rẹn ọ re ọ ra gha su ima khian ke orre yasẹ orre.”
Psalms49:1 Dọmwadẹ ọghọe
Psalms49:2 Ne ọ kpọlọ kevbe ne ọ kanmwa
Psalms49:3 Iro mwẹ gha dinmwi
Psalms49:4 I gha mu aro ye ẹmwẹ itan
Psalms49:5 Ohan i mu mwẹ vbe ẹghẹ ẹbe
Psalms49:6 Kevbe avbe emwa dan ni mu ẹtin yan ẹfe ne iran na vbe ya ẹfe iran ghagha.
Psalms49:7 Ọmwa ọkpa ne ọ gha sẹtin dẹ egbe ẹre werriegbe i rrọọ. Ẹ i sẹtin ha osa ive orhiọn rẹn werriegbe ne Osanobua.
Psalms49:8 Rhunmwuda
Psalms49:9 Ne ọ gha na wẹ ne ọ ghẹ ghi la idin ne ọ vbe gha rre agbọn ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ.
Psalms49:10 Aro emwa hia sẹ ọe wẹ avbe umẹwaẹn vbe wulo zẹ vbene akpa vbe abobo vbe ye
Psalms49:11 Idin iran ọrọre owa etẹbitẹ iran
Psalms49:12 U kpọlọ mwẹ ọmwa i sẹtin ya uwu la ọmwa ban te ọ ra ye wu zẹvbe avbe aranmwẹ oha.
Psalms49:13 Ghe emwi ne ọ rruan iran ni mu ẹtin yan egbe iran ne a zẹ khẹ iran ne ẹfe ẹre sẹ ọre ọkẹn.
Psalms49:14 A tae nẹ ighe te iran ra wulo zẹvbe ohuan
Psalms49:15 Sokpan
Psalms49:16 Ghẹ gie iro han ruẹn vbe ọmwa ọkpa a fe.
Psalms49:17 Ọ gha wu
Psalms49:18 Gie a kha wẹ te agbọn na kue sẹ ọmwa ọkpa ọkẹn a na gha tian rẹn rhunmwuda ighe ọ dunna ne ẹẹn.
Psalms49:19 Ọ gha vbe ya deba enikaro vbe uwu idin ehe ne ebiebi na so ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ.
Psalms49:20 Ukpọlọmwẹ ọmwa i sẹtin ya uwu la ọmwa ban

Psalms50:2 E Nọyaẹnmwa wan uwanmwẹ

Psalms50:7 “Wa danmwehọ

Psalms50:12 “Deghẹ ohanmwẹ gbe mwẹ

Psalms50:15 Ibaro gha rre
Psalms50:16 Sokpan
Psalms50:17 Wa wẹ wa i kue ne I dia uwa

Psalms50:19 “Ẹghẹ hia wa ya mu egbe ne uwa ya ta ẹmwẹ dan ohoghe ne a ta i vbe kan uwa aro.
Psalms50:20 Wa mu egbe ne uwa ya ba ọtẹn uwa ifi ẹzọ
Psalms50:21 Wa ru avbe emwi na hia mẹ keghi hunwan kpọi wa keghi rhunmwuda ọnii gha ro wẹ
Psalms50:22 “Wa danmwehọ ẹmwẹ na wa ni ma zẹ ye ogho mwẹ ne I ghẹ fuẹn uwa a a i vbe miẹn ọmwa ne ọ gha miẹn uwa fan.
Psalms50:23 Ekpọnmwẹ ọrọre ese ne ọ rhie ọghọ mẹ
Psalms51:1 Tohan mwẹ Osanobua rhunmwuda ahoẹmwọmwa ruẹn ne ẹ i beghe rhunmwuda itohan ruẹn ne ọ kpolo khiẹn orukhọ mwẹ nibun hin rre.
Psalms51:2 Khuẹ emwi dan mwẹ hia kua ne u vbe khuẹ mwẹ huan hin orukhọ mwẹ rre.
Psalms51:3 Mẹ miẹn abakuru mwẹ hia kue; ẹghẹ hia ọ re I ya mu ẹmwẹ orukhọ mwẹ ro.
Psalms51:4 I rukhọ ghe ruẹ nẹ
Psalms51:5 Emwi dan ọ re I wa khin
Psalms51:6 Ekhọe ne ọ diae kevbe ẹmwata; ọ re uwẹ ho
Psalms51:7 Khiẹn orukhọ mwẹ hin rre mẹ gha huan
Psalms51:8 Gunmwẹ họn urhu oghọghọ kevbe ọyẹnmwẹ a gha rhe miẹn ighẹ u lọkọ mwẹ u vbe rẹnkhẹn mwẹ uan nẹ
Psalms51:9 Rhie aro hin orukhọ mwẹ rre
Psalms51:10 Yi orhiọn ne ọ huanrẹn ye uwu imẹ Osanobua

Psalms53:1 Avbe akpa ghi gha ye ekhọe ta ẹe wẹẹ Osanobua i rrọ; te iran hia wa kulo iran keghi vbe ru emwi ne ọ mu ohan okpa ne ọ ru emwi ne ọ gbae i rrọ.
Psalms53:2 Osanobua ke odukhunmwu ghe emwa nagbọn ne ọ ghe a deghẹ ọ gha miẹn ọkpa ne ọ gbae.

Psalms53:6 Erhunmwu mwẹ ọrọre wẹ
Psalms54:1 Ya ẹtin ruẹn miẹn mwẹ fan Osanobua ya iwegbe ruẹ rhan mwẹ ye otọ.
Psalms54:2 Họn erhunmwu mwẹ Osanobua; rhie ehọ ye ẹmwẹ ne I guan!
Psalms54:3 Iran ni tọn egbe mu dee ra do gunmwẹ gbinna avbe emwa dan ho ne iran gbe mwẹ uan iran ne ẹ i vbe zẹ ye ọghe Osanobua hiehiere.

Psalms54:5 Te Osanobua gha ya emwi dan iran

Psalms55:1 Họn erhunmwu mwẹ Nọyaẹnmwa

Psalms55:8 Te I gha zẹgiẹgiẹ kpao

Psalms55:17 Owiẹ

Psalms56:1 Osanobua tohan mwẹ rhunmwuda
Psalms56:2 Iran ni mu aro igbinna da mwẹ wa gunmwẹ khọn ne ebi ro. Iran ni gunmwẹ khọn wa bun ẹsẹse.
Psalms56:3 E Nọyaẹnmwa ne Oghodua ohan gha mu mwẹ I mu ẹtin yan ruẹn.
Psalms56:4 Mẹ mu ẹtin yan Osanobua ohan ighi mu mwẹ. Mẹ rho ẹre
Psalms56:5 Avbe eghian ghi ho mwẹ ẹmwẹ ne ebi ro
Psalms56:6 Iran ghi ya si koko ye ẹkhokho
Psalms56:7 Osanobua
Psalms56:8 Wẹ rẹn vbene obọ orueghe da mwẹ sẹ hẹ
Psalms56:9 Ẹdẹ ne I gha kpe tie ruẹ avbe eghian mwẹ gha lẹ werriegbe mẹ rẹn ọnọna wẹ
Psalms56:10 e Nọyaẹnmwa ni ne imẹ go wan eyan rẹn.
Psalms56:11 Rẹn ọ re I mu ẹtin yan ohan i ra mu mwẹ de emwi ne ọmwa kẹkan gha sẹtin ru mwẹ re?
Psalms56:12 Osanobua mẹ gha ha emwi ne imẹ ve ne uẹn mẹ gha viọ emwi imuohan ọghe ekpọnmwẹ mwẹ nuẹn.
Psalms56:13 Rhunmwuda u wọlọ mwẹ ladian vbe uwu uwu u ma gie obọ gba mwẹ rhunmwuda ọnii ọ re imẹ na khian vbe odaro Osanobua vbe uwu uwanmwẹ ne ọ wan mu emwa ni rre agbọn.

Psalms58:5 Ne ẹ i họn vbe ọmwa ne ọ ta ẹyẹn ohun
Psalms58:6 Guọghọ akọn avbe oduma ni khọ na

Psalms59:1 Osanobua mwẹ miẹn mwẹ fan vbe obọ avbe eghian mwẹ degue mwẹ hin obọ iran ni gunmwẹ gbinna.
Psalms59:2 Miẹn mwẹ fan vbe obọ avbe emwa dan nii
Psalms59:3 Ghe! Iran ghae ye odẹ ne iran gbe mwẹ uan. Avbe emwa dan gha si uma ga mwẹ
Psalms59:4 Ra rhunmwuda ama ru ẹse mwẹ Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms59:5 Kpaegbe Nọyaẹnmwa ne Oghodua ne u yọmwẹ obọ to bọọ gie aro ruẹe sẹ ọe Osanobua Izrẹl. Rhiọrre
Psalms59:6 Iran ghi dọlegbe rre vbe ota iran ghi gha gbọ vbe awa vbe iran a gha la ẹvbo khian.
Psalms59:7 Gha họn vbene iran tie ihẹn kevbe vbene iran vbe yanma hẹ. Aranmwẹ iran yevbe umozo vbe unu iran. Sevba te iran ye ro wẹ

Psalms59:10 Osanobua mwẹ ho ẹmwẹ mwẹ

Psalms60:1 Osanobua
Psalms60:2 U mu otọe nii rueghe
Psalms60:3 U gie avbe emwa ruẹn rrioya ẹsẹsẹmwẹse; te ima ghi ye owẹ ba otọ ku khian vbe ọmwa ne ayọn gbe.
Psalms60:4 U bu iran ni ye ọghọ ne uẹn ude ne iran miẹn ehe na fe vbe obọ a bu ohiẹn gbe ọmwa.
Psalms60:5 Ya ẹtin ruẹn miẹn mwa fan
