Psalms60:7 Ọghomwẹ ọre Giliad khin
Psalms60:8 Sokpan I gha ye Moab ru uwawa akhuẹ mwẹ I gha vbe bannọ ibata mwẹ yan Idọm ne I ya rhie ma ighe mẹ ọ re ọ yan rẹn. Te avbe Filistin ro ighe iran gha we uwemwẹ akhọnmiotọ yan mwẹ ra?”
Psalms60:9 Osanobua de ọmwa ne ọ gha rhie mwẹ gha rriẹ ẹvbo ne a gbe odin ga nii? De ọmwa ne ọ gha ma mwẹ odẹ gha rriẹ Idọm?
Psalms60:10 Te u gele wa he ima ye otọ ra? Wẹ i ghi ra lele iyokuo mwa ladian ra?
Psalms60:11 Yi ima obọ gu avbe eghian ni gbinna; kẹkan ọ re iyobọ ọmwa nagbọn khin.
Psalms60:12 Osanobua deba mwa
Psalms61:1 Họn eve mwẹ Osanobua rhie ehọ ye erhunmwu mwẹ.
Psalms61:2 Vbe uwu idaehọ fo
Psalms61:3 rhunmwuda
Psalms61:4 Gun mwẹ gha rre owa ne ọ huanrẹn ruẹn
Psalms61:5 Osanobua wẹ họn eyan ne I yan rẹn nẹ
Psalms61:6 Fian ukpo nibun ba ẹdagbọn ọba
Psalms61:7 Gi ẹe gha khaemwisẹ vbe Siria ruẹ ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ. Osanobua ya iho ruẹ ne ẹ i beghe
Psalms61:8 Erriọ I gha so ihuan urhomwẹ ghe ruẹ vbe I a gha viọ emwi ne I ve ye urhu guẹ ẹdẹgbegbe.
Psalms62:1 I hẹko ya izin egbe mudia khẹ Osanobua ne ọ do miẹn mwẹ fan. Rẹn okpa kẹkan ọre I mu ẹtin yan.
Psalms62:2 Rẹn okpa kẹkan ọre ọ degue mwẹ ọ vbe miẹn mwẹ fan obọ ọmwa i ra gba mwẹ ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ.
Psalms62:3 Inu ẹghẹ ọre uwa na hia ra ya gha gun orhunmwu okpa kẹkan khọn yi ọmwa ne ọ ma ghi wegbe sẹ ogha ne ọ guọghọ gbotọ nẹ?
Psalms62:4 Te uwa ho ne uwa siẹe guọ
Psalms62:5 Osanobua okpa ọ re I ya egbe yan idaehọ mwẹ vbe rre ọghọe.
Psalms62:6 Rẹn okpa kẹkan ọ re ọ degue mwẹ ne ọ vbe miẹn mwẹ fan obọ ọmwa i ra gha mwẹ ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ.
Psalms62:7 Osanobua ọ re imiẹnfan mwẹ kevbe uyi mwẹ hẹnhẹn egbe yan; rẹn ọrọre ugue mwẹ ne ọ wegbe
Psalms62:8 Wa ne emwa mwẹ
Psalms62:9 Te emwa yevbe uhiọnrọnmwẹ ihue
Psalms62:10 Ghẹ mu ẹtin yan uyimwẹ ika ghẹ rhie aro ye ere vbe oyi ne a rha
Psalms62:11 Ọ gberra uhukpa ne I he họn ẹn vbe Osanobua khare wẹ rẹn ọ re ọ yan ẹtin.
Psalms62:12 Kevbe wẹ aho irẹn i beghe. Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms63:1 Osanobua
Psalms63:2 Gun mwẹ bẹghe ruẹ vbe uwu owa ne ọ huanrẹn nii
Psalms63:3 Aho ruẹ ne ẹ i beghe maa sẹ arrọọ tobọre rhunmwuda ọnii mẹ gha rho ruẹ.
Psalms63:4 I gha rhie ekpọnmwẹ nuẹn vbe ẹghẹ ne I gha tọn obọ mwẹ mu na erhunmwu ghe ruẹ.
Psalms63:5 Orhiọn mwẹ gha rri evbare ẹko ghi vbe vuọẹn I gha so ihuan urhomwẹ oghọghọ ghe ruẹ.
Psalms63:6 I gha lovbiẹ vbe ukpo mwẹ
Psalms63:7 Rhunmwuda
Psalms63:8 I sikan mu uwẹ obọ ruẹ keghi rhie mwẹ lẹre vbe a i mwẹ ẹbe.
Psalms63:9 Iran ni ho ne iran gbe mwẹ uan gha tuorre fi agbọn iran ni wulo nẹ.
Psalms63:10 A gha gbele iran vbe okuo oduma ghi rri ikun iran.
Psalms63:11 Ọba gha ghọghọ rhunmwuda Osanobua gie ẹe khọnmiotọ
Psalms64:1 Osanobua
Psalms64:2 Miẹn mwẹ fan vbe obọ iro dan avbe emwa dan kevbe hin obọ otu ọkhọ.
Psalms64:3 Iran lọ aranmwẹ iran zẹvbe umozo iran kegha ya ẹmwẹ ọkhọ kọn ọmwa zẹvbe ifẹnmwẹ.
Psalms64:4 Obọ wa kẹ iran vbe ohoghe ifavbaro iran ne iran vẹvẹ. Iran ya ọtakhọ ọyẹvbu iran fuẹn emwa esi ua.
Psalms64:5 Iran ghi gha yi egbe ike vbe uma dan ne iran si
Psalms64:6 Iran gha si uma dan nẹ iran ghi kha wẹẹ
Psalms64:7 Sokpan
Psalms64:8 Ọ gha fuẹn iran an rhunmwuda avbe ẹmwẹ ne iran ta nii
Psalms64:9 Ohan gha mu iran hia iran ghi gha mu iwinna Osanobua roro iran ghi vbe gha na iyẹn emwi ne ọ ru.
Psalms64:10 Emwa ẹmwata hia gha ghọghọ ye iwinna ne Nọyaẹnmwa winna ẹn. Iran gha ya lẹgbinna ẹẹn
Psalms65:1 Osanobua
Psalms65:2 Rhunmwuda ne u na họn erhunmwu
Psalms65:3 Abakuru mwa munọ ima gbotọ
Psalms65:4 Afiangbe ọrọre ọghe iran ne uwẹ hannọ zẹ
Psalms65:5 Wẹ rhie ewanniẹn ma vbekpa ne u na gie ima khọnmiotọ u keghi winna iwinna ọyunnuan nibun ya miẹn ima fan. Emwa ni rre otọ agbọn hia kevbe iyeke avbe okun ni rrei mu ẹtin yan ruẹn.
Psalms65:6 Ẹtin ruẹn ọ re u ya munọ avbe oke ye ihe iran
Psalms65:7 U dọ uhumwẹ avbe okun yọ
Psalms65:8 Otagbọn hia mudia yan unu uan gha ghe iwinna nọkhua ne uwẹ winnaẹn. Iwinna ruẹn rhie uwemwẹ oghọghọ rre
Psalms65:9 U rhie maa vbene u gbe aro ghe otọe hẹ
Psalms65:10 U gie amẹ kakabọ rhọ ye ugbo ne a gua nẹ u kevbe gbe amẹ ya guagua ẹe ne ọ rọkhọ. U rhọ amẹ ye otọe nii ne ọ gha khuẹrhẹ u na vbe ru ẹe ne ivbi erhan zọ vbọ.
Psalms65:11 U miẹn vbe emwiokọ ne iruẹmwi ẹse ruẹ rhie ne emwa bun hẹ! Ọkpọkua ghi gha rre ehe ne u la ẹe hia.
Psalms65:12 Emwirri vuọn oha ne aranmwẹ na rria ọghuẹ oghọghọ vuọn ọkpẹn avbe oke nii hia.
Psalms65:13 Uwu ogba vuọn ne avbe ohuan avbe uye keghi vuọn ne ọka emwi hia gha datu iran vbe so ihuan oghọghọ.
Psalms66:1 Wa we uwemwẹ oghọghọ ya rho e Nọyaẹnmwa wa ne emwa hia.
Psalms66:2 Wa so ihuan uyi eni ẹnrẹn wa rhie urhomwẹ uyi ne ẹẹn.
Psalms66:3 Wa tama Osanobua wẹẹ
Psalms66:4 Emwa ni rre agbọn hia ọ re ọ ga a iran ghi gha so ihuan urhomwẹ ghe ruẹ iran ghi gha so ihuan urhomwẹ ghe eni ruẹn.”
Psalms66:5 Wa do ghe iwinna ne Osanobua winna ẹn
Psalms66:6 Ọ ye okun khian otọe ne ọ kae
Psalms66:7 Ẹtin ẹnrẹn ọ re ọ ya khaemwisẹ
Psalms66:8 Wa rho Osanobua mwa wa ne agbọn ẹvbo hia.
Psalms66:9 Rẹn ọ re ọ gie ima gha rre agbọn
Psalms66:10 Osanobua
Psalms66:11 U gie ima dele ye irri
Psalms66:12 U gie avbe eghian mwa ya owẹ rrilo mwa muotọ; ma la erhẹn kevbe uromwẹ amẹ gberra sokpan
Psalms66:13 I gha viọ ese ne a giẹn uan rriẹ owa ruẹ
Psalms66:14 Emwi ne I wẹ I gha viọ rre
Psalms66:15 I gha mu ohuan rre ne a giẹn ọnrẹn vbe ogiukpo I gha ya ẹmila kevbe ẹwe zọ ese
Psalms66:16 Wa danmwehọ wa hia ni ya ọghọ ne Osanobua mẹ gha vbe ta emwi ne ọ ru mẹ ma uwa.
Psalms66:17 I kpe tie ẹre wẹ ne ọ yọmwẹ obọ
Psalms66:18 Akpawẹ te I ma zẹ ye ẹmwẹ orukhọ mwẹ
Psalms66:19 Sokpan Osanobua gele họn ọghomwẹ nẹ
Psalms66:20 I rho Osanobua
Psalms67:1 Osanobua
Psalms67:2 Ne agbọn hia miẹn ehe na rẹn iho ruẹ ne agbọn na hia miẹn ehe na rẹn imiẹnfan ruẹn.
Psalms67:3 Gie emwa hia gha rho ruẹ Osanobua gie emwa hia gha rho ruẹ!
Psalms67:4 Gie agbọn ẹvbo hia gha ghọghọ
Psalms67:5 Gie emwa hia gha rho ruẹ Osanobua gie emwa hia gha rho ruẹ.
Psalms67:6 Otọe mọ umọmwẹ ọnrẹn ladian nẹ Osanobua
Psalms67:7 Osanobua fiangbe ima nẹ te emwa hia ni rre ehe hia gha ya ọghọ ne ẹẹn.
Psalms68:1 E Nọyaẹnmwa gua kpaegbe
Psalms68:2 Zẹ vbene a hoho ighogho kua
Psalms68:3 Sokpan
Psalms68:4 Wa so ihuan ghe Osanobua wa so ihuan urhomwẹ ghe eni ẹnrẹn
Psalms68:5 Osanobua ne ọ rre uwu Ọgua Osa ẹre nọhuanrẹn gbearoghe ọ re ọ gbearoghe avbe emọ ni i mwẹ erha rẹn ọ re ọ degue avbe ẹgbẹe.
Psalms68:6 Ọ rhie owa ne ọmwa ne ọ rre uwu ohioro dia
Psalms68:7 Osanobua
Psalms68:8 otọe mu rueghe
Psalms68:9 U gie amẹ kakabọ rhọ u keghi dọlọ otọe ruẹ ne ọ te fafaa yi.
Psalms68:10 Emwa ruẹn bọlọ owa iran ye evba
Psalms68:11 E Nọyaẹnmwa gie uhunmwu
Psalms68:12 Avbe ọba kevbe iyokuo iran lẹ rriẹ
Psalms68:13 Amazẹ idu ne a ya esiliva rhu ne ifuẹn ọnrẹn fi wainwain ne igoru. (Vbọzẹ ne eso vbe uwu uwa na gha rre uwu aza ohuan vbe ẹdẹ igbinna yi?)
Psalms68:14 Ẹghẹ ne Osanobua ne Oghodua na zagha avbe ọba kua vbe Zalmọn ọ keghi gie esia de ye evba.
Psalms68:15 U miẹn vbe oke Basian kpọlọ hẹ
Psalms68:16 Vbọzẹ ne u na ye otilua ke odukhunmwu oke ruẹ
Psalms68:17 E Nọyaẹnmwa tuorre ke Sainai gha dee ke irẹn kevbe ikẹkẹ okuo nekhua arriaisẹn inu ne ọ khin gha rrie uwu ehe ne ọ huanrẹn ọghọe.
Psalms68:18 Ọ hin odukhunmwu gha rriẹ ehe ne ọ yo ọ viọ avbe oghunmwu nibun mwẹ gha khian ọ keghi vbe miẹn emwi ihaoko
Psalms68:19 Wa rho e Nọyaẹnmwa ne ọ mu ihẹ mwa ẹdẹgbegbe rẹn ọrọre Osanobua ne ọ miẹn mwa fan.
Psalms68:20 Osanobua mwa Osanobua ne ọ miẹn ọmwa fan ọre nọ rẹn ọrọre Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms68:21 Ẹ i mwẹ Nọyaẹnmwa ma va iran ne eghian rẹn uhunmwu. Ọghe avbe iran ni wa rhie egbe ye ẹmwẹ orukhọ iran.
Psalms68:22 E Nọyaẹnmwa khare wẹẹ
Psalms68:23 Ne uwa miẹn ehe na tubu vbe uwu esagiẹn iran
Psalms68:24 Osanobua
Psalms68:25 Avbe ọsian ke odaro avbe ikpemaba keghi lele iran iyeke avbe ibiẹka ikhuo ni kpe isẹ keghi rre ẹkpo iran.
Psalms68:26 “Wa rho Osanobua vbe ehe ne avbe emwa rẹn ni do iko ye wa rho e Nọyaẹnmwa wa ne ivbi uniẹn ẹ Jekọb hia!”
Psalms68:27 E Bẹnjamin ne ẹwae ne ọ kanmwa sẹ ke odaro vbe iyekọnii
Psalms68:28 Osanobua
Psalms68:29 Ke Ọgua Osa ruẹ ne ọ rre Jerusalẹm gha dee
Psalms68:30 Gu ẹe gui ighe Igipt nii ne aranmwẹ ọkhọ ne ọ rre uwu irunmwu
Psalms68:31 Iran ne ukọ ẹvbo gha ke Igipt rre avbe ivbi e Sudan
Psalms68:32 Wa so ihuan ghe Osanobua wa ne otọe arriọba agbọn
Psalms68:33 Ghe irẹn nii ne ọ hin khian vbe iso ẹvbo nẹdẹ nii wa danmwehọ ẹre vbe ọ ya urhu ne ọ la davan.
Psalms68:34 Wa na iyẹn ẹtin Osanobua ladian ẹtin ọba ẹre keghi vbe rre iso.
Psalms68:35 Wẹ miẹn vbe Osanobua muohan hẹ vbe ọ die owa ẹre nọhuanrẹn Osanobua Izrẹl! Ọ rhie iwegbe kevbe ẹtin ne emwa rẹn! Wa rho e Nọyaẹnmwa!
Psalms69:1 Osanobua
Psalms69:2 Te I dinmwi ye uwu ọrho ne ọ dinmwi otọe ne ọ kae i rrọ
Psalms69:3 Egbe wọ mwẹ ne I ya tu nọ iyobọ
Psalms69:4 Iran ni khuiwu mwẹ vbe ne a i na mwẹ otọ bun sẹ eto ne uhunmwu mwẹ. Avbe eghian mwẹ mu ohoghe ba mwẹ
Psalms69:5 Osanobua
Psalms69:6 Ghẹ gun mwẹ ya ekhue mu iran ni mu ẹtin iran ya ruẹn
Psalms69:7 Rhunmwuda ruẹ ọ re a na tie ihẹn mẹ
Psalms69:8 Te I yevbe orhunmwuyẹn ne avbe etẹn mwẹ
Psalms69:9 Vbe ne I mu aro ye ẹmwẹ Ọgua Osa ruẹ hẹ giẹn vbe uwu imẹ zẹ vbe erhẹn
Psalms69:10 I yo aguẹ ya mu egbe mwẹ rriotọ
Psalms69:11 I viọ ukpọn akhiẹ ye egbe
Psalms69:12 Ẹmwẹ mwẹ iran ta khian vbe odẹ
Psalms69:13 Sokpan zẹ vbe ọghomwẹ
Psalms69:14 Miẹn mwẹ fan ne I ghẹ dinmwi ye uwu ọrho
Psalms69:15 Ghẹ gie amẹ ni lẹ rhu mwẹ
Psalms69:16 Rhie ewanniẹn mẹ Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms69:17 Ghẹ rhie egbe lẹre ne ọguọmwadia ruẹ
Psalms69:18 Bu mwẹ gha dee ne u do miẹn mwẹ fan
Psalms69:19 U rẹnrẹn vbene emwa rhovbiẹ mwẹ hẹ
Psalms69:20 Ihẹn ne iran tie ya ekhọe mwẹ rhia
Psalms69:21 Ẹghẹ ne ohanmwẹ na gha gbe mwẹ iran keghi rhie eruan mẹ
Psalms69:22 Te evbare eghọ iran
Psalms69:23 Rhu iran aro
Psalms69:24 Hihiẹ ohu ruẹ yan iran
Psalms69:25 Te agọ iran gha vẹ kua ai gha miẹn ọmwa ne ọ gha miẹn uhunmwu vbe owa ukpọn iran.
Psalms69:26 Iran keghi gha zẹ emwa ne uwẹ rri ọre oya kpokpo iran kegha na iyẹn emwa ne uwẹ kuanrẹn.
Psalms69:27 Gbẹnnẹ orukhọ iran hia yotọ ghẹ gie iran mwẹ oghae vbe imiẹnfan ruẹn.
Psalms69:28 Te a gha khiẹn eni iran hin ẹbe emwa ni rre agbọn rre; ai gha ka iran ba emwa ruẹn.
Psalms69:29 Sokpan
Psalms69:30 I gha so ihuan ya rho Osanobua I gha kpọnmwẹ ọẹn
Psalms69:31 Ọ na gha yẹ Nọyaẹnmwa sẹẹ ne I gha mu ẹmila ne ẹẹn
Psalms69:32 Iran ne a zẹ kpokpo gha miẹn ọna
Psalms69:33 E Nọyaẹnmwa danmwehọ iran ne ẹ i mwẹ
Psalms69:34 Wa rho Osanobua
Psalms69:35 Ọ gha miẹn Jerusalẹm fan
Psalms69:36 Iran ni ho ẹmwẹ ọnrẹn gha yin evba nii.
Psalms70:1 Osanobua
Psalms70:2 Te obọ gha vba iran ni ho ne iran gbe mwẹ uan ne iro han iran. Iran ni ghọghọ ye ọlọghọmwa mwẹ
Psalms70:3 Te obọ gha vba iran ni ya mwẹ gbogiẹ
Psalms70:4 Gie ẹko gha sẹ iran ni bu ruẹ rre ọyẹnmwẹ ne iran vbe gha ghọghọ. Te iran ni kpọnmwẹ ye imienfan ruẹn gha kha vbe ẹghẹ hia wẹẹ
Psalms70:5 Nọ ma wegbe kevbe ne ẹ i mwẹ ẹtin
Psalms71:1 Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms71:2 Rhunmwuda ighẹ ọmwata wẹ khin
Psalms71:3 Gha re ugue mwẹ ne ẹ i firaa
Psalms71:4 Osanobua mwẹ
Psalms71:5 Ọba Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms71:6 Wẹ ọ re I ya egbe yan vbe ẹdẹ agbọn mwẹ hia wẹ ọ re ọ degue mwẹ ke ẹdẹ ne a biẹ mwẹ gha dee. Mẹ gha rho ruẹ rhinrin ẹdẹ.
Psalms71:7 Ne a ghe ru
Psalms71:8 Te imẹ ra rho ruẹ ne ebi ro
Psalms71:9 Ghẹ he mwẹ ye otọ
Psalms71:10 Avbe eghian mwẹ ho ne iran gbe mwẹ uan
Psalms71:11 Iran wẹẹ
Psalms71:12 Ghẹ khian rrei Osanobua; Osanobua mwẹ
Psalms71:13 Te obọ gha gba iran ni gun mwẹ gbinna ne a fuẹn iran an. Te a gha ya ekhue mu iran
Psalms71:14 Mẹ gha mwẹ idaehọ
Psalms71:15 I gha na iyẹn umamwẹ ruẹn ne ebi ro I gha na iyẹn imiẹnfan ruẹn a gha rhe miẹn wẹ ọ gberra ne imẹ gha sẹtin rẹn otọ ẹre.
Psalms71:16 I gha rho ẹtin ruẹn
Psalms71:17 Ẹghẹ ne I na ye kherhe ọ re u na ma mwẹ re te I ye na iyẹn iwinna ọyunnuan.
Psalms71:18 Ugbẹn vbe I ghi khian ọmaẹn nẹ nian vbe I ghi fu edẹ
Psalms71:19 Osanobua
Psalms71:20 U si ọlọghọmwa kevbe usẹ yọmwẹ egbe
Psalms71:21 U gha ya mwẹ kpọlọ sẹ vbene I te ye ẹdẹ
Psalms71:22 I gha gele ye akpata rho ruẹ
Psalms71:23 I gha wee uwemwẹ oghọghọ vbe ẹghẹ ne I ya kpe emwi nuẹn I gha ya ẹtin mwẹ hia so ihuan
Psalms71:24 I gha na iyẹn umamwẹ ruẹn ne ebi ro
Psalms72:1 Osanobua
Psalms72:2 Ne ọ miẹn ehe na gha ya ẹmwata khaemwisẹ yan emwa ruẹn. Kevbe ne ọ vbe ya ẹmwata gha kha yan avbe emwa ne a zẹ kpokpo.
Psalms72:3 Te otọe nii gha miẹn ọmaa rhie vbene iran gha na gha mwẹ ẹfe te iran gha vbe mwẹ oghae ẹmwata.
Psalms72:4 Te ọba gha sẹtin gha bu ohiẹn ẹse ne avbe ivbiogue. Te ọ gha ru iyobọ ne ne ẹ i mwẹ ne obọ ẹre vbe gba avbe eghian iran.
Psalms72:5 Te emwa ruẹn gha ga a la ẹghẹ ne ovẹn vbe yunmwu la
Psalms72:6 Te ọba gha yevbe amẹ ne ọ rhọ ye ugbo
Psalms72:7 Te uyinmwẹ ẹmwata gha muan yọ vbe ẹghẹ ọre
Psalms72:8 Otọ arriọba ẹre gha ke okun ọkpa sẹ ọvbehe ke Yufretes kpao yasẹ ehe ne agbọn sẹe.
Psalms72:9 Iran ni rre ato
Psalms72:10 Avbe ọba e Spen kevbe iran ni rre otọ ne amẹ lẹga gha zẹ ẹfe gie ẹe. avbe ọba avbe Arrebia kevbe Etiopia gha viọ imuohan gie ẹe.
Psalms72:11 Avbe ọba hia gha vbẹrre vbe odaro ẹre; avbe agbọn ẹvbo hia gha ga ẹe.
Psalms72:12 Rẹn miẹn avbe ivbiogue
Psalms72:13 Ọ tohan iran ni ma wegbe kevbe ivbiogue
Psalms72:14 Ọ miẹn iran fan hin obọ
Psalms72:15 Ọba gha tọ ọ kpẹre! Te a gha ke Arebia viọ igoru gie ẹe. Ne a gha na erhunmwu nibun ne ẹẹn vbe ẹghẹ hia. Te afiangbe Osanobua gha rre ọ re uhunmwu vbe ẹghẹ hia!
Psalms72:16 Te evbare gha kpọ vbe otọe nii; te emwiokọ gha gha uhunmwu oke hia ne iran gha mọ zẹ vbe ọghe Lebanọn. Te emwa gha gba ore ẹvbo hia
Psalms72:17 Ai ghẹ mianmian eni ọba ẹdẹ te otiti ẹre gha tọ zẹvbe owẹn
Psalms72:18 Wa rho e Nọyaẹnmwa ne Osanobua Izrẹl! Rẹn ọkpa kẹkan
Psalms72:19 Wa rho eni ẹnrẹn ne ọ mwẹ uyi ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ. Te uyi ẹre gha gha otọ agbọn hia. Isẹ! Isẹ!
Psalms72:20 Emwana ọrọre ufomwẹ erhunmwu e Devid ne ovbi e Jese.
Psalms73:1 Osanobua wa ya obọ esi mu Izrẹl avbe iran ne ekhọe esi ni rrọọ.
Psalms73:2 Sokpan iro te han mwẹ nẹ
Psalms73:3 Rhunmwuda
Psalms73:4 Iran i miẹn obalọ
Psalms73:5 Iran i rri oya vbene emwa ọvbehe re
Psalms73:6 Rhunmwuda ọnii
Psalms73:7 Ekhọe iran ghi gha hihiẹ ọkhọ ladian
Psalms73:8 Iran ghi gha giẹ emwa ọvbehe iran ghi gha guan ẹmwẹ emwi dan iran tọn egbe mu
Psalms73:9 Iran ta Osanobua ẹrinmwi ọtakhọ
Psalms73:10 Sẹrriọ wẹ emwa Osanobua tobọ ẹre ghi gha bu iran yo. Iran ghi gha zẹgiẹ ya ẹmwẹ iran yi.
Psalms73:11 Iran khare wẹẹ
Psalms73:12 Erriọ iran ne emwa dan ye. Iran mwẹ emwi ọrhẹnrhẹn te iran ye miẹn nibun ba ẹre.
Psalms73:13 Te imẹ ghi wa da egbe mwẹ yi kua kẹkan ra? vbe ne I ima na ru orukhọ?
Psalms73:14 Osanobua
Psalms73:15 Akpawẹ te I ta egbe ẹmwẹ vberriọ mẹ i ghẹ yin uyinmwẹ emwa ruẹn.
Psalms73:16 I keghi te gha hia ne I miẹn otọ emwi na
Psalms73:17 Rhinrin mẹ te do gha rriẹ Ọgua Osa ruẹ
Psalms73:18 Te uwẹ ra viọ iran ye ehe ni miọnghọn
Psalms73:19 A fuẹn iran an vbe udomwurri
Psalms73:20 Iran yevbe imina ne ọ fo vbe owiẹ
Psalms73:21 Ẹghẹ ne iro ekhọe mwẹ na gha rriara
Psalms73:22 I keghi wa kọn de ẹwe ua
Psalms73:23 Vberriọ te I wa simama uwẹ vbe ẹghẹ hia
Psalms73:24 U ya ẹmwẹ igiodẹ ruẹ su mwẹ
Psalms73:25 Demwi ọvbehe ne I mwẹ vbe ẹrinmwi gberra uwẹ? Ugbẹn vbe I ghi mwẹ uwẹ nẹ
Psalms73:26 Egbe sẹtin wọ mwẹ ne ẹtin vbe fo mwẹ
Psalms73:27 Ẹ i mwẹ iran ni he uwẹ ye otọ ma fuẹn uan
Psalms73:28 Zẹvbe ọghomwẹ
Psalms74:1 Vbọzẹ ne u na sẹ ima rae vbenian yi Osanobua? U gha wa mu ohu ghe emwa ruẹn rhinrin ẹdẹ ra?
Psalms74:2 Ye avbe emwa ruẹn rre
Psalms74:3 Khian la emwi ni rẹnkhuan na gberra avbe eghian mwa rẹnkhẹn emwi ni rre Ọgua Osa fo.
Psalms74:4 Avbe eghian ruẹn ya gbe ọvẹ akhọnmiotọ vbe uwu Ọgua Osa ruẹ. Iran ya mu afiala iran ye evba zẹ vbe ama akhọnmiotọ.
Psalms74:5 Iran yevbe emwa ni gia erhan iran gha ya ughanmwa iran tọnnọ erhan kua.
Psalms74:6 Iran ye ughanmwa kevbe umọmọ iran
Psalms74:7 Iran rhia Ọgua Osa ruẹ ua
Psalms74:8 Iran te ho ne iran wa rẹnkhẹn ima fẹẹrẹ
Psalms74:9 Avbe emwi iruẹmwi ni huanrẹn hia
Psalms74:10 Vbe avbe eghian mwa ra giẹ uwẹ kpee sẹ hẹ vbe otọ yi Nọyaẹnmwa? Iran gha kpa unu ghe eni ruẹn rhinrin ẹdẹ ra?
Psalms74:11 Vbọzẹ ne u na he ne u yi ima obọ yi? Vbua ghi na viọ obọ ghe odieke hẹ yi?
Psalms74:12 Sokpan
Psalms74:13 Ẹtin ruẹn nọkhua ọre u ya wa okun ye ihe eva
Psalms74:14 U guọghọ uhunmwu e Leviatan ne ugbogiorinmwi amẹ
Psalms74:15 U ruẹe ne uhunmwu ẹzẹ kevbe ivbi ẹzẹ gha lẹẹ u kevbe silo avbe ẹzẹ nekhua ka.
Psalms74:16 Wẹ ọ re ọ yi avan kevbe asọn wẹ ọ re ọ mu owẹn kevbe uki ye ihe iran.
Psalms74:17 Wẹ ọ re ọ mwa ehe ne agbọn sẹe wẹ ọ re ọ yi ẹghẹ owowo kevbe oni.
Psalms74:18 Sokpan
Psalms74:19 Ghẹ sẹ avbe emwa ruẹn ne ẹtin fo nẹ rae
Psalms74:20 Ye ile ne u gu ima ta rre. Uyimwẹ ika wa rre ẹkhokho ni so ebiebi hia vbe otọe nii.
Psalms74:21 Ghẹ gi ekhue mu ọmwa ne a zẹ kpokpo
Psalms74:22 Rhiọrre Osanobua ne u khọn ekhae ne egbe ruẹ
Psalms74:23 Ghẹ mianmian uvannọ mwẹ ohu ọghe avbe eghian ruẹn
Psalms75:1 Ma rhie ekpọnmwẹ ne uẹn Osanobua ma rhie ekpọnmwẹ nuẹn ma tae ladian vbene uwẹ kpọlọ hẹ ma kevbe na iyẹn iwinna ọyunnuan nibun ne uwẹ winnaẹn.
Psalms75:2 “Mẹ rhie ẹghẹ ne I gha ya bu ohiẹn ye otọe nẹ
Psalms75:3 Avbe emwi ne a yi hia gha rhe gha guọ ighẹ a vbe mu agbọn tobọre rueghe I gha gie ẹyotọ ẹre de ziẹn.
Psalms75:4 I tama emwa dan wẹẹ
Psalms75:5 I tama iran ne iran dobọ orhuọ iran yi.”
Psalms75:6 Ẹ i re odẹ ahọ ra odẹ orrie ọ re ibuohiẹn ke rre ẹ i re odẹ okuọ ra odẹ ekẹn.
Psalms75:7 Osanobua ọrọre nọ bu ohiẹn ọ gha bu asẹ ne eso ọ gha bu abe gbe eso.
Psalms75:8 E Nọyaẹnmwa mu ukpu ọkpa mwẹ obọ ọ vuọn ne ayọn nọ wegbe ọghe izohu ẹre
Psalms75:9 Sokpan
Psalms75:10 Ọ gha guọghọ ẹtin emwa dan sokpan a gha rhie ba ẹtin ọghe emwa ẹmwata.
Psalms76:1 A rẹn Osanobua vbe Juda a vbe ya ọghọ ne eni ẹnrẹn vbe Izrẹl.
Psalms76:2 Ọ mwẹ owa ẹre vbe Jerusalẹm Oke Zaiọn ọrọre ehe ne ọ dia.
Psalms76:3 Evba ọ re ọ na bunnọ ifẹnmwẹ eghian
Psalms76:4 A miẹn vbe uyi ruẹ kpọlọ hẹ Osanobua a miẹn ẹtin nọkhua ne u ya tuorre ke uhunmwu oke dee
Psalms76:5 Avbe ivbiyokuo iran ni mwẹ ẹtin hia a bannọ emwi ne iran mwẹ hia kua
Psalms76:6 Ẹghẹ ne u na ya obọ sekhae ne iran Osanobua Jekọb
Psalms76:7 Sokpan
Psalms76:8 Ẹrinmwi ọ re uwẹ ke rhie ibuohiẹn ruẹn maa. Ohan keghi mu agbọn ọ na hunwan zẹẹ.
Psalms76:9 Ugbẹn vbe uwẹ gua kpaegbe ne u bu ohiẹn ne u miẹn iran ne a zẹ kpokpo vbe agbọn fan.
Psalms76:10 Te ohu ne emwa nagbọn mu
Psalms76:11 Ha emwi ne u ve
Psalms76:12 Osanobua ru ẹe ne emwa gha mu ohan irẹn ọ munọ iran ni tọn egbe mu rriotọ ọ keghi vbe runran avbe ọba nekhua.
Psalms77:1 I kakabọ datu tie Osanobua I kakabọ datu
Psalms77:2 Vbe ẹghẹ ọlọghọmwa I na erhunmwu ghe Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms77:3 I ghẹ ghi mu ẹmwẹ Osanobua roro
Psalms77:4 Vbe asọn biiri ọ ma gunmwẹ vbiẹ ekhọe mwẹ rhia sẹrriọ wẹ I ma sẹtin guan.
Psalms77:5 I mu ẹmwẹ ẹghẹ ne ọ gberra ro
Psalms77:6 I ye asọn ni ro iro ne ọ dinmwi
Psalms77:7 “Nọyaẹnmwa gha wa he ima fẹẹrẹ ra? Ẹko ẹre i ghi ra rhiẹnrhiẹn ghe ima ẹdẹ ra?
Psalms77:8 Te ọ ghi dobọ ne ọ na ho ẹmwẹ mwa yi ra? Te a ghi so eyan ne ọ te yan gọ ra?
Psalms77:9 Te Osanobua ghi mianmian ne ọ gha tohan ọmwa ra? Te ohu ghi rhie ihe itohan rẹn ra?”
Psalms77:10 Vbe iyeke ọnii I keghi kha wẹẹ
Psalms77:11 Te I gha ye iwinna nekhua ne u winna ẹn rre Nọyaẹnmwa I gha ye avbe iwinna ọyunnuan ne u winnaẹn ẹkpo nẹdẹ rre.
Psalms77:12 I gha mu emwi hia ne u he ru ro I gha rria avbe iwinna nekhua ruẹ.
Psalms77:13 Emwi hia ne u ru
Psalms77:14 Wẹ ọrọre Osanobua ne ọ winna iwinna ọyunnuan u rhie ẹtin ruẹn maa vbe uwu ẹbu agbọn ẹvbo.
Psalms77:15 Ẹtin ruẹn ọ re u ya miẹn emwa ruẹn fan ivbi uniẹn Jekọb kevbe Josẹf.
Psalms77:16 Ugbẹn vbe amẹ bẹghe Osanobua
Psalms77:17 Ikpakpiso rhọ amẹ yotọ; avan nukhunmwu khuarha ke iso rre
Psalms77:18 Ukhuarhamwẹ avan nukhunmwu ruẹn werriẹ ladian
Psalms77:19 Wẹ ya owẹ khian la uhuemwẹ amẹ; u fian okun ne ọ dinmwi rra; sokpan a ma miẹn ama owẹ ruẹ vbe otọ.
Psalms77:20 U su emwa ruẹn gha khian zẹvbe ọsuohuan u keghi mu iwinna iran yan Mosis kevbe Errọn obọ.
Psalms78:1 Wa ne emwa mwẹ
Psalms78:2 I gha ya ẹmwẹ ẹwaẹn rhan otọ emwiọkpaodin ni gberra nẹ.
Psalms78:3 Emwi ne ima ka họn nẹ
Psalms78:4 Ma i ra viọ iran lẹre ne avbe ivbi mwa ma gha tae ma orre ne ọ ghi lele ẹe ekpa ọghe ẹtin e Nọyaẹnmwa kevbe avbe iwinna nekhua ne ọ winna ẹn kevba avbe emwi ọyunnuan ne ọ he ru.
Psalms78:5 Ọ rhie uhi ne ivbi Izrẹl kevbe iyi ne ivbi uniẹn Jekọb ọ ma avbe erha mwa odede ẹre. Wẹ ne iran ma avbe ivbi iran uhi irẹn.
Psalms78:6 Ne orre ne ọ ghi lele ẹe miẹn ehe na ruẹ iran
Psalms78:7 Vbe odẹ vbenian
Psalms78:8 Iran i ra yevbe avbe erha iran odede emwa ni sọtẹ kevbe ni zẹ utun vbe ehọ ni ma mu ẹtin yan Osanobua ẹse
Psalms78:9 Ivbi Ifreim
Psalms78:10 Iran ma mu ile ne iran gu Osa ta sẹ
Psalms78:11 Iran mianmian emwi ne ọ ru iwinna ọyunnuan ne iran miẹn vbe ọ winnaẹn.
Psalms78:12 Vbe odaro evbibiẹ iran
Psalms78:13 Ọ wa okun ye ihe eva
Psalms78:14 Vbe ẹghẹ avan
Psalms78:15 Ọ va okuta vbe ato ọ na rhie amẹ gie iran ke odin rre.
Psalms78:16 Ọ ru ẹe ne amẹ ke uwu okuta lẹ ladian ọ keghi gie amẹ ni gha lẹẹ zẹ vbe ẹzẹ.
Psalms78:17 Sokpan
Psalms78:18 Iran na wa yan ru ẹe ne iran danmwẹ Osanobua ghe
Psalms78:19 Iran keghi ya ukpe gha sakan Osanobua
Psalms78:20 Ẹmwata nọ wẹ
Psalms78:21 Rhunmwuda ọnii
Psalms78:22 Rhunmwuda
Psalms78:23 Sokpan
Psalms78:24 ọ viọ ọka ke ẹrinmwi gie iran vbe ne ọ na viọ emana gie iran re.
Psalms78:25 Rhunmwuda ọnii
Psalms78:26 Ọ keghi vbe ru ẹe ne ẹhoho odẹ ahọ hoho ọ keghi ya ẹtin ẹnrẹn gua ẹhoho odẹ ekẹn kpao.
Psalms78:27 Ọ keghi viọ ahianmwẹ gie emwa rẹn ubunmwẹ ọnrẹn keghi yevbe ikpekhae ni rre ikpogho okun.
Psalms78:28 Iran keghi dele ye adesẹneva agọ nii kevbe lẹga owa ukpọn iran.
Psalms78:29 Rhunmwuda ọnii
Psalms78:30 Sokpan
Psalms78:31 Ẹghẹ nii
Psalms78:32 Vbene a ye do ena hia sẹ
Psalms78:33 Rhunmwuda ọnii
Psalms78:34 Ọ gha gbele eso vbe uwu iran
Psalms78:35 Iran yerre wẹ
Psalms78:36 Sokpan
Psalms78:37 Iran ma guobọ ọre
Psalms78:38 Sokpan
Psalms78:39 Ọ yerre wẹ emwa ni sẹtin wulo iran khin
Psalms78:40 Kugba kẹghẹrẹ ọ re iran ya gha sọtẹ ghe ẹre vbe uwu ato
Psalms78:41 Iran kegha danmwẹ Osanobua ghe
Psalms78:42 Iran mianmian ẹtin ẹnrẹn nọkhua
Psalms78:43 Ne ọ na winna iwinna ni kọnkọn kevbe ọghe ọyunnuan
Psalms78:44 Ọ fi ẹzẹ werriẹ khian esagiẹn
Psalms78:45 Ọ gie ikian bu iran gha khian
Psalms78:46 Ọ gie irhiso ya rri iran emwiokọ
Psalms78:47 Ọ ya esia mu iran ugbo azara rhia
Psalms78:48 Ọ ya esia gbele iran ẹmila a
Psalms78:49 Ọ si akhiẹ nọkhua ye iran egbe vbekpa ne ọ na hihiẹ ohu kevbe okuosu ẹre yan iran
Psalms78:50 Ọ ma vbe gbe ibiẹ rriẹ vbe ohu nii
Psalms78:51 Ọ gbele avbe emọdiọn
Psalms78:52 Ẹkpo nii
Psalms78:53 Ọ su iran vbe ne ai na mwẹ ẹbe
Psalms78:54 Ọ viọ iran gha die otọ ẹre ne ọ huanrẹn
Psalms78:55 Ọ khulo iran ni yin ẹnrẹn ladian
Psalms78:56 Sokpan
Psalms78:57 Sokpan iran sẹ ẹmwẹ ọnrẹn
Psalms78:58 Iran ya ehe ne iran na ga ẹbọ ya ohu muẹn iran keghi vbe ya amazẹ iran rhia ẹre ẹko rua.
Psalms78:59 Ohu mu Osanobua vbe ọ miẹn emwi na ọ na rhunmwuda ọnii he emwa rẹn fẹẹrẹ.
Psalms78:60 Ọ he owa ukpọn ẹnrẹn ne ọ rre Siailo ye otọ
Psalms78:61 Ọ gie avbe eghian mwa khọn mu Ẹkpẹti Ile ne ọ re ama ọghe ẹtin kevbe uyi ẹre.
Psalms78:62 Ohu emwa rẹn mu ẹẹn
Psalms78:63 A gbele avbe igbama vbe okuo avbe uvbi ma ghi miẹn ọdọ rọnmwẹ.
Psalms78:64 Avbe ohẹn wulo uwu dan
Psalms78:65 Vbe okiekie e Nọyaẹnmwa keghi rhiọrre vbe ne a miẹn wẹ te ọ te vbiẹ
Psalms78:66 Ọ keghi khulo avbe eghian rẹn werriegbe vbe ọ khọn iran muotọ nẹ ọ keghi vbe zẹ efa etẹbitẹ ye iran egbe.
Psalms78:67 Sokpan
Psalms78:68 Sokpan
Psalms78:69 Evba nii i ọ re ọ bọ Ọgua Osa ẹre yi zẹ vbe owa ẹre ne ọ rre ẹrinmwi. Ọ ru ẹe ne ọ deziẹn zẹ vbe agbọn na tobọ ẹre
Psalms78:70 Ọ zẹ Devid ne ọguọmwadia ẹre
Psalms78:71 Ehe ne ọ na su avbe ohuan rẹn
Psalms78:72 E Devid kegha gbearoghe iran. Ọ mu aro yọ vbe ne ọ na mianmian enegbe ẹre

Psalms79:4 Avbe ẹvbo ni lẹga mwa gha tie ihẹn ne ima. Iran gha giẹ ima iran gha ya ima gbe ogiẹ.

Psalms80:1 Danmwehọ ima ọmwa Ne ọ huanrẹn Izrẹl họn ọghomwa
Psalms80:2 Rhie egbe ruẹ ma ẹwae Ifreim
Psalms80:3 Viọ ima werriegbe gha dee
Psalms80:4 Vbe ọ gha ye kpee sẹ hẹ yi
Psalms80:5 U rhi akhiẹ ne ima re nẹ
Psalms80:6 U vbe gie avbe uhunmwu ẹvbo ni lẹga mwa gha khọn sinmwi otọe mwa
Psalms80:7 Viọ ima werriegbe gha dee Osanobua Ne Oghodua rhie itohan ruẹn ma mwa a gha miẹn ima fan.
Psalms80:8 U rhie azara ima okpa ke Igipt rre
Psalms80:9 U gbẹn irunmwu hin ehe ne ọ gha na wan rre nẹ
Psalms80:10 Ọ ya irhu ẹre gue avbe oke avbe abọ ẹre keghi gbe irhu gue avbe erhan isida nekhua.
Psalms80:11 Ọ niẹn abọ ẹre ya sẹ Okun Meditẹrrenian
Psalms80:12 Vbọzẹ ne u na guọghọ ogba ne ọ lẹga ẹre kua yi? Ọmwaikọmwa ne ọ ghi gberra sẹtin do ọmọ rẹn kọlọ nian.
Psalms80:13 Avbe aranmwẹ oha ya owẹ rri ẹe ginna otọ
Psalms80:14 Werriegbe bu ima rre Osanobua Ne Oghodua ke ẹrinmwi gbearoghe otọ ghe mwa
Psalms80:15 Do miẹn azara na ne uwẹ gbọre fan
Psalms80:16 Avbe eghian mwa mu erhẹn yọ
Psalms80:17 Rhie emwa ruẹn ne u hannọ zẹ lẹre
Psalms80:18 Ma i ghi dọlegbe fi iyeke gbe uwẹ ẹdẹ
Psalms80:19 Nọyaẹnmwa Osanobua Ne Oghodua viọ ima werriegbe rre rhie itohan ruẹn ma mwa a gha vbe miẹn mwa fan.

Psalms81:4 Uhi ẹre ọna khin vbe Izrẹl

Psalms83:1 Osanobua
Psalms83:2 Ghe avbe eghian ruẹn si otighi
Psalms83:3 Iran gha si uma ẹkhokho ga emwa ruẹn iran gha khuan khẹ emwa ne uwẹ mudia na.
Psalms83:4 Iran khare wẹẹ
Psalms83:5 Iro ne iran zẹe gu egbe ro nẹ
Psalms83:6 Ivbi Idọm kevbe Ismẹl
Psalms83:7 ivbi Gẹbal
Psalms83:8 Asiria vbe ya egbe ba iran
Psalms83:9 Ru iran zẹ vbene u ru ivbi e Midian
Psalms83:10 U khọn iran muotọ vbe Ẹndọ
Psalms83:11 Ru avbe ọkaolotu iran
Psalms83:12 Iran ni khare wẹẹ
Psalms83:13 Zagha iran kua zẹ vbe ẹbe nọkakae ne ẹhoho hoho kua.
Psalms83:14 Zẹ vbene erhẹn giẹn vbe uwu ẹgbo. Zẹ vbene aranmwẹ erhẹn giẹn uhunmwu oke.
Psalms83:15 Ya okpẹhoho ruẹ khulo iran kua ne u vbe ya ẹhoho ọbanabe ruẹ runran iran.
Psalms83:16 Ya ekhue gue iran aro Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms83:17 Te obọ gha gba iran
Psalms83:18 Te iran gha rẹn wẹ wẹ ọkpa ọrọre Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms84:1 A miẹn vbe Ọgua Osa ruẹ yẹ mwẹ hẹ Osa ne Oghodua!
Psalms84:2 Ghe vbene ọ khọn mwẹ hẹ ne I gha rre evba
Psalms84:3 Avbe uhaiso bọlọ oko
Psalms84:4 Ọmakin iran ni rre uwu Ọgua Osa ruẹ
Psalms84:5 Ọmakin iran ne ẹtin ẹnrẹn ke ehe ne uwẹ ye rre
Psalms84:6 Iran gha la iya e Baka ne ọ kae gberra
Psalms84:7 Vbene iran ya nana sikẹ odaro
Psalms84:8 Họn erhunmwu mwẹ Nọyaẹnmwa Osanobua ne Udazi. Danmwehọ
Psalms84:9 Osanobua
Psalms84:10 Ẹdẹ okpa ne a yae vbe Ọgua Osa ruẹ maa sẹẹ arriaisẹn ne a yae vbe ehe ọvbehe
Psalms84:11 E Nọyaẹnmwa ọrọre ne ọ degue mwa
Psalms84:12 Osa ne Oghodua
Psalms85:1 E Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms85:2 U ya orukhọ emwa ruẹn bọ iran u kevbe ye abakuru iran hia lekhue
Psalms85:3 u dobọ ohu ne a mu ghe iran yi
Psalms85:4 Viọ ima werriegbe rre Nọyaẹnmwa ọmiọnmwafan mwa ne u vbe dobọ ẹko nọ rhiae ruẹ ghe mwa yi.
Psalms85:5 Te u ra wa gha mu ohu ghe ima ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ ra? Ohu ruẹ i ra vbe fo ẹdẹ ra?
Psalms85:6 Dọlegbe ya ima wegbe ne emwa ruẹn gha vbe rho ruẹ.
Psalms85:7 Rhie aho ruẹ ne ẹ i beghe ma mwa Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms85:8 I gha danmwehọ ẹmwẹ ne Nọyaẹnmwa ne Osanobua guan ọ ve ima ne emwa rẹn ọfumwegbe
Psalms85:9 Vbe ẹmwata rẹn mu egbe
Psalms85:10 Ahoẹmwọmwa kevbe aguobọ egbe gha miegbe
Psalms85:11 A gie a mu ẹtin yan ọghe ọmwa nagbọn gha ke otọ ya sẹ odukhunmwu ẹmwata Osanobua ghi ke ẹrinmwi gbearoghe otọ.
Psalms85:12 E Nọyaẹnmwa gha gie agbọn ma mwa otọe mwa gha vbe mọ ọmọ ẹsẹse.
Psalms85:13 Ẹmwata gha ke odaro ne Nọyaẹnmwa ọ gha ya dọlọ odẹ yi khẹ ọre.
Psalms86:1 Danmwehọ mwẹ Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms86:2 Miẹn mwẹ fan vbobọ uwu rhunmwuda
Psalms86:3 Wẹ ọrọre Osanobua mwẹ
Psalms86:4 Ya ẹko ọguọmwadia ruẹ rhiẹnrhiẹn Nọyaẹnmwa rhunmwuda
Psalms86:5 Wẹ maa ne ima
Psalms86:6 Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms86:7 I kpe tie ruẹ vbe ẹghẹ ibaro
Psalms86:8 A i miẹn osa ne ọ yevbe uwẹ Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms86:9 Uhunmwu ẹvbo ne uwẹ he yi hia
Psalms86:10 Wẹ kpolo
Psalms86:11 Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms86:12 I gha ya ekhọe mwẹ hia rho ruẹ Nọyaẹnmwa Osanobua mwẹ I gha na iyẹn ukpọlọmwẹ ruẹn ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ.
Psalms86:13 U miẹn vbe ahoẹmwọmwa ruẹn ne ẹ i beghe kpọlọ ghe mwẹ hẹ! U yuo mwẹ hin idin tobọ ẹre rre.
Psalms86:14 Iran ni tọn egbe mu
Psalms86:15 Sokpan Osanobua ne ọ mwẹ itohan
Psalms86:16 Gbe bu mwẹ rre ne u tohan mwẹ
Psalms86:17 Ya emwi zẹ ama ọghe umamwẹ ruẹn ma mwẹ
Psalms87:1 E Nọyaẹnmwa bọ owa ẹre yan oke ne ọ huanrẹn nii
Psalms87:2 sẹ ehe ọvbehe ne ọ rhirhi a gha khin vbe Izrẹl ọ ho ẹmwẹ ore nọkhua e Jerusalẹm.
Psalms87:3 Wẹ ne ẹvbo Osanobua
Psalms87:4 “I gha so eni Igipt kevbe Babilọn
Psalms87:5 A gha tae vbe ekpa Zaiọn wẹ

Psalms87:7 Iran kuru
Psalms88:1 E Nọyaẹnmwa Osanobua ọmiọnmwafan mwẹ te I wa tu ne ebi ro
Psalms88:2 Họn erhunmwu mwẹ
Psalms88:3 Ọlọghọmwa ni rhurhẹ yan mwẹ
Psalms88:4 Mẹ yevbe emwa ọvbehe ni ghi ra wu hia
Psalms88:5 A he mwẹ ye otọ ba avbe ikun orinmwi mẹ ye vbe emwa ne a gbele ni lovbiẹ ye uwu idin iran iran ne uwẹ mianmian ẹn fẹfẹẹfẹ emwa ni i ghi gie uwẹ ru iyobọ na.
Psalms88:6 U fi mwẹ fi uwu udinmwimwẹ idin
Psalms88:7 Ohu ruẹ gha yẹnyẹn mwẹ ginna otọ
Psalms88:8 U gie avbe osẹ mwẹ he mwẹ ye otọ
Psalms88:9 Te aro mwẹ ghi ghe vbirrivbirri rhunmwuda usẹ e Nọyaẹnmwa ẹdẹgbegbe ọ re I ya tu tie ruẹ. I ghi vbe viọ obọ da okhunmwu ghe ruẹ gha na erhunmwu.
Psalms88:10 Wẹ vbe ru emwi ọyunnuan ma orinmwi ra? Iran vbe kpaegbe ne iran gha rho ruẹ ra?
Psalms88:11 A vbe ta ẹmwẹ iho ruẹ ne ẹ i beghe vbe idin ra? Ra ọghe aguobọmwa ruẹn vbe ihe ọfuan?
Psalms88:12 A vbe bẹghe iwinna ọyunnuan ruẹn vbe uwu ebiebi nii ra? Ra umamwẹ ruẹn vbe otọ emwa ne a mianmian ẹn?
Psalms88:13 E Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms88:14 Vbe u a na he mwẹ hẹ yi Nọyaẹnmwa? Vbe u a na fi iyeke gbe mwẹ hẹ?
Psalms88:15 Ke ẹghẹ ọvbokhan mwẹ gha dee
Psalms88:16 Ohu ruẹ ne ọ mwẹ oghae rẹnkhẹn mwẹ uan
Psalms88:17 Iran lẹga mwẹ zẹ vbe orogho amẹ ne ebi ro iran hẹ rhu mwẹ ke igienenẹ rre.
Psalms88:18 U ru ẹe ne avbe osẹ ni sikẹ mwẹ sẹẹ he mwẹ yotọ ebiebi ọkpa ọrọre ogieva mwẹ.
Psalms89:1 E Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms89:2 Mẹ rẹnrẹn wẹ ahoẹmwọmwa ruẹn ọ ghe etẹbitẹ nọ
Psalms89:3 Wẹ khare wẹẹ
Psalms89:4 ‘Ovbi uniẹn ruẹn ọ re ọ ra gha rri ọba khian. I gha gbe ẹbe gue uniẹn ruẹn ni rri ọba ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ!’ ”
Psalms89:5 Ẹrinmwi ya emwi ọyunnuan ne u ru so ihuan
Psalms89:6 Ọmwa ne ọ ye vbe ruẹ irre ẹrinmwi Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms89:7 Te a kpa uhe ne uẹn vbe iko iran ni huanrẹn te ohan ruẹn wa mu iran hia.
Psalms89:8 E Nọyaẹnmwa Osanobua ne Oghodua
Psalms89:9 Wẹ ọ re ọ kha yan okun ne ọ wegbe
Psalms89:10 U piẹn Rehab ne Ugbogiorinmwi
Psalms89:11 Wẹ ọ re ọ yan ẹrinmwi
Psalms89:12 Wẹ ọ re ọ yi odẹ okuọ kevbe ekẹn Oke Tabọ kevbe Oke Hẹmọn iran hia ya oghọghọ so ihuan ghe ruẹ.
Psalms89:13 A miẹn vbene u mwẹ ẹtin hẹ! A miẹn vbene ẹtin ruẹn kpọlọ hẹ!
Psalms89:14 Ẹmwata kevbe uhunmwu ẹmwẹ
Psalms89:15 Ọmakin iran ni so ihuan ya rho ruẹ iran ni rrọ vbe uwu uwanmwẹ itohan ruẹn.
Psalms89:16 Rhunmwuda uwẹ
Psalms89:17 Wẹ rhie akhọnmiotọ nekhua ne ima vbe aho ẹmwẹ ọmwa ruẹn
Psalms89:18 Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms89:19 Vbe ẹghẹ ne ọ kpee fua
Psalms89:20 I ya Devid ne ọguọmwadia mwẹ rri ọba nẹ
Psalms89:21 Ẹtin mwẹ gha guẹe gha rrọ vbe ẹghẹ hia
Psalms89:22 Obọ eghian rẹn i ra gba ẹre ẹdẹ
Psalms89:23 I gha rẹnkhẹn avbe eghian rẹn
Psalms89:24 I gha ho ẹmwẹ ọnrẹn I ghi vbe guobọ ẹre ẹsẹse. I gha ya ẹe gha khọnmiotọ vbe ẹghẹ hia.
Psalms89:25 I gha rhie ba arriọba ẹre ke Meditẹrrenian kpao ya sẹ Ẹzẹ Yufretes.
Psalms89:26 Rẹn gha tama mwẹ wẹẹ
Psalms89:27 I gha ya ẹe ru ovbi mwẹ nokpia ne ọdiọn
Psalms89:28 I gha ru nẹ
Psalms89:29 Uniẹn ni rri ọba ẹre gha mudia gbain zẹ vbe iso ovbi urho ẹre ọ re ọ gha rri ọba rhinrin ẹdẹ.
Psalms89:30 “Sokpan
Psalms89:31 a deghẹ iran fi iyeke gbe ẹmwẹ ne I tae
Psalms89:32 ẹghẹ nii
Psalms89:33 Sokpan
Psalms89:34 Mẹ i ra so ile ne I guẹe ta gọ
Psalms89:35 “I ya eni mwẹ ne ọ huanrẹn yan nẹ uhukpa ne ọ re ọghe ẹdẹ hia
Psalms89:36 Te a gha miẹn ivbi uniẹn ọnrẹn ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ. Mẹ gha vbe gha wan lẹga arriọba ẹre la ẹghẹ ne ovẹn gha vbe yunmwu la.
Psalms89:37 Ọ gha mudia gbain zẹ vbe uki ne osẹe ẹmwata ne ọ rre iso nii.”
Psalms89:38 Sokpan
Psalms89:39 U so ile ne u gu ọguọmwadia ruẹ ta gọ nẹ
Psalms89:40 U guọghọ ekẹn ne a gbe lẹga ẹvbo nii sotọ owa ọkhẹ ni rrọ
Psalms89:41 ilavbodẹ hia gha do ẹre emwi hẹ
Psalms89:42 U rhie akhọnmiotọ ne avbe eghian rẹn
Psalms89:43 U ya emwi igbinna rẹn khian ne ẹ i mwẹ asa; u keghi gie obọ vba ẹre vbe okuo.
Psalms89:44 U miẹn ẹre ọkpọ ọba ne ọ gue ẹe
Psalms89:45 U ya ẹe khian ọmaẹn idanmwidan; u keghi ya efa yọ ẹre ẹwu.
Psalms89:46 E Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms89:47 Yerre vbene ẹdẹ agbọn mwẹ kanmwa sẹ hẹ
Psalms89:48 De ọmwa ne ọ gha sẹtin gha rrọ ne ẹ i ra wu yi? Vbe ọmwa ra ya rhie egbe ẹre lẹ ne idin hẹ?
Psalms89:49 Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms89:50 Ghẹ mianmian vbene a rhovbiẹ mwẹ ne ọguọmwadia ruẹ hẹ vbene I ye egbe miẹn ihẹn ne iran ni ga ẹbọ tie hẹ.
Psalms89:51 Avbe eghian ruẹn
Psalms89:52 Wa rho Nọyaẹnmwa ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ! Isẹ! Isẹ!
Psalms90:1 E Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms90:2 Vbe uwẹ te do yi avbe oke ra u te do ru ẹe ne agbọn gha rrọ wẹ ọrọre Osanobua etẹbitẹghori wẹ ọ re ọ vbe ra gha re Osanobua ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ.
Psalms90:3 Wẹ tama ọmwa
Psalms90:4 Ikpẹdẹ arriaisẹn
Psalms90:5 U viọ ima hia gha rriẹ zẹvbe amẹ ne ọ lẹ ma ma vbe kpee gberra
Psalms90:6 ọ na wan ọ na yuolo obobo ladian sokpan ọ kaka a vbe ota ọ keghi wu.
Psalms90:7 Ohu ruẹ fuẹn ima an
Psalms90:8 U wa orukhọ ima ye odaro ruẹ
Psalms90:9 Ohu ruẹ
Psalms90:10 Ukpo ekigbesiyenẹ ọre ima mwẹ
Psalms90:11 De ọmwa ne ọ he ya egbe miẹn ohu ruẹ vbe uwu ẹtin ẹnrẹn hia? De ọmwa ne ọ rẹn ohan ne ohu ruẹ nọkhua sẹtin si rre?
Psalms90:12 Ma ima re
Psalms90:13 Vbe ohu ruẹ ghi ra kpee sẹ hẹ vbe otọ yi? Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms90:14 Ye ahoẹmwọmwa ruẹn ne ẹ i beghe vuọn ima owiẹ owiẹ
Psalms90:15 Banbanna nian
Psalms90:16 Gie ima ne eguọmwadia ruẹ miẹn iwinna ruẹn ni kpọlọ gie avbe ivbi mwa miẹn ẹtin ruẹn ne ọ mwẹ uyi.
Psalms90:17 E Nọyaẹnmwa Osanobua mwa gie afiangbe ruẹ gha rre ima egbe gie emwi ne ima ru hia dunna ne ima.
Psalms91:1 Ọmwaikọmwa ne ọ lẹ gbinna Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms91:2 gha sẹtin tama rẹn wẹẹ
Psalms91:3 Ogha degue ruẹ hin ẹbe ni rre ẹkhokho hia
Psalms91:4 Ọ gha ya ifuẹn ọnrẹn gue ruẹ
Psalms91:5 Wẹ i ra mu ohan ẹbe ke ẹbe vbe asọn
Psalms91:6 Ra egboghogbogho ne ọ fi emwi vbe ebiebi ra emwi dan ne ọ gbe ọmwa vbe ogiavan.
Psalms91:7 Arriaisẹn sẹtin dele wu vbe ehe ne u ye arriaisẹn vbe ihe igbe lẹga ruẹ sokpan emwi rhọkpa i ra ru uwẹ.
Psalms91:8 Wẹ gha ghe ẹre
Psalms91:9 Wẹ ya e Nọyaẹnmwa ru e nọhuanrẹn ọwuẹ nẹ
Psalms91:10 Rhunmwuda ọnii
Psalms91:11 Osanobua gha rhie ruẹ ne avbe odibo ẹre rhie mwẹ
Psalms91:12 Iran gha tọn uwẹ mu mwẹ obọ
Psalms91:13 Wẹ gha ye owẹ rrilo oduma kevbe ẹyẹn ginna otọ oduma ni khọ
Psalms91:14 Osanobua khare wẹẹ
Psalms91:15 Iran gha kpe tie mwẹ
Psalms91:16 I gha ya utọmwẹ san iran ẹse I gha miẹn iran fan.”
Psalms92:1 U miẹn vbene ọ maa hẹ ne a rhie ekpọnmwẹ ne uẹn Nọyaẹnmwa ne a so ihuan uyi ruẹ
Psalms92:2 Ne a gha na iyẹn ahoẹmwọmwa ruẹn ne ẹ i beghe owiẹ owiẹ
Psalms92:3 Ne a gha ya emwi ihuan ne ọ mwẹ irri ru ẹe
Psalms92:4 Iwinna ruẹn nekhua ya ẹko rhiẹnrhiẹn mwẹ Nọyaẹnmwa mẹ so ihuan oghọghọ rhunmwuda iwinna ne u winnaẹn.
Psalms92:5 A miẹn vbe iwinna ruẹn kpọlọ hẹ Nọyaẹnmwa! A miẹn vbe iro ẹko ruẹ dinmwi hẹ!
Psalms92:6 Emwi ne akpa i sẹtin rẹn ọ re ọna khin ọzuọ i sẹtin rẹn otọ ẹre
Psalms92:7 ọmwa dan sẹtin wan vbe irunmwu agbọn sẹtin maa iran ni ru emwi dan
Psalms92:8 Rhunmwuda
Psalms92:9 Ma rẹnrẹn wẹ
Psalms92:10 U ya mwẹ wegbe zẹ vbe ede
Psalms92:11 Aro miẹn ọẹn nẹ vbe obọ gba avbe eghian mwẹ
Psalms92:12 Ọmwata gha wan zẹ vbe udin iran gha wan zẹvbe isida ni rre Lebanọn.
Psalms92:13 Te iran ye vbe erhan ne a kọ ye owa e Nọyaẹnmwa.
Psalms92:14 Ne ọ ye mọ vbe ẹghẹ ọmaẹn ne ẹbe ẹre bi nunuunu vbe ẹghẹ hia ọ ghi vbe wegbe.
Psalms92:15 Ọna rhiema wẹẹ ọmwata ọre Nọyaẹnmwa khin kevbe wẹ abakuru i vbe rre obọ ọmwa ne ọ gbe aro ghe mwẹ.
Psalms93:1 E Nọyaẹnmwa ọrọre ọba
Psalms93:2 Ke omuhẹn gha dee
Psalms93:3 Avbe orinmwi amẹ okun tọn urhu mu Nọyaẹnmwa iran tọn urhu mu ya davan.

Psalms94:1 Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms94:2 Wẹ ọ re ọ bu ohiẹn emwa hia kpaegbe
Psalms94:3 Vbe avbe emwa dan gha ya ghọghọ kpee sẹ hẹ yi? Vbe ọ gha kpee sẹ hẹ Nọyaẹnmwa?
Psalms94:4 Vbe ọ gha kpee sẹ hẹ yi
Psalms94:5 Iran wa rẹnkhẹn emwa ruẹn Nọyaẹnmwa iran zẹ emwa ni re ọwuẹ kpokpo.
Psalms94:6 Iran gbele avbe ẹgbẹe kevbe emọ ne ẹ i mwẹ erha iran keghi vbe gbele avbe erriọvbe ni rre otọe mwa.
Psalms94:7 Iran khare wẹẹ
Psalms94:8 Wa ne emwa mwẹ vbe uwa na kọn de ọzuọ a hẹ vberriọ yi? De ẹghẹ ne uwa gha ya rẹn emwi yi?
Psalms94:9 Osanobua ne ọ yi ehọ ima
Psalms94:10 Rẹn ọ re ọ gbe aro ghe agbọn ẹvbo hia
Psalms94:11 E Nọyaẹnmwa rẹn iro ne iran zẹ; ọ rẹn vbene iro iran re ọghe akpa hẹ.
Psalms94:12 Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms94:13 U rhie ikẹtin ne ẹẹn vbe ẹghẹ ibaro
Psalms94:14 E Nọyaẹnmwa i ra he emwa rẹn yotọ
Psalms94:15 A gha ye miẹn ẹmwata vbe uwu iko ibuohiẹn
Psalms94:16 De ọmwa ne ọ gu emwa dan gbinna mẹ yi? Gha ọ mu ẹzọ mwẹ gu emwa ọkhọ gui?
Psalms94:17 Akpawẹ ẹ i re Nọyaẹnmwa ne ọ mudia mẹ te I gha ya ulẹ lao otọe iran ni rhie obọ nọ fu yan egbe.
Psalms94:18 Mẹ khare wẹẹ
Psalms94:19 Ẹghẹikẹghẹ ne udu mwẹ ya mu waa I na vbe gha hawa u ghi fu mwẹ ẹko rre u ghi ya mwẹ sẹ ọyẹnmwẹ.
Psalms94:20 Wẹ kevbe ọmwa nọ bu ohiẹn
Psalms94:21 Iran ni khuan khẹ emwa ẹmwata
Psalms94:22 Sokpan
Psalms94:23 Ọ gha rri iran oya ye emwi dan ne iran ru
Psalms95:1 Wa larre
Psalms95:2 Wa gie a ya ekpọnmwẹ gha die odaro ẹre ne a so ihuan oghogho ọghe urhomwẹ.
Psalms95:3 Rhunmwuda
Psalms95:4 Rẹn ọ khaemwisẹ yan agbọn na hia
Psalms95:5 Rẹn ọ khaemwisẹ yan okun rẹn ọ vbe yiẹe kevbe otọe ne ọ kae ne irẹn vbe yi ba ẹre.
Psalms95:6 Wa larre
Psalms95:7 Rẹn ọrọre Osanobua mwa; ma ọrọre emwa ne irẹn gbearoghe
Psalms95:8 “Wa ghẹ ze vbe udu
Psalms95:9 Evba iran na danmwẹ mwẹ ghe
Psalms95:10 Ukpo iyeva ọre egbe iran na wa ya wọ mwẹ I keghi kha wẹẹ
Psalms95:11 Ohu keghi mu mwẹ ọre I na yan wẹẹ
Psalms96:1 Wa so ihuan ọgbọn ghe Nọyaẹnmwa; wa so ihuan ghe Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms96:2 Wa so ihuan ghe Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms96:3 Wa na iyẹn uyi ẹre ma avbe uhunmwu ẹvbo
Psalms96:4 Ọmwa ne ọ kpọlọ ọ re Nọyaẹnmwa khin
Psalms96:5 Amazẹ ọ re ẹbọ avbe emwa nekpa khin
Psalms96:6 Uyi kevbe oyọnyọn ọba gba ẹre egbe
Psalms96:7 Wa rho e Nọyaẹnmwa emwa ni rre agbọn na hia
Psalms96:8 Wa rho eni Nọyaẹnmwa ne ọ mwẹ uyi
Psalms96:9 wa ghughẹrre vbe odaro ọmwa Ne ọ huanrẹn vbe ọ gha ya egbe ladian. Wa gha guọ zẹzẹzẹ vbe odaro ẹre otọ agbọn hia.

Psalms97:1 E Nọyaẹnmwa ọrọre Ọba! Agbọn wa gha ghọghọ! Wa gha ghọghọ
Psalms97:2 Okuku kevbe ebiebi lẹga ẹre; ẹmwata kevbe uhunmwu ẹmwẹ ọ re ọ ya khaemwisẹ.
Psalms97:3 Erhẹn ke odaro ne ẹẹn
Psalms97:4 Ayan rẹn waan yan agbọn; agbọn miẹn ọẹn ọ kegha guọ.
Psalms97:5 Avbe oke ranraẹn zẹ vbe odan vbe odaro Nọyaẹnmwa ne ọ yan agbọn hia.
Psalms97:6 Ẹrinmwi na iyẹn ẹmwata ẹre avbe uhunmwu ẹvbo hia vbe miẹn uyi ẹre.
Psalms97:7 Ekhue mu dọmwadẹ ọghọe ne ọ gho ẹbọ

Psalms97:9 E Nọyaẹnmwa ne Oghodua wẹ ọ re ọ khaemwisẹ yan agbọn na hia; wẹ kpọlọ sẹ avbe ẹbọ hia
Psalms97:10 E Nọyaẹnmwa ho ẹmwẹ iran ni khuiwu ọkhọ; ọ tan obọ gue ẹdagbọn emwa rẹn
Psalms97:11 Uwanmwẹ wan mu ọmwata
Psalms97:12 Wa gha ghọghọ

Psalms103:10 Ẹ i rri ima oya ne ọ ma mwa

Psalms104:1 Rhie urhomwẹ ne Nọyaẹnmwa wẹ ekhọe mwẹ
Psalms104:2 Wẹ ye uwanmwẹ gue egbe ruẹ hia
Psalms104:3 U keghi bọ owa ruẹ yan amẹ ne ọ rre odukhunmwu
Psalms104:4 U ya ẹhoho ru ne u gie ẹre uhunmwu kevbe asan ọghe ayan
Psalms104:5 U mu agbọn gbọ ye ẹyotọ ẹre gbain ai vbe mu ẹẹn hin rre ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ.
Psalms104:6 U mu okun rhu ẹe zẹvbe ẹwu
Psalms104:7 U gu avbe amẹ gui
Psalms104:8 Iran lẹ la oke gberra la iya
Psalms104:9 U mwa uwu yọ
Psalms104:10 U gie ẹzẹ gha lẹ vbe uwu iya
Psalms104:11 Iran rhie amẹ ne avbe aranmwẹ oha
Psalms104:12 Avbe ahianmwẹ bọlọ oko
Psalms104:13 U gie amẹ ke iso gha rriẹ uhunmwu avbe oke
Psalms104:14 U gie avbe irunmwu zọ ne ẹmila
Psalms104:15 Ọ ghi vbe ru ayọn ne ọ ya ẹko ẹre rhiẹnrhiẹn

Psalms104:17 Evba nii ọre avbe ahianmwẹ bọ oko yi
Psalms104:18 Uhunmwu oke ni yo ọre avbe ẹwe oha dia
Psalms104:19 Wẹ yi uki ne a ya gha ka uki
Psalms104:20 Wẹ ọre ọ yi asọn
Psalms104:21 Ivbi oduma ghi gha vanhiẹn vbe iran a gha ru ohuẹ
Psalms104:22 Ovẹn gha ghi yanrre
Psalms104:23 Ẹghẹ nii
Psalms104:24 Nọyaẹnmwa emwi ne u yi wa bun
Psalms104:25 Evba nii ọre okun ye

Psalms104:29 Wẹ gha fi iyeke gbe

Psalms105:17 Sokpan
Psalms105:18 A keghi rrọ ọgiọrọ ye ọre owẹ
Psalms105:19 A te do miẹn wẹ emwi ne ọ ta ye otọ sunu
Psalms105:20 Ẹ i re ọba Igipt na wẹ ne a rhan ẹnrẹn
Psalms105:21 Ọ rhie ẹre ye ne ọ gbearoghe arriọba ẹre ọ keghi ya ẹe ru enọkhaemwisẹ yan otọe ni.

Psalms105:34 Ọ guan rẹn

Psalms105:41 Ọ kie okuta nọkhua

Psalms106:1 Wa rho e Nọyaẹnmwa! Wa rhie ekpọnmwẹ ne Nọyaẹnmwa

Psalms106:4 Nọyaẹnmwa

Psalms106:6 Ma rukhọ
Psalms106:7 Avbe erha mwa odede ni gha rre Igipt
Psalms106:8 Sokpan
Psalms106:9 Ọ gu Okun ne Nọbaa guan
Psalms106:10 Ọ miẹn iran fan vbe obọ iran ni khuiwu iran; ọ keghi yuo iran hin obọ eghian iran rre.

Psalms106:12 Ẹghẹ nii

Psalms106:14 Iran keghi vuọn ne orriarria vbe uwu ato

Psalms106:16 Vbe uwu ato nii
Psalms106:17 Ẹre otọe na rhan unu an
Psalms106:18 Erhẹn ke ẹrinmwi de yan irogho iran
Psalms106:19 Iran na ma ẹmila igoru vbe Sainai iran na gha gho amazẹ ni.
Psalms106:20 Iran keghi fi uyi Osanobua werriẹ ghe ọghe ama aranmwẹ ne ọ rri irunmwu.
Psalms106:21 Iran mianmian Osanobua ne ọ miẹn iran fan vbekpa iwinna nekhua ne ọ winna ẹn vbe Igipt.
Psalms106:22 U miẹn emwi ọyunnuan ne ọ ru vbe evba u miẹn emwi ọyunnuan ne ọ ru vbe Okun ne Nọbaa.
Psalms106:23 Ugbẹn vbe Osanobua khare ighe rẹn ra fuẹn emwa irẹn uan
Psalms106:24 Ẹghẹ nii

Psalms106:26 Rẹn keghi rhunmwuda ọnii ya obọ sekhae ne iran bu iran ude

Psalms106:28 A ghi sẹ Peọ
Psalms106:29 Iran keghi ya uyinmwẹ iran na
Psalms106:30 Sokpan
Psalms106:31 Te a ghi ya emwi na so eni ẹnrẹn ne ọ maa

Psalms106:33 Iran keghi ya ohu mu ẹẹn sẹrriọ wẹ ọ na wa gha talọ vbe ne ẹ i na zẹdẹ ka roro ẹe.
Psalms106:34 Iran ma gbele avbe nigẹbọ ni uan zẹ vbene Nọyaẹnmwa tama iran.
Psalms106:35 Sokpan
Psalms106:36 Emwa Osanobua kegha gho amazẹ ọ na ọre ọ si ọfuan ye iran egbe.

Psalms106:38 Iran gbele emọ ni ma rẹn okpa ọma rẹn eva nii
Psalms106:39 Iran keghi lekpa uyinmwẹ iran ya egbe iran khian ne ọ ma huan
Psalms106:40 Rhunmwuda ọnii Osanobua mu ohu ghe emwa irẹn

Psalms106:42 Avbe eghian iran zẹ iran kpokpo
Psalms106:43 Ẹghẹ nibun

Psalms107:1 Wa rhie ekpọnmwẹ ne Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms107:2 Wa dọlegbe ta avbe ẹmwẹ na ya rho e Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms107:3 Ọ keghi vbe viọ uwa werriegbe ke ẹvbo ẹrrẹe gha dee
Psalms107:4 Eso kegha zozo lele ato ne odẹ i ye khian iran ma vbe miẹn odẹ la gha rriẹ ẹvbo ne iran gha dia.
Psalms107:5 Ohanmwẹ gbe iran
Psalms107:6 Ẹghẹ nii
Psalms107:7 Ọ keghi viọ iran la odẹ ọwara gha rriẹ ẹvbo ne ọ gha gie iran yin.
Psalms107:8 Ọ kere ne iran rho e Nọyaẹnmwa ye aho ẹmwẹ ọmwa rẹn ne ẹ i beghe kevbe emwi ọyunnuan ne ọ ru ne iran.
Psalms107:9 Ọ sa amẹ ne iran ne ohanmwẹ amẹ gbe wọn ọ keghi ya emwi ne ọ maa vuọn iran ne ohanmwẹ gbe ẹko.
Psalms107:10 Eso kegha rrọ vbe uwu akhiẹ kevbe ebiebi oleghan ni susẹ vbe ọgiọrọ
Psalms107:11 rhunmwuda ighe iran de iyi
Psalms107:12 Egbe wọ iran
Psalms107:13 Ẹre iran na kpe tie Nọyaẹnmwa vbe uwu ọlọghọmwa iran ni
Psalms107:14 Ọ viọ iran ke uwu akhiẹ kevbe ebiebi ladian
Psalms107:15 Ọ kere ne iran rho e Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms107:16 Ọ guọghọ ẹkhu oze kua
Psalms107:17 Eso kegha re akpa vbọ
Psalms107:18 Ẹmwẹ evbare ma gie iran ya rẹn enegbe
Psalms107:19 Ẹre iran na kpe tie Nọyaẹnmwa vbe uwu ọlọghọmwa iran
Psalms107:20 Ọ kha ẹmwẹ ya mu iran egbe rran
Psalms107:21 Ọ kere ne iran rho e Nọyaẹnmwa rhunmwuda aho ẹmwẹ ọmwa rẹn ne ẹ i beghe kevbe emwi ọyunnuan ne ọ ru ne iran.
Psalms107:22 Ọ kere ne iran zọ ese ya kpọnmwẹ ọẹn ne iran vbe ye ihuan oghọghọ
Psalms107:23 Eso ya okọ gua okun rraa
Psalms107:24 Iran miẹn emwi ne Nọyaẹnmwa gha sẹtin ru iwinna ọyunnuan rẹn vbe okun.
Psalms107:25 Ọ guan rẹn
Psalms107:26 A tọn avbe okọ nekhua mu fi ẹhoho
Psalms107:27 Iran rrua owẹ te iran ghi zẹ owẹ ahanmwahan vbe ọdayọn iguemwi iran hia ma ghi gha mwẹ esa ne ọ ye.
Psalms107:28 Ẹre iran na kpe tie Nọyaẹnmwa vbe uwu ọlọghọmwa iran
Psalms107:29 Ọ dọ okpẹhoho ne ọ hoho ni yọ
Psalms107:30 Iran ghọghọ ye ne emwi na furre ni
Psalms107:31 Ọ kere ne iran kpọnmwẹ e Nọyaẹnmwa ye aho ẹmwẹ ọmwa rẹn ne ẹ i beghe kevbe emwi ọyunnuan ne ọ ru ne iran.
Psalms107:32 Ọ kere ne iran na iyẹn ukpọlọmwẹ ọnrẹn vbe iko emwa
Psalms107:33 Nọyaẹnmwa si avbe ẹzẹ ka fẹfẹẹfẹ
Psalms107:34 Ọ ya avbe otọ ni maa emwiokọ khian otọe umwẹ
Psalms107:35 Ọ fi avbe ato werriẹ khian odighi amẹ
Psalms107:36 Ọ gie avbe emwa ne ohanmwẹ gbe yin evba
Psalms107:37 Iran kọ emwi ye ugbo iran keghi vbe kọ avbe azara iran keghi rhọ emwiokọ wọrhọwọrhọ.
Psalms107:38 Ọ fiangbe emwa rẹn iran keghi biẹlẹ emọ nibun ọ kevbe ruẹe ne emwirri iran ghẹ dibu.
Psalms107:39 Iran gha khọn emwa rẹn miotọ iran na vbe ya ukpokpo kevbe usẹ hiẹnhiẹn yan iran
Psalms107:40 ọ ghi mu ohu ghe iran ni zẹ iran kpokpo
Psalms107:41 Sokpan ọ yuo iran ne ẹ i mwẹ hin usẹ iran rre
Psalms107:42 Emwa ẹmwata miẹn ọna
Psalms107:43 Wa gie avbe umẹwaẹn mu avbe emwi na roro
Psalms108:1 Osanobua
Psalms108:2 Wa rhiọrre akpata kevbe ukusẹ mwẹ! I gha huẹn owẹn vbe ovbe.
Psalms108:3 Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms108:4 Aho ẹmwẹ ọmwa ruẹn ne ẹ i beghe yo gberra ẹrinmwi
Psalms108:5 Rhie ukpọlọmwẹ ruẹn ma vbe iso Osanobua
Psalms108:6 Ya ẹtin ruẹn miẹn mwa fan; họn erhunmwu mwẹ ne a miẹn ehe na fannọ emwa ruẹn ne u ho ẹmwẹ ọnrẹn ye otọ.
Psalms108:7 Osanobua guan ke uwu owa ẹre ne ọ huanrẹn rre wẹẹ

Psalms108:9 sokpan
Psalms108:10 Osanobua
Psalms108:11 Te uwẹ gele he ima fua vbe ẹmwata ra? Wẹ i ra lele okuo mwa ladian ra?
Psalms108:12 Yi ma obọ gu avbe eghian khọn ma
Psalms108:13 Ugbẹn vbe Osanobua yaba ima nẹ
Psalms109:1 I rho ruẹ Osanobua
Psalms109:2 Emwa dan kevbe avbe ọhọn ohoghe gha gun mwẹ gbinna
Psalms109:3 iran vbe ta ẹmwẹ dan vbe ekpa mwẹ
Psalms109:4 Iran ghi gha solo mwẹ owẹ
Psalms109:5 Iran ya ọkhọ ha ọmaa mẹ iran ya ikhuiwu ha osa ahoẹmwọmwa mẹ.
Psalms109:6 Zẹ ọbuohiẹn dan
Psalms109:7 Te a gha bu ohiẹn ọnrẹn wẹ ọ rria abe; erhunmwu ne ọ na
Psalms109:8 Gie ufomwẹ ẹdagbọn rẹn zẹgiẹ rre; ne ọmwa ọvbehe rhie ihe ẹre vbe iwinna!
Psalms109:9 Te ivbi ẹre gha khian emọ ne ẹ i mwẹ erha
Psalms109:10 Te avbe ivbi ẹre gha khian enọkpolugho ni vbu evbare re; te a gha vbe khulo iran kua
Psalms109:11 Te iran ne ọ rri ọre osa gha viọ emwi ẹnrẹn hia
Psalms109:12 Ai gha miẹn ọmwa ne ọ gha tohan rẹn
Psalms109:13 Te ivbi uniẹn ọnrẹn hia gha wulo
Psalms109:14 Te Nọyaẹnmwa gha ye orukhọ avbe erha odede ẹre rre
Psalms109:15 Te Nọyaẹnmwa gha ye orukhọ iran rre rhinrin
Psalms109:16 Oko nii ma zẹdẹ rẹn wẹ a vbe tohan ọmwa hiehiere
Psalms109:17 Ihẹn ne a tie yẹ ọre
Psalms109:18 Te ihẹn ne a tie ghi gua ẹre obọ ro
Psalms109:19 Zevbe ukpọn
Psalms109:20 E Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms109:21 Sokpan
Psalms109:22 Ovbiogue kevbe ne ẹ i mwẹ
Psalms109:23 Te a ghi khian ho mwẹ bẹkun na zẹ vbe aghọnghọn ota a hoho mwẹ fua zẹ vbe ovbi atete.
Psalms109:24 Te igbọn mwẹ ghi ye lughọlughọ rhunmwuda ohanmwẹ
Psalms109:25 Emwa gha beghe mwẹ iran ghi fieghe uhunmwu ọsọre mẹ.
Psalms109:26 Yọmwẹ obọ
Psalms109:27 Gie avbe eghian mwẹ rẹn wẹẹ
Psalms109:28 Iran sẹtin gha tie ihẹn mẹ
Psalms109:29 Te a gha ye efa yọ iran ne eghian mwẹ ẹwu; te iran gha mu efa iran yọ zẹ vbe agbada ẹwu.
Psalms109:30 I gha ya urhu ne ọ la kpọnmwẹ Nọyaẹnmwa; I gha rho ẹre vbe uwu ẹbu avbe emwa ni
Psalms109:31 rhunmwuda
Psalms110:1 E Nọyaẹnmwa tama e naẹn mwẹ wẹẹ
Psalms110:2 E Nọyaẹnmwa gha fian te ẹtin arriọba ruẹ ke Zaiọn rre. Rẹn keghi kha wẹẹ
Psalms110:3 Ẹdẹ ne u gha gu avbe eghian ruẹn gbinna
Psalms110:4 E Nọyaẹnmwa vẹe ye urhu nẹ
Psalms110:5 E Nọyaẹnmwa rre obọ erha ọmwa ruẹn
Psalms110:6 Ọ gha bu ohiẹn avbe uhunmwu ẹvbo ọ ghi ya ikun orinmwi vuọn ehe ne a na khọn okuo; ọ gha khọn avbe ọba uhunmwu otọ agbọn hia miotọ.
Psalms110:7 Ọba gha balọ amẹ wọn vbe ẹzẹ ne ọ rre ọkpẹn odẹ orhiọn ghi la ẹre iwu ọ ghi ya khọn miotọ.
Psalms111:1 Wa rho e Nọyaẹnmwa! I gha ya ekhọe mwẹ hia kpọnmwẹ e Nọyaẹnmwa; vbe uwu ẹbu avbe emwa rẹn.
Psalms111:2 U miẹn vbe emwi ne Nọyaẹnmwa ru hia
Psalms111:3 Emwi ne ọ ru hia vuọn ne uyi kevbe orrirri ọba; ọmwata ẹre
Psalms111:4 E Nọyaẹnmwa ma gie ima mianmian avbe iwinna ọyunnuan rẹn
Psalms111:5 Ọ viọ evbare ne iran ni ya ọghọ ne ẹẹn; ẹ i vbe mianmian ile ẹre ẹdẹ.
Psalms111:6 ọ rhie ẹtin ẹnrẹn ma avbe emwa rẹn nẹ
Psalms111:7 Ọmwata kevbe ne ọ ta uhunmwu ẹmwẹ rẹn khin vbe emwi ne ọ ru hia; ẹmwẹ ne ọ ta hia gia mu ẹtin yan;
Psalms111:8 Te iran wa rrọ rhinrin ẹdẹ ẹmwata kevbe uhunmwu ẹmwẹ ọ re a ya rhie iran rre.
Psalms111:9 Ọ fannọ emwa rẹn yotọ ọ keghi gu iran ta ile etẹbitẹ. Ọmwa ne ọ huanrẹn kevbe ne ọ mwẹ ẹtin ọ re irẹn khin.
Psalms111:10 A rhie ọghọ ne Nọyaẹnmwa ọ re ọ ye ọmwa wan. Ọ rhie irẹnmwi ẹmwata ne iran ni rhie uhi ẹre mwẹ
Psalms112:1 Wa rho e Nọyaẹnmwa! Afiangbe ọrọre ọghe iran ni ya ọghọ ne Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms112:2 Ivbi ọmwa esi gha mwẹ ẹtin vbe otọe nii; a gha fiangbe ivbi uniẹn ọnrẹn.
Psalms112:3 Ẹgbẹe ọre ghi gha re emwa ne emwi gue kevbe ni fe
Psalms112:4 Te uwanmwẹ ladian vbe uwu ebiebi ne ọmwa esi
Psalms112:5 Afiangbe ọrọre ọghe ne ọ zẹ emwi obọ vbekpa igho ne a rhie ne emwa mọmọ
Psalms112:6 Ọmwa esi i gbe ihoi ẹdẹ
Psalms112:7 Afianma iyẹn dan i fian ẹẹn
Psalms112:8 Ẹ i hawa
Psalms112:9 Ọ gha rhie ne ne ẹ i mwẹ wọrhọwọrhọ itohan rẹn i vbe baku ọ gha mwẹ ẹtin
Psalms112:10 Emwa dan miẹn ọn
Psalms113:1 Wa rho e Nọyaẹnmwa! Wa ne eguọmwadia e Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms113:2 A gha rho eni ẹnrẹn nian kevbe ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ.
Psalms113:3 Ke ahọ ya sẹ orrie wa rho eni e Nọyaẹnmwa!
Psalms113:4 E Nọyaẹnmwa ọre ọ kha yan uhunmwu ẹvbo hia; uyi ẹre yo gberra avbe ẹrinmwi.
Psalms113:5 ọmwa ọkpa ne ọ yevbe Nọyaẹnmwa Osanobua mwa i rrọ. Ehe ne ọ yo vbe odukhunmwu ọ re ọ ye
Psalms113:6 sokpan
Psalms113:7 Ọ tọn ovbiogue mu ke ebubẹ ladian
Psalms113:8 ọ keghi ye iran gha gu ivbi ọba mu obọ ivbi ọba ọghe avbe emwa rẹn.
Psalms113:9 Ọ rhie ọghọ ne amwẹ ne ẹ i mwẹ ọmọ vbe owa ẹre ọ gie ẹe sẹ ọyẹnmwẹ vbekpa ne ọ na viọ emọ ne ẹẹn. Wa rho e Nọyaẹnmwa

Psalms116:1 Mẹ ho ẹmwẹ Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms116:2 Ọ danmwehọ mwẹ

Psalms116:4 Ẹghẹ nii
Psalms116:5 E Nọyaẹnmwa mwẹ itohan

Psalms116:13 I gha mu ayọn izọhẹ gie Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms116:14 I gha hae ẹre emwi ne I ve ẹre re vbe ehe ne emwa rẹn hia gbe ẹbu yi.

Psalms117:1 Wa rho Nọyaẹnmwa

Psalms118:1 Wa rhie ekpọnmwẹ ne Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms118:2 Wa gie Izrẹl ne emwa rẹn kha wẹẹ
Psalms118:3 Wa gie avbe ohẹn Osanobua kha wẹẹ
Psalms118:4 Wa gie iran hia ni ga ẹe kha wẹẹ
Psalms118:5 Vbe uwu ibaro mwẹ
Psalms118:6 E Nọyaẹnmwa rrọọ yaba mwẹ
Psalms118:7 E Nọyaẹnmwa ọ re ọ yọmwẹ obọ aro mwẹ gha sẹ ọe vbe obọ a gba avbe eghian mwẹ.
Psalms118:8 Ọ kere ne a mu ẹtin yan e Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms118:9 Ọ kere ne a mu ẹtin yan Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms118:10 Eghian nibun ọ re ọ te lẹga mwẹ; sokpan
Psalms118:11 Te iran te lẹ khin khian mwẹ; sokpan
Psalms118:12 Iran te ma rhu mwẹ zẹ vbe owọn
Psalms118:13 Te iran te wa yan rre
Psalms118:14 E Nọyaẹnmwa ya mwẹ gha mwẹ ẹtin I keghi vbe wegbe ọ miẹn mwẹ fan nẹ.
Psalms118:15 Gha họn vbene emwa we uwemwẹ akhọnmiotọ hẹ
Psalms118:16 Ẹtin ẹnrẹn ọ re ọ rhie akhọnmiotọ ne ima ẹtin ẹnrẹn nọkhua nii ne ọ ya khọn okuo!”
Psalms118:17 I i wu
Psalms118:18 Ọ gbe mwẹ ne obọ da mwẹ
Psalms118:19 Wa kie urho Ọgua Osa ye otọ mẹ I gha la uwu ẹre ne I ya kpọnmwẹ e Nọyaẹnmwa.
Psalms118:20 Onurho ọghe Nọyaẹnmwa ọ re ọ na khin avbe ẹmwata ọkpa ọ re a gie ẹe la rọ.
Psalms118:21 I rho ruẹ Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms118:22 Okuta ne iran ni bọ owa he ighe ẹ i maa
Psalms118:23 E Nọyaẹnmwa ọ re ọ ru ọna
Psalms118:24 Ẹdẹ akhọnmiotọ e Nọyaẹnmwa ọ re ọna khin wa gie ima gha ghọghọ
Psalms118:25 Miẹn ima fan Nọyaẹnmwa miẹn ima fan! Gie ẹe dunna ne ima
Psalms118:26 Te Osanobua gha fiangbe ọmwa ne ọ dee vbe eni e Nọyaẹnmwa! Ma rhie afiangbe ne uẹn
Psalms118:27 E Nọyaẹnmwa ọrọre Osanobua ọ wa vbe ru ima ẹse dee ẹdẹ wa viọ abọ erhan mwẹ obọ ne uwa suẹn emwi ukpo nii ne uwa gbe ukpukpẹ lẹga ogiukpo.
Psalms118:28 Wẹ ọrọre Osanobua mwẹ mẹ vbe rhie ekpọnmwẹ ne uẹn
Psalms118:29 Wa rhie ekpọnmwẹ ne Nọyaẹnmwa rhunmwuda rẹn maa etẹbitẹ ọ re ahoẹmwọmwa rẹn vbe khin.
Psalms119:1 Afiangbe ọrọre ọghe iran ne uyinmwẹ ọnrẹn gbae
Psalms119:2 Afiangbe ọrọre ọghe iran ni lele iyi ẹre ni họn ẹmwẹ ne ẹẹn kekhọekekhọe.
Psalms119:3 Iran i ba emwi ku ru; iran khian vbe odẹ e Nọyaẹnmwa.
Psalms119:4 Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms119:5 Vbọrrọ akpawẹ ekhọe mwẹ gha sẹtin mu ẹẹn sẹ
Psalms119:6 A deghẹ I rhie ekhọe lele uhi ruẹ hia
Psalms119:7 Zẹ vbene I ruẹ ibuohiẹn ẹmwata ruẹ I gha ya ekhọe ne ọ rriẹe rho ruẹ.
Psalms119:8 I gha mu uhi ruẹn sẹ; ghẹ he mwẹ ye otọ ẹdẹ!
Psalms119:9 Vbe igbama gha ya sẹtin ya uyimwẹ ọnrẹn khian nọgbae hẹ? Vbekpa ne ọ na ya uhi ruẹ ru emwi.
Psalms119:10 Mẹ hia ne I ye ekhọe mwẹ hia gha ga a; ghẹ gun mwẹ de iyi ruẹ.
Psalms119:11 Mẹ rhie uhi ruẹ ye ekhọe mwẹ
Psalms119:12 I rho ruẹ
Psalms119:13 Mẹ gha mu ehia go ighe avbe uhi hia ne u wẹ rhie rre.
Psalms119:14 Ẹko mwẹ rhiẹnrhiẹn ye ne I gha lele iyi ruẹ sẹ ne I gha mwẹ ẹfe nibun.
Psalms119:15 I ruẹ igiodẹ ruẹ
Psalms119:16 Avbe uhi ruẹ sẹ mwẹ ọyẹnmwẹ mẹ i ra vbe mianmian iyi ruẹ.
Psalms119:17 Gha ru imẹ ne ọguọmwadia ruẹn ẹse ne I miẹn ehe na gha rre agbọn ne I vbe gha ru vbene u ma mwa re.
Psalms119:18 Rhan mwẹ aro
Psalms119:19 Ovbi ẹghẹ kherhe ọ re I ya rre agbọn na
Psalms119:20 Te udu mwẹ ghi fi ye ne I na rhie aro ye odẹ
Psalms119:21 Wẹ gu emwa ni tọn egbe mu gui; te a fi iran unu ighe iran ni de iyi ruẹ.
Psalms119:22 Fan mwẹ vbe obọ ihẹn kevbe ozan iran
Psalms119:23 Iran ni khaemwisẹ miegbe
Psalms119:24 Igiodẹ ruẹ ya ẹko rhiẹnrhiẹn mwẹ; iran ọrọre ne ọ bu mwẹ ude.
Psalms119:25 I lovbiẹ ye uwu ebubẹ ne a gbe mwẹ fi
Psalms119:26 I miẹn emwi ne I he ru hia kue
Psalms119:27 Ru iyobọ mẹ
Psalms119:28 Akhiẹ gbe mwẹ fi otọ
Psalms119:29 Ma mwẹ re ne I ghẹ bibi odẹ. Vbe uwu umamwẹ ruẹn ma mwẹ uhi ruẹ.
Psalms119:30 I khare wẹ 1 gha wa gha họn ẹmwẹ I vbe kakabọ ghe ibuohiẹn ruẹn.
Psalms119:31 Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms119:32 Mẹ gha ya isasegbe mu uhi ruẹ sẹ
Psalms119:33 Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms119:34 Rhan otọ uhi ruẹ ma mwẹ
Psalms119:35 Gunmwẹ gha mu uhi ruẹ sẹ
Psalms119:36 Gie ekhọe mwẹ gha ho ne ọ mu uhi ruẹn sẹ
Psalms119:37 Rhie mwẹ aro hin emwi oya rre
Psalms119:38 Mu eyan ruẹn sẹ ne imẹ ne ọguọmwadia ruẹ
Psalms119:39 Miẹn mwẹ fan vbe obọ ihẹn ne ohan rẹn mu mwẹ
Psalms119:40 I ho ne I gha mu iyi ruẹ sẹ rhie arrọọ ọgbọn mẹ
Psalms119:41 Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms119:42 Ẹghẹ nii
Psalms119:43 Gun mwẹ sẹtin gha ta ẹmwata vbe ẹghẹ hia
Psalms119:44 Mẹ gha ya uhi ruẹ gha ru emwi vbe ẹghẹ hia
Psalms119:45 Mẹ gha rrọọ
Psalms119:46 Mẹ gha na iyẹn iyi ruẹ ma avbe ọba ekhue i ra vbe mu mwẹ.
Psalms119:47 Iyi ruẹ ne a mu sẹ ya ẹko rhiẹnrhiẹn mwẹ
Psalms119:48 I ya ọghọ ne iyi ruẹ
Psalms119:49 Ye eyan ne u yan ne imẹ nẹ ọguọmwadia ruẹ rre
Psalms119:50 Ọ fu mwẹ ẹko rre ya sẹ egbe ẹghẹ ne I na gha rre uwu ibaro rhunmwuda
Psalms119:51 Ẹghẹ hia iran ni tọn egbe mu ya zan mwẹ
Psalms119:52 I ya ohiẹn ne u buru ẹkpo nẹdẹ rre iran keghi fu mwẹ ẹko rre Nọyaẹnmwa.
Psalms119:53 I gha bẹghe avbe emwa dan vbe iran rra uhi ruẹ ohu ghi gha mu mwẹ sọsọsọ.
Psalms119:54 Vbe ovbi ẹghẹ kherhe ne I ya ẹe vbe agbọn te I ya avbe iyi ruẹ gha so ihuan.
Psalms119:55 I ye ruẹ rre vbe asọn
Psalms119:56 Uhi ruẹ ne a mu sẹ ọ re ọ ya ẹko rhiẹnrhiẹn mwẹ.
Psalms119:57 Wẹ okpa ọ re I ho Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms119:58 Ekhọekekhọe mwẹ hia ọ re I ya rinmwian an
Psalms119:59 I mu ẹmwẹ uyinmwẹ mwẹ ro nẹ
Psalms119:60 Vbe ne ai na rhọ eghẹrẹ ẹgiẹgiẹ ọ re I ya ye iyi ruẹ ru emwi.
Psalms119:61 Iran ne emwa dan khuẹn ifi khẹ mwẹ sokpan
Psalms119:62 Vbe ogiasọn
Psalms119:63 Ọse iran hia ni gaa ọ re imẹ khin
Psalms119:64 Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms119:65 Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms119:66 Rhie ẹwaẹn kevbe irẹnmwi mẹ
Psalms119:67 Vbe u te do gbe mwẹ hin ọkhọ rre
Psalms119:68 A miẹn vbene u maa hẹ! A miẹn vbene u mwẹ itohan hẹ
Psalms119:69 Iran ni tọn egbe mu ba mwẹ ohoghe
Psalms119:70 Avbe emwa na i mwẹ irẹnmwi
Psalms119:71 Ọ ma mẹ vbe a gbe mwẹ hin ọkhọ rre
Psalms119:72 Uhi ne uwẹ rhie ne emwa vuọn mwẹ aro ẹsẹse sẹ igho ni rre agbọn na hia.
Psalms119:73 Wẹ ọ re ọ yi mwẹ
Psalms119:74 Ọyẹnmwẹ gha sẹ iran ni ya ọghọ ne uẹn
Psalms119:75 Mẹ rẹnrẹn wẹ
Psalms119:76 Gie ahoẹmwọmwa ruẹn ne ẹ i beghe fu mwẹ ẹko rre zẹ vbene u yan ma imẹ ne ọguọmwadia ruẹ.
Psalms119:77 Tohan mwẹ
Psalms119:78 Te ekhue gha mu iran ni tọn egbe mu ne iran na ba mwẹ ohoghe. Zẹ vbe ọghomwẹ
Psalms119:79 Gie iran ni ya ọghọ ne uẹn hu mwẹ gha dee
Psalms119:80 Gun mwẹ sẹtin gha ya iyi ruẹ ru emwi fo ne a ghẹ gie obọ gba mwẹ.
Psalms119:81 Egbe wa wọ mwẹ Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms119:82 Aro vbo mwẹ ne I ya rhie aro ye odẹ gha khẹ eyan ne u yan rẹn
Psalms119:83 Te I ghi khian ọ rhiae
Psalms119:84 Vbia gha ye mudia kpee sẹ hẹ yi? De ẹghẹ ne u gha ya rria iran ni kpokpo mwẹ ikhi?
Psalms119:85 Iran ni tọn egbe mu ni i ya uhi ruẹ ru emwi
Psalms119:86 Uhi ruẹ hia gia mu ẹtin yan
Psalms119:87 Ekherhe ọ kere ne iran te gbe mwẹ uan sokpan
Psalms119:88 Rhunmwuda ahoẹmwọmwa ruẹn ne ẹ i beghe
Psalms119:89 Ẹmwẹ ruẹn gha rrọọ ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ Nọyaẹnmwa; etẹbitẹ nọ vbe ẹrinmwi.
Psalms119:90 Ẹmwata ruẹ rrọọ ke orre ya sẹ orre; wẹ ọ re ọ mu agbọn gbọ ye ihe okpa ọ kevbe de ziẹn.
Psalms119:91 Emwi hia rrọọ do sẹ ẹdẹnẹrẹ na
Psalms119:92 Akpawẹ ẹ i re ne uhi ruẹ na ya ọyẹnmwẹ sẹ mwẹ
Psalms119:93 Mẹ i fi iyeke gbe igiodẹ ruẹ ẹdẹ
Psalms119:94 Ọwuẹ ọ re imẹ khin
Psalms119:95 Emwa dan mudia khẹ mwẹ
Psalms119:96 I gualọ ẹe miẹn nẹ wẹ emwi hia mwẹ okhiẹ sokpan
Psalms119:97 A miẹn vbene I ho ẹmwẹ uhi ruẹ hẹ
Psalms119:98 Iyi ruẹ rrọ mwẹ ekhọe vbe ẹghẹ hia
Psalms119:99 I rẹn otọ emwi sẹ iran ni ma mwẹ emwi hia
Psalms119:100 I mwẹ ẹwaẹn sẹ avbe eniwanrẹn
Psalms119:101 I lẹ ne avbe uyinmwẹ dan hia
Psalms119:102 I ma fi iyeke gbe igiodẹ ruẹ
Psalms119:103 A miẹn vbe igiodẹ ruẹ rhiẹnrhiẹn hẹ
Psalms119:104 I miẹn ẹwaẹn ruẹ vbe uhi ruẹ
Psalms119:105 Ukpa ne ọ ma mwẹ odẹ ọ re ẹmwẹ ruẹn khin
Psalms119:106 I gha mu eyan mwẹ sẹ wẹ
Psalms119:107 Usẹ ne amerhẹn ọ re ọ sẹ mwẹ Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms119:108 Miẹn erhunmwu ekpọnmwẹ mwẹ Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms119:109 I mu egbe vbe ẹghẹ hia ne I wu ba ẹre
Psalms119:110 Avbe emwa dan khuẹn ifi khẹ mwẹ
Psalms119:111 Iyi ruẹ
Psalms119:112 I tae nẹ ighe te I ra gha lele iyi ruẹ ya sẹ ẹdẹ ne I gha wu.
Psalms119:113 Ohu iran ni ma guobọ ruẹ fo mu mwẹ
Psalms119:114 Wẹ ọrọre ne ọ gbinna mẹ
Psalms119:115 Wa kpao vbe ehe ne I ye rre
Psalms119:116 Rhie ẹtin mẹ vbene u khare
Psalms119:117 Da mwẹ yi
Psalms119:118 Wẹ he iran hia ni fi iyeke gbe uhi ruẹ yotọ; kẹkan ọ re emwamwa erẹrẹ iran khin.
Psalms119:119 Te uwẹ ghe emwa dan hia zẹ vbe iku
Psalms119:120 Ohan mu mwẹ rhunmwuda ruẹ
Psalms119:121 Mẹ ru nọgbae kevbe nọkere nẹ
Psalms119:122 Yan wẹ u gha ye ọguọmwadia ruẹ obọ; ghẹ gie emwa ni hio hiẹnhiẹn yan mwẹ!
Psalms119:123 Te aro ghi vbo mwẹ ne I ya khẹ imiẹn fan ẹsọhẹ ruẹ
Psalms119:124 Ya obọ aho ẹmwẹ ọmwa ruẹn ne ẹ i beghe mu mwẹ
Psalms119:125 Ọguọmwadia ruẹ mẹ khin; rhie irẹnmwi mẹ
Psalms119:126 E Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms119:127 iho ẹmwẹ iyi ruẹ sẹẹ igoru
Psalms119:128 Rhunmwuda ọnii
Psalms119:129 Ọyunnuan ọ re iruẹmwi ruẹn khin
Psalms119:130 Irhanotọ iruẹmwi ruẹn rhie uwanmwẹ rre
Psalms119:131 Vbe uwu ne I na gualọ iyi ruẹ khian
Psalms119:132 Werriegbe ghe mwẹ
Psalms119:133 Da mwẹ yi ne I ghẹ de
Psalms119:134 Fan mwẹ vbe obọ iran ni zẹ mwẹ kpokpo
Psalms119:135 Ya a gu ọmwa rrọọ ọwuẹ fiangbe mwẹ
Psalms119:136 Ameve mwẹ lẹ kua zẹ vbe ẹzẹ
Psalms119:137 Ọmwata ọ re uwẹ khin
Psalms119:138 Ilele ne u mu ye otọ
Psalms119:139 Ohu ne ọ mu mwẹ tọn vbe erhẹn vbe uwu imẹ
Psalms119:140 U miẹn vbe eyan ruẹn de ziẹn hẹ
Psalms119:141 Ọmwa ne a zan ke ne ai ka yọ mẹ khin
Psalms119:142 Emwata ọ re uhi ruẹ khin ẹghẹ hia.
Psalms119:143 Mẹ vuọn ne ohawa kevbe ukpokpo
Psalms119:144 Emwata ọ re igiodẹ ruẹ khin vbe ẹghẹ hia
Psalms119:145 Ekhọe mwẹ hia ọ re I ya kpe tie ruẹ
Psalms119:146 Mẹ da tie ruẹ
Psalms119:147 Vbe owẹn te yan rre
Psalms119:148 Te I rhan aro ua ye ukpo ne ẹdẹ gbe
Psalms119:149 Họn urhu mwẹ Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms119:150 Iran ne ekhọe dan
Psalms119:151 Sokpan
Psalms119:152 Ọ kpẹre ne I ghi rẹn igiodẹ ruẹ

Psalms119:154 Gbinna mẹ
Psalms119:155 A i ra miẹn emwa dan fan
Psalms119:156 Sokpan
Psalms119:157 Eghian mwẹ kevbe iran ni kpokpo mwẹ bun
Psalms119:158 I gha bẹghe avbe ọgueva nii
Psalms119:159 Ghe vbene igiodẹ ruẹ yẹ mwẹ hẹ Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms119:160 Udu uhi ruẹ ọrọre ẹmwata
Psalms119:161 Iran ni mwẹ ẹtin gha gunmwẹ khọn vbe ai mwẹ otọ
Psalms119:162 U miẹn vbe ẹko rhiẹnrhiẹn mwẹ ye eyan ruẹn hẹ
Psalms119:163 Te ohoghe ye ẹko hu mwẹ rhunmwuda
Psalms119:164 Igba ihinrọn ọ re I kpọnmwẹ ọn vbe ẹdẹ
Psalms119:165 Iran ni ho ẹmwẹ uhi ruẹ fe vbe ẹbe fẹẹrẹ
Psalms119:166 Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms119:167 Mẹ lele iruẹmwi ruẹn
Psalms119:168 Mẹ lele iyi kevbe igiodẹ ruẹ
Psalms119:169 Gie utumwẹ ne I ya nọ iyobọ
Psalms119:170 Họn erhunmwu mwẹ
Psalms119:171 Mẹ gha rho ruẹ vbe ẹghẹ hia
Psalms119:172 I gha ya uhi ruẹ so ihuan
Psalms119:173 Mu egbe ne u ya yọmwẹ obọ vbe ẹghẹ hia
Psalms119:174 Ghe vbene I rhie aro ye odẹ gha khẹ ẹsọhẹ imiẹnfan ruẹn Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms119:175 Rhie arrọọ mẹ ne I sẹtin gha rho ruẹ
Psalms119:176 I gha bibi yo bibi rre
Psalms120:1 Ẹghẹ ne I na gha rre uwu ibaro
Psalms120:2 Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms120:3 Wa ne ọhọn ohoghe
Psalms120:4 Ifẹnmwẹ ne ọ mu
Psalms120:5 A gha gu uwa yin te ọ yevbe ne ọmwa rre Mẹsiẹk ra ne a rre uwu ẹbu avbe ivbi e Keda.
Psalms120:6 Ọ kpee gbe ne I kegha yin
Psalms120:7 mẹ gha guan ẹmwẹ ọfumwegbe
Psalms121:1 Me gha tọn aro mu ghe avbe oke nii. De ehe ne iyobọ mwẹ gha ke rre?
Psalms121:2 Iyobọ mwẹ gha ke ehe ne Nọyaẹnmwa ye rre
Psalms121:3 Rẹn i ra giẹ uwẹ de
Psalms121:4 Ọmwa ne ọ rhie Izrẹl lẹre ẹ i vbiẹhunde
Psalms121:5 Nọyaẹnmwa gha gbe aro ghe ruẹ

Psalms122:1 Ẹko mwẹ rhiẹnrhiẹn

Psalms126:1 Ẹghẹ ne Nọyaẹnmwa na viọ ima dọlegbe gha die Jerusalẹm
Psalms126:2 U miẹn ogie ne ima giẹ u miẹn ihuan oghọghọ ne ima so. Ẹghẹ nii ọ re avbe uhunmwu ẹvbo nekpa na kha wẹẹ
Psalms126:3 Vbe ẹmwata

Psalms127:1 A deghẹ Nọyaẹnmwa ma bọ owa

Psalms127:3 E Nọyaẹnmwa ọ re ọ ye emọ ru ọmwa ẹse afiangbe ne ọ sẹre ọ re iran khin.
Psalms127:4 Emọ ne ọmwa mwẹ vbe ẹghẹ igbama te iran ye vbe ifẹnmwẹ vbe obọ ovbiyokuo.
Psalms127:5 Afiangbe nọ ne ọmwa

Psalms132:18 I gha ye ekhue gbe avbe eghian rẹn egbe sokpan arriọba ẹre gha dunna ọ ghi vbe gha muan yọ.”
Psalms133:1 U miẹn vbene ọ maa hẹ u miẹn vbe ọ vbe rhiẹnrhiẹn hẹ ne emwa Osanobua gha gu egbe yin vbe ọfumwegbe.

Psalms136:1 Wa rhie ekpọnmwẹ ne Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms136:2 Wa rhie ekpọnmwẹ ne nọkpọlọ sẹ avbe ẹbọ hia
Psalms136:3 Wa rhie ekpọnmwẹ ne ne ọ mwẹ ẹtin sẹẹ vbe uwu avbe eniyaẹnmwa
Psalms136:4 Rẹn okpa ọre ọ winna iwinna ọyunnuan nekhua
Psalms136:5 Ẹwaẹn rẹn ọ re ọ ya yi avbe ẹrinmwi
Psalms136:6 Ọ bu agbọn na yan uhunmwu amẹ etẹbitẹ ọ re ahoẹmwọmwa rẹn khin.
Psalms136:7 Rẹn ọ re ọ yi uki kevbe owẹn
Psalms136:8 Owẹn ne ọ khaemwisẹ yan avan
Psalms136:9 Ne uki kevbe avbe orhọnmwẹ gha kha yan asọn
Psalms136:10 Ọ gbele emọdiọn ọghe ivbi Igipt
Psalms136:11 Ọ hẹ ivbi Izrẹl ladian hin Igipt rre
Psalms136:12 Obọ ọre ne ọ wegbe kevbe ekuabọ ẹtin ẹnrẹn
Psalms136:13 Ọ wannọ Okun Nọbaa; etẹbitẹ ọ re ahoẹmwọmwa rẹn khin.
Psalms136:14 Ọ keghi viọ emwa rẹn la ẹe gberra
Psalms136:15 Sokpan ọ gie ẹzẹ gbele ọba Igipt kevbe ivbiyokuo ẹre etẹbitẹ ọ re ahoẹmwọmwa rẹn khin.
Psalms136:16 Ọ su emwa rẹn la ato gberra
Psalms136:17 Ọ gbele avbe ọba ni mwẹ ẹtin
Psalms136:18 Ọ gbele avbe ọba ni hinusi
Psalms136:19 E Saihọn ne ọba ivbi Amọri; etẹbitẹ ọ re ahoẹmwọmwa rẹn khin.
Psalms136:20 Kevbe Ọg ne ọba ivbi e Basian; etẹbitẹ ọ re ahoẹmwọmwa rẹn khin.
Psalms136:21 Ọ keghi mu otọ iran ne emwa irẹn etẹbitẹ ọ re ahoẹmwọmwa rẹn khin.
Psalms136:22 Ọ keghi viọ ne Izrẹl ne emwa irẹn
Psalms136:23 Ọ ma mianmian mwa vbe a khọn miẹn ima otọ
Psalms136:24 Ọ keghi fannọ mwa hin obọ eghian mwa rre etẹbitẹ ọ re ahoẹmwọmwa rẹn khin.
Psalms136:25 Ọ rhie evbare ne emwi ne a yi ni rrọ hia; etẹbitẹ ọ re ahoẹmwọmwa rẹn khin.
Psalms136:26 Wa rhie ekpọnmwẹ ne Osanobua ẹrinmwi
Psalms137:1 Ọkpẹn ẹzẹ e Babilọn ọ re ima na tota; evba ọ re ima na viẹ
Psalms137:2 Ma viọ akpata ima rrọ
Psalms137:3 Iran ni viọ ima keghi wẹ ne ima so ihuan ma iran; iran wẹ ne ima ku ne iran ghe wẹẹ: “Wa so ihuan e Zaiọn ọkpa ma ima!”
Psalms137:4 Vbe ima ghi ra gu gha so ihuan ne Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms137:5 I i gha dọlegbe guara kpe akpata; a deghẹ I mianmian uwẹ
Psalms137:6 Ii gha dọlegbe guara so ihuan ọvbehe; a deghẹ I ma ye ruẹ rre; a deghẹ I ma rhie ruẹ ke odaro oghọghọ mwẹ hia!

Psalms137:8 E Babilọn

Psalms138:1 Ekhọekekhọe mwẹ hia

Psalms139:5 Te u wa lẹga mwẹ khinkhian vbe egbe hia; u keghi ya ẹtin ruẹn degue mwẹ.
Psalms139:6 Vbene u rẹnmwẹ dinmwi gbe

Psalms139:10 wẹ gha rre evba ne u su mwẹ u gha rre evba ne u yọmwẹ obọ.

Psalms146:1 Rho e Nọyaẹnmwa! Rho e Nọyaẹnmwa wẹ ekhọe mwẹ!
Psalms146:2 Mẹ gha rho ruẹ vbe ẹghẹ ne I ya rre agbọn; I gha so ihuan ghe Osanobua mwẹ
Psalms146:3 Wa ghẹ mu ẹtin yan ekaolotu emwa nagbọn; ọmwa nagbọn i ra sẹtin miẹn ruẹn fan.
Psalms146:4 Iran gha wulo
Psalms146:5 Afiangbe nọ ne ọmwa ne ọ mwẹ Osanobua Jekọb
Psalms146:6 Ọmwa ne ọ yi ẹrinmwi
Psalms146:7 ọ bu ohiẹn ne ọmwa ne a zẹ kpokpo
Psalms146:8 Ọ ghi vbe rhan avbe arhuaro aro. Ọ munọ iran ni dele kpaegbe; ọ ho ẹmwẹ emwa ẹmwata ọghọe.

Psalms146:10 E Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms147:1 Wa rho e Nọyaẹnmwa! Ọ kere ne a gha so ihuan urhomwẹ ghe Osanobua mwa; ọ rhiẹnrhiẹn
Psalms147:2 E Nọyaẹnmwa ra dọlegbe rhie Jerusalẹm ye ukpo ẹre
Psalms147:3 Ọ mu iran ne ekhọe ẹre rhiae egbe rran
Psalms147:4 Ọ ta inu ne avbe orhọnmwẹ ra gha khin nẹ
Psalms147:5 Nọkhua ke ne ọ mwẹ ẹtin ọ re Osanobua mwa khin; ai sẹtin gie ẹwaẹn ẹnrẹn.
Psalms147:6 Ọ ghi tọn omwa ne ọ mu egherriotọ mu
Psalms147:7 Wa so ihuan urhomwẹ ghe Nọyaẹnmwa
Psalms147:8 Ọ tan okuku amẹ gue iso
Psalms147:9 Ọ rhie evbare ne avbe aranmwẹ oha
Psalms147:10 Ẹ i re avbe ẹsin ni mwẹ ẹtin ọ re ẹko rhiẹnrhiẹn yi
Psalms147:11 Sokpan iran ni ya ọghọ ne ẹẹn ọ re ọ ye ẹko rhiẹnrhiẹn ọẹn iran ni mu ẹtin van aho ẹmwẹ ọmwa rẹn ne ẹ i beghe.
Psalms147:12 Jerusalẹm wa rho e Nọyaẹnmwa! E Zaiọn
Psalms147:13 Rẹn ruẹe ne onurho uwa wegbe; ọ fiangbe emwa ruẹn.
Psalms147:14 Ọ ruẹe ne ẹbe fo la ehe ne otọe uwa lae
Psalms147:15 Ọ gu otọe guan
Psalms147:16 Ọ wa esia ye otọ zẹ vbe igbu ukpọn
Psalms147:17 Ọ gie ikpamẹ ne ọ zeze zẹvbe ikpokuta rre
Psalms147:18 Ọ guanrẹn

Psalms147:20 Ọ ma vbe he ru ọna ne ẹvbo ọvbehe; iran na rẹn uhi ẹre. Wa rho e Nọyaẹnmwa!

Psalms149:1 Wa rho e Nọyaẹnmwa! Wa so ihuan ọgbọn ghe Nọyaẹnmwa; wa rho ẹre vbe uwu iko emwa rẹn ni ya ẹe yi!
Psalms149:2 Izrẹl gha ghọghọ
Psalms149:3 Wa ya iku rho eni ẹnrẹn
Psalms149:4 E Nọyaẹnmwa sẹ ọyẹnmwẹ ye ẹmwẹ emwa irẹn
Psalms149:5 Wa gie emwa Osanobua gha ghọghọ ye akhọnmiotọ iran
Psalms149:6 Wa gie iran kakabọ go ladian
Psalms149:7 Ne iran ya khọn avbe uhunmwu ẹvbo muotọ
Psalms149:8 Ne iran ya ọgiọrọ rro avbe ọba iran
Psalms149:9 Ne iran rri avbe uhunmwu ẹvbo oya zẹ vbene Osanobua gie ọnọna ọrọre akhọnmiotọ ọghe emwa Osanobua. Wa rho e Nọyaẹnmwa!
Psalms150:1 Wa rho e Nọyaẹnmwa! Wa rho Osanobua vbe uwu Ọgua Osa ẹre! Wa rho ẹtin ẹnrẹn vbe ẹrinmwi!
Psalms150:2 Wa rho ẹrẹ ye iwinna nekhua ne ọ winna ẹn; wa rho ukpọlọmwẹ ọnrẹn ne ọ sẹ ehia.
Psalms150:3 Wa ya okpe rho ẹre
Psalms150:4 Wa ye ema kevbe iku rho ẹre
Psalms150:5 Wa ye ukusẹ rho ẹre
Psalms150:6 Emwi ni rre agbọn hia
Proverbs1:1 Avbe itan e Solomọn ne ovbi e Devid ne ọba Izrẹl.
Proverbs1:2 Avbe itan ne u gha ya rẹn ẹwaẹn kevbe ibude esi
Proverbs1:3 Iran gha sẹtin ma ruẹn vbene a ya ye ẹwaẹn yin agbọn hẹ
Proverbs1:4 Iran gha sẹtin ye ọmwa ne ọ ma rẹn emwi rhọkpa khian ne ọ gu ẹwaẹn
Proverbs1:5 Avbe itan na gha sẹtin rhie ba ẹwaẹn avbe umẹwaẹn
Proverbs1:6 Vbene a gha na miẹn wẹ iran ghi sẹtin gha rẹn ẹmwẹ ni dinmwi ne a ya itan ta
Proverbs1:7 Ọmwa ne ọ ho ne ọ gha wan
Proverbs1:8 Ovbi mwẹ
Proverbs1:9 Emwi ne iran ma ruẹn re gha dọlọ uyinmwẹ ruẹn yi zẹ vbene ọza uhunmwu ra ọghe ẹyaẹn ne ọ mose
Proverbs1:10 Ovbi mwẹ
Proverbs1:11 Adeghẹ iran khare wẹẹ
Proverbs1:12 Iran sẹtin gha rre agbọn
Proverbs1:13 Ma gha miẹn ẹfe ughughan nibun
Proverbs1:14 Do deba ima
Proverbs1:15 Ovbi mwẹ
Proverbs1:16 Iran i sẹtin ziengbe ne iran ghẹ ru emwi dan. Iran wa mu egbe vbe ehe hia ne iran de izigha.
Proverbs1:17 Ẹ i mwẹ esa ne a gha rhuẹ ifi ahianmwẹ vbe ne ahianmwẹ ne a rhuẹ ọ re khẹ ghe ọmwa.
Proverbs1:18 Sokpan
Proverbs1:19 Ẹmwẹ oyi ne a rha ọ re oyi lele rrie
Proverbs1:20 Danmwehọ vbe ẹwaẹn tie emwa vbe adesẹ ore kevbe ẹki.
Proverbs1:21 Ọ tọn urhu mu gha tie emwa vbe onurho ẹvbo kevbe ehe ne emwa ghi na gbe ẹbu ọ wẹẹ
Proverbs1:22 “Wa ne akpa! Inu ẹghẹ wa ho ne uwa ya gha re akpa? Inu ẹghẹ wa ra ghọghọ ye irẹnmwi ne uwa ya gbogiẹ la? Wa i ra ruẹ emwi ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ ra?
Proverbs1:23 Wa gha danmwehọ vbe a gha gu uwa gui
Proverbs1:24 Ọ kpẹre ne I kegha tie uwa
Proverbs1:25 Wa fi iyeke gbe ibude mwẹ hia
Proverbs1:26 Rhunmwuda ọnii
Proverbs1:27 Ẹghẹ ne ọ gha na hihiẹ yan uwa zẹ vbe okpẹhoho
Proverbs1:28 Ẹghẹ nii
Proverbs1:29 Irẹnmwi ma he mwẹ emwi ne ọ khin ne uwẹ ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ
Proverbs1:30 Wa ma he vbe gualọ ibude mwẹ ẹdẹdẹmwẹdẹ ra ne uwa danmwehọ vbe a gha dia uwa ye odẹ.
Proverbs1:31 Rhunmwuda ọnii nian
Proverbs1:32 Emwa ne ẹ i mwẹ ẹwaẹn wulo rhunmwuda iran he ẹwaẹn yotọ. Ai tie emwi emwi ọghe iran ne akpa ọ re ọ ra fuẹn iran an.
Proverbs1:33 Sokpan
Proverbs2:1 Ovbi mwẹ
Proverbs2:2 Gha danmwehọ ẹmwẹ ewaẹn
Proverbs2:3 Ẹn
Proverbs2:4 Ye ẹtin hia gualọ ẹe
Proverbs2:5 A deghẹ u ru vberriọ
Proverbs2:6 E Nọyaẹnmwa ọ re ọ ya ẹwaẹn ne ọmwa. Obọ ẹre ọ re ẹwaẹn kevbe irẹnmwi ke rre.
Proverbs2:7 Ọ rhie iyobọ kevbe ugue ne iran ne ẹmwata ne ẹ i zẹ ibeleku.
Proverbs2:8 Ọ degue iran ni ya obọ esi mu emwa ọvbehe
Proverbs2:9 U gha rhie ehọ mẹ ta yi
Proverbs2:10 U ghi do gha wan
Proverbs2:11 Vbene u ghe umian emwi hẹ
Proverbs2:12 Ẹ i ghi vbe gie uwẹ ya ru emwi ne ọ ma gba. Iran guẹ gha gban egbe ne emwa ni ya ẹmwẹ ne iran ta fian otighi fi emwa egbe.
Proverbs2:13 Avbe emwa ni sẹ emwi ẹmwata ne a ru rae ne iran ya gha rre uwu ebiebi orukhọ.
Proverbs2:14 Emwa ne iba ne a zẹ wa yẹ
Proverbs2:15 Avbe ọgueva ne ẹ i gia mu ẹtin yan.
Proverbs2:16 U gha sẹtin yangbe avbe ikhuo ni ku ogboi ni te ho ne iran ya aranmwẹ ne miẹnmiẹnmiẹn siọ kẹ egbe.
Proverbs2:17 Okhuo ne ọ ma guobọ ọdọ ẹre
Proverbs2:18 U gha la owa ẹre
Proverbs2:19 Ai miẹn ọmwa ne ọ yo owa ẹre ne ọ miẹn uhunmwu ya ke ẹe rre. Ẹ i ghi dọlegbe ye owẹ kan odẹ ne ọ rrie agbọn.
Proverbs2:20 Rhunmwuda ọnii u ghi gha ya egbe ta emwa esi ne u gha yin uyinmwẹ esi.
Proverbs2:21 Emwa ẹmwata

Proverbs3:1 Ovbi mwẹ
Proverbs3:2 Emwi ne I ma ruẹn re gha rhie utọmwẹ nuẹn
Proverbs3:3 Ghẹ rhie obọ hin agba ẹko ọmwa kevbe ekhọe esi rre
Proverbs3:4 U gha ru vbenian
Proverbs3:5 Ya ẹtin ruẹn hia mu ẹtin yan e Nọyaẹnmwa. Ghẹ mu ẹtin yan emwi ne uwẹ ro ighe uwẹ rẹnrẹn.
Proverbs3:6 Gha ye Nọyaẹnmwa rre vbe emwi ne u ru hia
Proverbs3:7 Ghẹ gie ekhọe ruẹ gha guẹ zẹ iro wẹ u wan sẹẹ vbe ne u ye; emwi ọkpa wa nọ wẹ ne u gha họn ẹmwẹ ne Nọyaẹnmwa
Proverbs3:8 U gha ru vberriọ
Proverbs3:9 Ya ọghọ ne Nọyaẹnmwa vbekpa ne u gha na ya avbe emwi ne ọ maa sẹ vbe ugbo ruẹ zẹ ọhẹ gie ẹe.
Proverbs3:10 U gha ru ẹe vberriọ
Proverbs3:11 Ovbi mwẹ
Proverbs3:12 Emwa ne Nọyaẹnmwa ho ẹmwẹ ọnrẹn ọ re ọ dia ye odẹ
Proverbs3:13 Afiangbe nọ ne ọmwa ne ọ ghi do khian ne ọ wan
Proverbs3:14 Ere ne ọ rrọ sẹ ọghe esiliva
Proverbs3:15 Ẹwaẹn ghan sẹẹ avbe ikpẹrọnmwọ
Proverbs3:16 Ẹwaẹn ọ re ọ rhie utọmwẹ ne ọmwa
Proverbs3:17 Ẹwaẹn gha sẹtin ye ẹdagbọn ruẹn khian ne ọ rhiẹnrhiẹn

Proverbs3:19 Ẹwaẹn obọ ẹre
Proverbs3:20 Ẹwaẹn rẹn ọ re ọ ru ẹe ne avbe ẹzẹ gha lẹ

Proverbs3:23 U gha sẹtin lele odẹ ruẹ gha khian

Proverbs3:25 U i ra vbe hawa ye ẹmwẹ ọkhọ udomwurri
Proverbs3:26 E Nọyaẹnmwa gha rhie ruẹ lẹre. Ẹ i vbe guẹ de ye ifi.

Proverbs4:9 Rẹn gha vbe gha re ẹde uyi ruẹ.”
Proverbs4:10 Danmwehọ mwẹ ovbi mwẹ. Ẹmwẹ ne I tama ruẹn
Proverbs4:11 I ma ruẹn ẹwaẹn nẹ
Proverbs4:12 Idobo rhọkpa i ra vbe gha rre uwẹ odẹ

Proverbs4:14 Ghẹ yo ehe ne avbe emwa dan yo. Ghẹ ya egbe ta emwa dan.
Proverbs4:15 Ghẹ danmwẹ ọẹn. Lẹ ne emwi dan! Fieghe uhunmwu yọ ne u lele odẹ ruẹ gha khian.

Proverbs11:1 Osanobua i ho ẹmwẹ emwa ni ya esike omuru mwa emwi. emwi ne a mwa ẹse ọ re ọ ye ọre.
Proverbs11:2 Emwa ni tọn egbe mu gha fa egbe ua wan
Proverbs11:3 Adeghẹ u maa
Proverbs11:4 Ẹfe i miẹn emwi okpa ru wẹn vbe ẹdẹ ne uwu gha sẹ uẹ egbe
Proverbs11:5 Uyinmwẹ esi sẹtin ye agbọn rọkhọ ne ọmwa esi rre
Proverbs11:6 Uyinmwẹ ẹmwata sẹtin fan ọmwa ẹmwata vbe irri
Proverbs11:7 Ọmwa dan gha wu
Proverbs11:8 A degue emwa ẹmwata hin obọ ọlọghọmwa rre
Proverbs11:9 Ẹmwẹ unu emwa ne ekhọe ẹre mu rhu
Proverbs11:10 Agbọn gha maa emwa ẹmwata vbe ẹvbo
Proverbs11:11 Emwa ẹmwata gha na erhunmwu ne ẹvbo
Proverbs11:12 Ukọnmwẹ nọ ne a gha ya unu sakan ẹrrẹe. A dẹghe ọmọ ne egbe maa ọ re u khin
Proverbs11:13 A i ta ẹmwẹ uma ma ọmwa ne unu bọbọ
Proverbs11:14 Ẹvbo ne ẹ i mwẹ ne ọ su ẹe
Proverbs11:15 U gha kha ighe u gha mu osa orhunmwuyẹn hae
Proverbs11:16 Emwa hia ọ re ọ yọghọ ne okhuo ne ọ rẹn enegbe

Proverbs26:2 Ẹbọ ne a tie ne ọmwa i miẹn emwi ru uwẹ re sokpan a ma wẹ te u gele fidọn. Te iran yevbe ahianmwẹ ni tin gberra vbe ne iran i na vbe tin kan otọe.
Proverbs26:3 Te a ye asan gbe ẹsin

Ecclesiastes3:21 De ọmwa ne ọ gha sẹtin tae rhuan yi wẹ te orhiọn ọmwa nagbọn la ghe odukhunmwu vbene ọghe aranmwẹ na la ghe otọ gha rrie uwu otọ?
Ecclesiastes3:22 Rhunmwuda ọnii
Ecclesiastes4:1 I keghi vbe dọlegbe do ghe avbe emwi hia ni sunu ne ẹ i la ihe vbe agbọn
Ecclesiastes4:2 Ọmakin iran ni wulo lahin agbọn na rre nẹ
Ecclesiastes4:3 Sokpan
Ecclesiastes4:4 I vbe rẹn emwi ne ọ si ẹe nẹ
Ecclesiastes4:5 Emwa khare wẹ akpa ọ re ọ viọ obọ ku akharha ne ohanmwẹ gbe ẹe rua.
Ecclesiastes4:6 Ughaghe ẹmwata onii gele khin
Ecclesiastes4:7 Emwi ọvbehe vbe rrọ ne I miẹn vbe agbọn na
Ecclesiastes4:8 Wa ghe ọmwa na ne irẹn okpa vbe ẹhi ẹre rre owa. Ẹ i mwẹ ọmọ
Ecclesiastes4:9 Emwi eva ọ re ọ maa sẹẹ okpa rhunmwuda
Ecclesiastes4:10 Adeghẹ ọkpa vbọ de
Ecclesiastes4:11 Adeghẹ oni fi
Ecclesiastes4:12 Arhienva gha sẹtin rrọ igbinna ne orhiọnkpa i ra sẹtin rhie uhunmwu da. Irri ne a ba ẹre eha kugbe I rherhe fian.
Ecclesiastes4:13 Ọmwa wa sẹtin ke ovbiogue kpao do rriọba ẹvbo ẹre
Ecclesiastes4:14 
Ecclesiastes4:15 I keghi do roro ẹmwẹ emwa hia ni rre agbọn na
Ecclesiastes4:16 Ugbẹnso a i sẹtin ka inu emwa ne ọba khaemwisẹ yan
Ecclesiastes5:1 Hẹko gha ya ẹwaẹn yo Ọgua Osa. Ọ kere ne a yo ya ruẹ emwi vbe evba sẹẹ ne a ya gha zọ ese zẹvbe avbe ọzuọ ni ma rẹn emwi ne ọ kere hin e ne ọ ma kei rre.
Ecclesiastes5:2 Gha roro ẹmwẹ u kegha tae
Ecclesiastes5:3 Vbene u ya si osi ye emwi
Ecclesiastes5:4 Rhunmwuda ọnii
Ecclesiastes5:5 A ma zẹdẹ ve emwi ọ re ọ maa sẹẹ a ghi ve nẹ
Ecclesiastes5:6 Ghẹ gie ẹmwẹ ne unu ruẹn siọ fi orukhọ vbene u gha na ya tama ohẹn Osanobua ighe ọdẹn ọ re u gbe. Vbọzẹ ne u gha na ya Osanobua mu ohu ghe ruẹ yi? Vbọzẹ ne u gha na giee fuẹn uan
Ecclesiastes5:7 Vbene ọ khọn ruẹn u mina sẹ hẹ
Ecclesiastes5:8 Ghẹ giee yan uwe unu uan adeghẹ arriọba kpokpo ovbiogue
Ecclesiastes5:9 Ọba tobọ ẹre emwiorhọ ọ re ọ hẹnhẹn egbe yan.
Ecclesiastes5:10 Aro ruẹ gha wu ye igho
Ecclesiastes5:11 Vbene u vbe ya mwẹ igho yọ
Ecclesiastes5:12 Ọmwa ne ọ winna sẹtin miẹn evbare gha re
Ecclesiastes5:13 Vbe ghe emwiọkpa ne ọ mu ọmwa ohan ne I vbe miẹn vbe agbọn na: emwa ghi gha si igho koko hinrre khẹ ẹdẹ ne a gha ho sẹ ọre egbe.
Ecclesiastes5:14 Vbe iyeke ọnii
Ecclesiastes5:15 Vbe ne ima ya lao agbọn na ọ re avbe ya kọe ladian
Ecclesiastes5:16 Ọna ma gba! Vbene ima ya rre ọ re a ya rrie. Ma ghi gha miẹn ẹsọn ẹsọn
Ecclesiastes5:17 Emwi ne a ghi miẹn vbọ ọrọre ne a gha lo ẹdẹ agbọn mwa vbe uwu ebiebi kevbe irhiaẹko
Ecclesiastes5:18 Emwi ne I gualọ otọ ẹre miẹn ọ re ọna khin wẹ
Ecclesiastes5:19 Adeghẹ Osanobua rhie ne ọmwa ne ọ gha mwẹ emwi kevbe ne ọ fe
Ecclesiastes5:20 Ugbẹn vbe Osanobua ghi kuee yọ ẹre re nẹ

Ecclesiastes6:2 Osanobua ghi ya ẹfe ne ọmwa
Ecclesiastes6:3 Ọmwa sẹtin biẹlẹ emọ iyisẹn
Ecclesiastes6:4 Ẹ i ghi mwẹ asa ne ọmọ nii akpawẹ te a biẹ ọe

Ecclesiastes6:9 Ọna i vbe maa

Ecclesiastes7:2 Ọ kere ne a gha rrie owa ne a na khiẹ sẹẹ ne a gha rrie owa ne a na tie ẹbu eghọ
Ecclesiastes7:3 Akhiẹ ọ re ọ maa sẹẹ ogiẹ
Ecclesiastes7:4 Ọmwa ne ọ wa ro iro vbekpa ọyẹnmwẹ vbe ẹghẹ hia
Ecclesiastes7:5 Ọ kere ne emwa esi gha gu ọmwa gui sẹẹ ne avbe akpa do gha kpe ọbọbọ ne ọmwa.
Ecclesiastes7:6 Ọzuọ gha giẹ
Ecclesiastes7:7 Ọmwa ne ọ wan gha mu ọmwa ru
Ecclesiastes7:8 Ufomwẹ emwi ọ re ọ maa sẹ omuhẹn ọnrẹn. Izin egbe ọre ọ maa sẹ itẹngbemu.
Ecclesiastes7:9 Ohu gha mu ẹẹn
Ecclesiastes7:10 Ghẹ gha nọ wẹẹ
Ecclesiastes7:11 Te ọ te kei ne ọmwaikọmwa ne ọ rre agbọn na gha wan
Ecclesiastes7:12 ọ gha vbe ru ẹe ne ẹkun sẹ uẹ otọ zẹ vbene igho vbe ru. Ẹwaẹn sẹtin ru ẹe ne u gha rrọ vbe a i mwẹ ẹbe
Ecclesiastes7:13 Roro avbe emwi ne Osanobua ru nẹ. De ọmwa ne ọ gha sẹtin dia emwi ne Osanobua ru nẹ wẹ ne ọ gọ?
Ecclesiastes7:14 Emwi gha khian hẹnnẹhẹnnẹ ne uẹn
Ecclesiastes7:15 Te ẹdẹ agbọn mwẹ kulo
Ecclesiastes7:16 Rhunmwuda ọnii
Ecclesiastes7:17 Sokpan ghẹ vbe gha re ọmwa dan ra akpa
Ecclesiastes7:18 Gie emwi hia gha re oreghe. Adeghẹ u ya ọghọ ne Osanobua
Ecclesiastes7:19 Ẹwaẹn gha sẹtin ru emwi ne ọmwa
Ecclesiastes7:20 Orhiọnkpa i rre agbọn na ne ọ wa ru emwi ẹse khian ne ẹ i vbe mwẹ abakuru.
Ecclesiastes7:21 Ghẹ danmwehọ ẹmwẹ hia
Ecclesiastes7:22 Wẹ tobọọ rẹnrẹn wẹ ẹ i re avbiẹ inugba wẹ he rhovbiẹ emwa ọvbehe.
Ecclesiastes7:23 Ẹwaẹn mwẹ ọ re I ya danmwẹ avbe emwi na hia ghe
Ecclesiastes7:24 Vbe ọmwaikọmwa gha ya sẹtin gualọ otọ emwi ne a ya ẹdagbọn ọmwa miẹn hẹ? Ọ dinmwi ne ima gbe
Ecclesiastes7:25 Sokpan

Ecclesiastes7:28 I ye vbe gualọ avbe ewanniẹn ọvbehe

Ecclesiastes8:1 Ọmwa ne ọ wan okpa ọ re ọ rẹn emwi ne a mobọ ya emwi kha. Ẹwaẹn ọ re ọ ya ẹe mu ẹẹn mu ẹẹn ogiẹ
Ecclesiastes8:2 Gha ru vbene ọba khare
Ecclesiastes8:3 Ọba wa sẹtin ru emwi ne ọ khọn rẹn
Ecclesiastes8:4 Asẹ ọ re ọba ya ru emwi
Ecclesiastes8:5 U gha ni zẹ vbene ọ khare

Ecclesiastes9:9 Gu okhuo ne u ho ẹmwẹ ọnrẹn lo agbọn ruẹn vbe ẹghẹ ne u gha ya vbe agbọn ọrhiae ne Osanobua ya ru uẹ ẹse na. Lo nene avbe ẹdẹ ne ọ ma maa na hia
Ecclesiastes9:10 Mu aro ye iwinna ne u a rhirhi a gha winna rhunmwuda

Ecclesiastes9:14 Ẹvbo okpa ne ọ ye kherhe kegha rrọ

Ecclesiastes10:6 A ghi rhie avbe ọzuọ ye ukpo ọdakha vbene a na sẹ avbe emwa esi rae.

Ecclesiastes11:1 Rhie igho ruẹ ye ẹki urria ne a do
Ecclesiastes11:2 Rhie igho ye emwi atẹ vbe ihe ughughan nibun
Ecclesiastes11:3 Ehe ne erhan a rhirhi de ghe

Ecclesiastes11:6 Kọ emwi ruẹn vbe owiẹ

Ecclesiastes11:9 Wa ne igbama
Ecclesiastes11:10 Ghẹ gie emwikemwi mu ẹẹn orhiọn rueghe ra ne ọ si obalọ ye uẹ egbe. Ẹghẹ ne u ra ya ru igbama ma mobọ tan.
