1Peter5:12 Sailas
1Peter5:13 Esọsi ne ogieva uwa ne ọ rre Babilọn
1Peter5:14 Wa ya isosunu aho ẹmwẹ ọmwa Eniyayi tuẹ egbe uwa. Te ẹsọhẹ gha gu uwa hia ni re ọghe Kristi gha rrọọ.
2Peter1:1 E Saimọn Pita ne ọguọmwadia kevbe ukọ Jesu Kristi
2Peter1:2 Ẹsọhẹ kevbe ọfumwegbe ne ọ vuọn sẹ omwa
2Peter1:3 Ẹtin ne ọ huanrẹn ọghọe viọ emwi hia ne ima ho ne ima nẹ
2Peter1:4 Odẹ vbe nian ọre ọ na ve ima emwi ighobioye ne ọ maa ẹsẹse
2Peter1:5 Rhunmwuda emwi vbe nian
2Peter1:6 wa ghi rhie i ziengbe ba irẹnmwi uwa
2Peter1:7 wa ghi rhie aho ẹmwẹ ọmwa ne ọ rre ẹkpo etẹn ba aruemwi vbene ọkhọ ọghe Osanobua uwa
2Peter1:8 Enena ọrọre emwi ne a gie ọmwa mu ne ọ khẹ ke uwa
2Peter1:9 Sokpan ọmwa ne ẹ i mwẹ enena
2Peter1:10 Rhunmwuda ọnii khekherriọ
2Peter1:11 Odẹ vberriọ ọre a gha na rhie asẹ ne ọ gbae fo ne uwa
2Peter1:12 Ọna ọre ọ si ẹe ne I gha na gha ye uwa avbe ẹmwẹ na rre ẹghẹ hia
2Peter1:13 Mẹ yayi wẹ emwi ne ọ kei mẹ nọ ne I gha gua avbe emwi na kpao vbe uwu ayere uwa
2Peter1:14 Rhunmwuda
2Peter1:15 I gha lo ẹtin mwẹ hia khekherriọ
2Peter1:16 Rhunmwuda
2Peter1:17 Ma rre evba nii vbe Osanobua ne Erha rhie uyi kevbe ukpọlọmwẹ nẹẹn
2Peter1:18 Ma tobọ ima họẹn vbe urhu na gu ẹe guan
2Peter1:19 Rhunmwuda ọnii ọre ima na mwẹ amuẹntinyan ẹsẹse vbe ọghe orhu ne avbe akhasẹ do kpee. Emwi ne ọ gha ke ne uwa nọ
2Peter1:20 Vbene ọ rhirhi gha ye hẹ
2Peter1:21 Rhunmwuda
2Peter2:1 Vbe ẹghẹ ne ọ gberra
2Peter2:2 Ọ rhe ye vberriọ ni bun gha ye gha yin uyinmwẹ alama iran khian
2Peter2:3 Vbe uwu uzuanmwẹ iran
2Peter2:4 Rhunmwuda Osanobua ma ya bọ avbe odibo ni ru orukhọ
2Peter2:5 Osanobua ma yabọ agbọn nẹdẹ
2Peter2:6 Osanobua bu ohiẹn gbe avbe ẹvbo Sọdom kevbe Gomorra
2Peter2:7 Ọ keghi miẹn Lọt ne ọmwata fan
2Peter2:8 Rhunmwuda
2Peter2:9 Erriọ vbe nọ
2Peter2:10 Ibiba avbe emwa ni lele orriarria emwi ohọhọ egbe iran
2Peter2:11 Vbene iran ghi vbe sẹ ighẹ avbe odibosa ne a miẹn wẹ iran kpọlọ
2Peter2:12 Egbe ne ọ ma ọmwa emwi
2Peter2:13 A gha vbe ye oya ne a re ha iran osa ye oya ne iran si ye emwa ọvbehe egbe. Emwi ne Ọ ya ẹko iran rhiẹnrhiẹn ọrọre ne iran gha ru avbe emwi nii
2Peter2:14 Iran i ho ne iran bẹghe emwi ọvbehe gberra ikhuo ni ku ogboi
2Peter2:15 Iran kpao hin odẹ ne ọ diae rre nẹ
2Peter2:16 A keghi guẹe gui ye abakuru ẹre. Rhunmwuda ekẹtẹkẹtẹ ne odin keghi rhan unu guan
2Peter2:17 Iran na yevbe ẹzẹ ne ọ kae
2Peter2:18 Iran ghi gha ya unu ta ẹmwẹ itengbemu akpa
2Peter2:19 Iran ghi gha tama iran wẹ iran gha khian enọyan egbe iran
2Peter2:20 Rhunmwuda
2Peter2:21 Ọ te wa ma ne iran

2Peter3:2 I ho ne uwa ye avbe ẹmwẹ ne avbe akhasẹ tae ẹghẹ ne ọ kpẹe fua kevbe avbe iyi ni ke obọ Nọyaẹnmwa kevbe Ọmiọnmwafan mwa rre
2Peter3:3 Okaro
2Peter3:4 Iran ghi gha kha wẹ
2Peter3:5 Iran keghi ba yangbe ẹmwata na wẹ

2Peter3:8 Sokpan wa ghẹ mianmian ẹmwẹ ọkpa na
2Peter3:9 Zẹ vbene emwa eso roro ẹe
2Peter3:10 Sokpan Ẹdẹ Nọyaẹnmwa gha rre zẹ vbe oyi. Vbe Ẹdẹ ne ẹdẹnẹdẹrriọ

2Peter3:12 vbe uwu ne uwa na mudia khẹ Ẹdẹ Osanobua

2Peter3:17 Sokpan wa ne ọse mwẹ rẹn ena nẹ

1John1:1 Ẹmwẹ arrọọ ne ọ wa rrọọ ke omuhẹn gha dee
1John1:2 Ugbẹn vbe arọọ na ghi khian ne a ye aro bẹghe nẹ
1John1:3 Emwi ne aro mwa sẹe
1John1:4 Te ima gbẹn ebe na ne ọyẹnmwẹ mwa miẹn ehe na gha re ne ọ gbae.

1John4:1 Wa ne ọse mwẹ ni ghaan
1John4:2 Vbene uwa gha ya rẹn hẹ a deghẹ Orhiọn Osanobua nọ ọre ọna khin: Ọmwaikọmwa ne ọ sẹtin kha wẹ Jesu Kristi do khian ọmwa ne ọ sẹtin wu
1John4:3 Ọmwa ne ọ rhirhi kha ighẹ ohoghe ọna khin vbe ekpa ọghe Jesu
1John4:4 Sokpan
1John4:5 Ẹmwẹ emwi agbọn na ọre iran ta
1John4:6 Sokpan ọghe Osanobua ọre ima khin. Ọmwaikọmwa ne ọ rẹn Osanobua ghi vbe gha rhie ẹmwẹ ima ye ehọ. Ọmwaikọmwa ne ẹ i re ọghe Osanobua
1John4:7 Ọse mwẹ ni ghaan
1John4:8 Ọmwaikọmwa ne ẹ i mwẹ aho ẹmwẹ ọmwa
1John4:9 Vbenian ọre Osanobua ya rhie ma vbene irẹn ho ẹmwẹ mwa hẹ: ọ keghi gie Ovbi ẹre ukpọmọkpa gha die agbọn ne ima sẹtin la ekpa ẹre gha mwẹ arrọọ.
1John4:10 Emwi ne aho ẹmwẹ ọmwa khin ọre ọ na khin
1John4:11 Ọse mwẹ ni ghaan

Revelation20:10 Esu ne ọ rẹrẹ iran
Revelation20:11 I keghi bẹghe ẹkete nọkhua nọfua ọkpa ke ẹe kevbe ọmwa ne ọ tota yọọ. Ẹrinmwi kevbe agbọn keghi lẹ hin odaro ẹre rre
Revelation20:12 I keghi bẹghe emwa ni wulo nẹ ke ni kpọlọ kevbe ni kanmwa
Revelation20:13 Ẹkpo nii okun keghi viọ emwa ni wulo nẹ ne iran hẹ mwẹ ladian. A keghi bu ohiẹn edọmwadẹ ọghọe zẹ vbene uyinmwẹ iran khare.
Revelation20:14 Iyeke ọnii
Revelation20:15 Avbe emwa hia ne eni ẹnrẹn i rre ebe emwa ni ma he wulo
Revelation21:1 Iyeke ọnii
Revelation21:2 I keghi bẹghe Ẹvbo Ne Ọ Huanrẹn nii
Revelation21:3 I keghi họn vbe urhu ọkpa wa datu ke uwu ẹkete rre wẹẹ
Revelation21:4 Ọ gha khiẹn ameve hia hin aro iran rre. Uwu i ghi ra gha rrọọ ọvbehe
Revelation21:5 Ọmwa ne ọ tota ye ẹkete keghi kha wẹẹ
Revelation21:6 Rẹn keghi kha wẹẹ
Revelation21:7 Ọmwa ne ọ rhirhi khọn miotọ
Revelation21:8 Sokpan avbe avbiẹrẹ
Revelation21:9 Ọkpa vbe uwu iran ne odibosa ihinrọn ni viọ ọkpan ni vuọn ne egboghogbogho ihinrọn ne okiekie
Revelation21:10 Orhiọn keghi hin yan mwẹ
Revelation21:11 Uyi Osanobua keghi yae fi wainwain. Nene okpẹvbo kegha fi wainwain vbe okuta ighobioye
Revelation21:12 Ọ kegha mwẹ ekẹn ne a gbe lẹga nọkhua ne ọ yo ẹsẹse
Revelation21:13 Onurho eha ọre ọ rre efẹn ọkpọkpa vbọ
Revelation21:14 A keghi vbe gbe ẹyotọ ekẹn ẹvbo ni yan okuta iweva ne avbe gbẹnnẹ eni avbe ukọ iweva ọghe nene Oteghe Ohuan yi.
Revelation21:15 Odibosa ne ọ gun mwẹ guan keghi mwẹ ọkpọ igoru ne a ya mwa emwi ne ọ ra ya mwa ẹvbo nii
Revelation21:16 Nene ẹvbo kegha re umwọmwẹ vbe igie enenẹ
Revelation21:17 Odibosa nii keghi mwa ekẹn ọnrẹn
Revelation21:18 Jaspa ọre a ya gbe ekẹn nii. Nene ẹvbo tobọ ẹre keghi re ne a ya igoru na ma gua bọ
Revelation21:19 Ẹyotọ ekẹn ne a ghe lẹga ẹre
Revelation21:20 Ne ogisẹn kegha re ọinks
Revelation21:21 Onurho iweva ni rrọọ kegha re ọ ghe okuta ẹrọnmwọ
Revelation21:22 I ma bẹghe Ọgua Osa vbe ẹvbo nii
Revelation21:23 Ẹvbo ni i mwẹ emwi ne ọ ya owẹn ru ra uki ne ọ gha baa vbọ rhunmwuda
Revelation21:24 Uwanmwẹ ọnrẹn ọre emwa ni rre agbọn gha ya bẹghe odẹ
Revelation21:25 Te a khian gha kie urho ẹvbo ni ye otọ vbe ẹdẹ hia
Revelation21:26 A gha viọ ukpọlọmwẹ kevbe ẹfe ẹvbo hia gha die ẹvbo nii.
Revelation21:27 Sokpan emwi awua ọkpa i ra la ẹvbo nii
Revelation22:1 Odibosa ni keghi vbe do ma mwẹ ẹzẹ amẹ ẹfe
Revelation22:2 Ọ keghi lẹ la adesẹneva ukpo ọghe ẹvbo ni. Vbe obọ eva ọghe ẹzẹ nii
Revelation22:3 Emwi ne Osanobua fi ẹre unu ọkpa ne a gha miẹn vbe ẹvbo nii
Revelation22:4 Iran gha bẹghe ẹre ugbaro
Revelation22:5 Asọn i ghi khian gha rrọọ ọvbehe
Revelation22:6 Odibosa nii keghi vbe khama mwẹ wẹ
Revelation22:7 Jesu wẹẹ
Revelation22:8 Mẹ ne Jọn ọre ọ họẹn
Revelation22:9 Sokpan rẹn keghi tama mwẹ wẹ
Revelation22:10 Ọ keghi vbe tama mwẹ wẹẹ
Revelation22:11 Ọmwa ne ọ re ọmwa dan
Revelation22:12 Jesu wẹẹ
Revelation22:13 Mẹ ọrọre Alfa Kevbe Omega
Revelation22:14 Ọ maa ne iran ni họ ẹmwẹ iran huan sẹrriọ ne iran ghi na mwẹ ẹtin
Revelation22:15 Sokpan
Revelation22:16 “Mẹ ne Jesu ọre ọ gie odibo mwẹ ne ọ ya ta ẹmwẹ na ma uwa vbe esọsi. Mẹ ne ovbi uniẹn Devid nọ
Revelation22:17 Orhiọn kevbe Ọha khare wẹ
Revelation22:18 Mẹ ne Jọn wa mobọ tama emwa hia ni họn ẹmwẹ akhasẹ ni rre ebe na
Revelation22:19 A deghẹ ọmwaikọmwa vbe fian hin rre vbe ebe na
Revelation22:20 Ọmwa ne ọ sẹ osẹe ye emwi na hia khare wẹ
